answerBSource: I do not have to switch on the lights
answerCSource: I switch on the side lights
questionTextTarget: Kunduzi shunday belgilangan yoritilgan tunnelga kiryapsiz. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Tunnelda kunduzgi chiroqlar yetarli emas. Ko‘rinish va ko‘rinib turish uchun qisqa faralarni yoqishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign shows you an emergency lay-by. There you can and should wait if you have a breakdown. It's possible that there's already a vehicle there. For breaks an emergency lay-by may not be used.
answerASource: There may be a vehicle in the next emergency bay
answerBSource: In case of breakdown, you should stop in the emergency bay indicated
answerCSource: You may stop here to have a break
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Belgi favqulodda to‘xtash cho‘ntagini ko‘rsatadi. Buzilish bo‘lsa, shu yerda to‘xtashingiz kerak; dam olish uchun foydalanish mumkin emas.
answerATarget: Keyingi favqulodda cho‘ntakda transport vositasi bo‘lishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Buzilish holatida ko‘rsatilgan favqulodda cho‘ntakda to‘xtash kerak
answerCTarget: Bu yerda dam olish uchun to‘xtash mumkin

questionTextSource: What do you have to do when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign is located in front of the entrance to a tunnel. Turn on the low beam and remove sunglasses for unrestricted visibility.
answerASource: Take off your sunglasses
answerBSource: Switch on dipped headlights
answerCSource: Switch on the hazard warning lights
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rsangiz nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Belgi tunnel kirishidan oldin joylashadi. Qisqa faralarni yoqing va ko‘rishni cheklamaslik uchun quyosh ko‘zoynagini yeching.

questionTextSource: You drive into a brightly lit tunnel which is indicated like this. What do you do?
explanationSource: Even a brightly lit tunnel cannot reach daylight conditions, so you need to drive in with low beam to make your vehicle recognizable. The daytime running light is simply not enough in this case.
answerASource: Drive with dipped headlights
answerBSource: Drive without lights
answerCSource: Drive with daytime running lights
questionTextTarget: Shunday belgilangan yorqin yoritilgan tunnelga kirasiz. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Yorqin yoritilgan tunnel ham kunduzgi yorug‘lik sharoitiga teng emas. Transport vositangiz ko‘rinishi uchun qisqa faralar bilan yurishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign combination indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign points to the end of the traffic-calming zone. Now higher speed rules apply again. As a car driver, you have no right of way when you leave and must be careful when entering.
answerASource: - a traffic-calming zone
answerBSource: - a pedestrian zone
answerCSource: - a children's playground
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Belgi tinchlantirilgan harakat hududi tugaganini ko‘rsatadi. Endi odatdagi tezlik qoidalari amal qiladi. Hududdan chiqayotganda siz ustunlikka ega emassiz va ehtiyot bo‘lishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic road sign mean?
explanationSource: You drive on a priority road. The traffic sign is repeated at each intersection or T-junction where you have priority. Outside built-up areas, parking on priority roads is prohibited. On these roads people drive relatively fast and parking vehicles would be a hindrance or a threat.
answerASource: Priority road
answerBSource: No parking on the carriageway outside of settlements
answerCSource: Expressway
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Siz ustun yo‘lda harakatlanyapsiz. Aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida ustun yo‘llarda qatnov qismida parkovka qilish taqiqlanadi.
answerBTarget: Aholi punktidan tashqarida qatnov qismida parkovka taqiqlangan

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign indicates a numbered detour. Since there are several detours, they are numbered. So, you know exactly where to drive.
answerASource: A numbered diversion
answerBSource: Tram line no. 3
answerCSource: A numbered underground car park
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu belgi raqamlangan aylanma yo‘lni bildiradi. Bir nechta aylanma yo‘llar bo‘lgani uchun ular raqamlanadi.

questionTextSource: What do you have to be aware of when you see this traffic sign combination?
explanationSource: The priority road is turning due to the additional sign. It's a turning priority road. If you stay on the priority road, you will need to indicate that. You have to take care of pedestrians crossing the street, if necessary, you have to stop. The answer: "Driving to the left is mandatory" is wrong, since this traffic sign does not dictate a direction of travel.
answerASource: If I am following the priority road, I have to signal a left-turn
answerBSource: If I continue driving straight ahead, I have to signal a right-turn
answerCSource: The direction of traffic to the left is prescribed
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasini ko‘rsangiz nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Qo‘shimcha belgi ustun yo‘l burilishini bildiradi. Ustun yo‘lda qolmoqchi bo‘lsangiz, yo‘nalish o‘zgarishini signal bilan ko‘rsatishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Ustun yo‘l bo‘ylab ketayotgan bo‘lsam, chapga burilish signalini berishim kerak
answerBTarget: To‘g‘ri yurishda davom etsam, o‘ngga burilish signalini berishim kerak

questionTextSource: What is the correct action on roads with these types of protective cycle lanes?
explanationSource: The directional sign indicates the safe area for cyclists. As the vehicle driver, you may only drive on the designated bicycle lane if a risk to cyclists is ruled out. Parking is strictly prohibited here.
answerASource: - drive on the protective lanes when necessary, if there is no risk to cyclists
answerBSource: - in no event drive on the protective lanes
answerCSource: - use the protective lanes to assist parking
questionTextTarget: Bunday himoya veloyo‘laklari bo‘lgan yo‘llarda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Himoya veloyo‘lagiga faqat zarurat bo‘lsa va velosipedchilarga xavf tug‘dirmasdan kirish mumkin. Bu yerda parkovka qilish taqiqlanadi.
answerATarget: - zarurat bo‘lsa va velosipedchilarga xavf bo‘lmasa, himoya yo‘lagida yurish
answerBTarget: - hech qanday holatda himoya yo‘lagida yurmaslik
answerCTarget: - parkovka qilish uchun himoya yo‘lagidan foydalanish

questionTextSource: What must you do upon seeing this traffic sign?
explanationSource: On pedestrian crossings pedestrians have precedence, so vehicles should always drive at moderate speed and be ready to brake at any time. There's a strict restriction on overtaking at pedestrian crossings and with halting traffic it is forbidden to come to a stop at the crossing.
answerASource: I must approach at a moderate speed if it is clear that pedestrians want to cross the road
answerBSource: I must allow the pedestrians to cross the road
answerCSource: I may not remain stationary on the pedestrian crossing if the traffic backs up
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rganda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Piyodalar o‘tish joyida piyodalar ustunlikka ega. O‘rtacha tezlikda yaqinlashing, tormozga tayyor turing va tirbandlikda o‘tish joyida to‘xtab qolmang.
answerATarget: Agar piyodalar yo‘lni kesib o‘tmoqchi ekani aniq bo‘lsa, o‘rtacha tezlikda yaqinlashishim kerak
answerBTarget: Piyodalarga yo‘lni kesib o‘tishga imkon berishim kerak
answerCTarget: Tirbandlik bo‘lsa, piyodalar o‘tish joyida to‘xtab qolmasligim kerak

questionTextSource: What must you be prepared for here?
explanationSource: The traffic sign 'crossing guard', formerly school crossing guards, means that traffic assistance regulates traffic. They are allowed to stop traffic to allow children to cross the road. You need to be prepared for the flow of traffic to stop and for children to walk on the road more often than usual.
answerASource: That the flowing traffic will come to a stop
answerBSource: That children will cross the road more frequently than usual
answerCSource: That children will be playing on the road under supervision
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda nimaga tayyor bo‘lishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Belgi maktab patruli yoki harakat yordamchisi borligini bildiradi. Ular bolalar o‘tishi uchun transportni to‘xtatishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Bolalar odatdagidan ko‘proq yo‘lni kesib o‘tishiga

questionTextSource: What applies according to this traffic sign?
explanationSource: Within traffic calming zones you are allowed to travel at a maximum walking speed of 4 to 7 km/h, which means first gear, without giving gas. The street may be used completely by pedestrians. Children are allowed to play in the street. Be especially attentive and ready to brake. Pedestrians must not be impeded or endangered, you may have to wait. Since playing on the street is allowed here, you have to pay more attention to children. You are only allowed to park on marked areas.
answerASource: I have to drive at walking speed
answerBSource: I may not impede pedestrians
answerCSource: I may only park on designated places
questionTextTarget: Ushbu yo‘l belgisiga ko‘ra nima amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: Tinchlantirilgan harakat hududida faqat piyoda tezligida yurish mumkin. Piyodalar butun ko‘chadan foydalanishi mumkin, ularga xalaqit yoki xavf tug‘dirmaslik kerak.
answerCTarget: Faqat belgilangan joylarda parkovka qilishim mumkin

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign combination mean to you?
explanationSource: The traffic sign indicates the course of the priority road. The additional sign indicates the bend to the left; if you follow this direction, you will still be on the priority road.
answerASource: I am on a priority road that bends left
answerBSource: I am not permitted to turn right or drive straight ahead
answerCSource: If I continue driving straight ahead, I have to allow right of way to vehicles arriving from the right
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgilari kombinatsiyasi siz uchun nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Belgi ustun yo‘lning chapga burilishini ko‘rsatadi. Shu yo‘nalishda davom etsangiz, ustun yo‘lda qolasiz.
answerBTarget: O‘ngga burilish yoki to‘g‘ri yurishimga ruxsat yo‘q
answerCTarget: To‘g‘ri yurishda davom etsam, o‘ngdan kelayotgan transportga yo‘l berishim kerak

questionTextSource: What do you have to be aware of when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: For this question, all three answers are correct. In a "traffic calming zone", pedestrians may use the entire width of the street, children can play on the street and you may only drive at walking speed.
answerASource: Children may play across the entire road
answerBSource: Motor vehicles have to drive at walking speed
answerCSource: Pedestrians are entitled to use the entire breadth of the road
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisini ko‘rsangiz nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Tinchlantirilgan harakat hududida piyodalar butun yo‘l kengligidan foydalanishi, bolalar yo‘lda o‘ynashi mumkin va motorli transport faqat piyoda tezligida yurishi kerak.
answerATarget: Bolalar butun yo‘l bo‘ylab o‘ynashi mumkin
answerBTarget: Motorli transport piyoda tezligida yurishi kerak
answerCTarget: Piyodalar yo‘lning butun kengligidan foydalanishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: When you see this traffic sign, you approach a customs office. This means that you may encounter a traffic jam and therefore have to reduce your speed. You may also be controlled, so have all the papers at hand. Follow the instructions of the customs officers.
answerASource: A customs point
answerBSource: A toll road
answerCSource: A prohibition on through-traffic
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu belgi bojxona punktiga yaqinlashayotganingizni bildiradi. Tirbandlik bo‘lishi mumkin, tezlikni kamaytiring va hujjatlarni tayyor tuting.

questionTextSource: What is correct in this situation?
explanationSource: The village sign indicates the end of a closed village in the lower part. The upper part indicates the next town. You are standing on the left side of the road.
answerASource: - a built-up area ends
answerBSource: - a built-up area starts
answerCSource: - a deviation ends
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda qaysi javob to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Qishloq nomi belgisi pastki qismida aholi punkti tugaganini, yuqori qismida esa keyingi aholi punktini bildiradi. Siz yo‘lning chap tomonidasiz.

questionTextSource: What do you have to observe in a traffic situation like this one?
explanationSource: Guidelines have the task of separating the lanes. Therefore, you may only drive over them if you avoid obstacles or overtake vehicles. This is only allowed if no road user is endangered.
answerASource: - cross the centre line in order to pass by the obstruction
answerBSource: - cross the centre line in order to overtake
answerCSource: - not cross the centre line if this would endanger other traffic
questionTextTarget: Bunday yo‘l harakati vaziyatida nimaga rioya qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘naltiruvchi chiziqlar yo‘laklarni ajratadi. To‘siqni chetlab o‘tish yoki quvib o‘tish uchun ularni kesib o‘tish faqat hech kimga xavf tug‘dirmasa mumkin.
answerATarget: - to‘siqni aylanib o‘tish uchun markaziy chiziqni kesib o‘tish
answerBTarget: - quvib o‘tish uchun markaziy chiziqni kesib o‘tish
answerCTarget: - agar bu boshqa transportga xavf tug‘dirsa, markaziy chiziqni kesib o‘tmaslik

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: If you are driving a vehicle, you may only stop in an emergency stop and breakdown bay in the event of an emergency or breakdown.
answerASource: An emergency stop and breakdown bay
answerBSource: A temporary additional carriageway
answerCSource: A stop for breaks and changing drivers
questionTextTarget: Bu yo‘l belgisi nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu favqulodda to‘xtash va buzilish cho‘ntagini bildiradi. Unda faqat favqulodda holat yoki buzilishda to‘xtash mumkin.
answerCTarget: Dam olish va haydovchi almashtirish uchun joy

questionTextSource: You are driving on a road that has a protective lane for cyclists. How may you use the protective lane?
explanationSource: You may use the cycle lane if necessary, provided you do not endanger or obstruct cyclists.
answerASource: - drive on the protective lane when necessary
answerBSource: - park on the protective lane
answerCSource: - stop on the protective lane
questionTextTarget: Siz velosipedchilar uchun himoya yo‘lagi bor yo‘lda harakatlanyapsiz. Himoya yo‘lagidan qanday foydalanishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Zarurat bo‘lsa, velosipedchilarga xavf tug‘dirmasdan yoki xalaqit bermasdan himoya yo‘lagidan foydalanishingiz mumkin.

questionTextSource: What can red-white warning plates on vehicles indicate?
explanationSource: Red and white warning signs point to vehicles with excess width (e.g., abnormal wide agricultural vehicles). Trailers parked inside a built-up area must either be illuminated or marked with reflective warning signs. So, warning signs do not refer to hazmat trucks.
answerASource: A trailer parked on the roadway within a built-up area
answerBSource: A vehicle with excessive width
answerCSource: A vehicle transporting dangerous goods
questionTextTarget: Transport vositalaridagi qizil-oq ogohlantiruvchi plitalar nimani bildirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Qizil-oq ogohlantiruvchi plitalar haddan tashqari keng transport vositalarini yoki aholi punktida yo‘lda parkovka qilingan tirkamani belgilashi mumkin. Ular xavfli yuk tashuvchi transportni bildirmaydi.
answerATarget: Aholi punktida qatnov qismida parkovka qilingan tirkama

questionTextSource: What must you remember in the interests of environmental protection?
explanationSource: In the interests of environmental protection, you as a car driver must pay attention to the following: 1. Avoid driving unnecessarily; 2. Operate the engine evenly at medium speed; 3. Shut off the engine during extended periods of idling - after about a minute. In general, running the engine at idle will result in faster engine wear and wastes energy. You should therefore warm the engine in medium speed range and possibly stay in this area. High engine speeds lead to increased fuel consumption and therefore pollute the environment.
answerASource: To avoid running the engine unnecessarily when you are stationary
answerBSource: To avoid driving back and forth unnecessarily
answerCSource: To drive with high revolutions per minute too often
questionTextTarget: Atrof-muhitni muhofaza qilish nuqtai nazaridan nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Keraksiz yurishdan saqlaning, dvigatelni bir maromda ishlating va uzoq kutishda dvigatelni o‘chiring. Bekor ishlash yoqilg‘ini sarflaydi va dvigatelni tezroq eskirtiradi.
answerATarget: To‘xtab turganda dvigatelni keraksiz ishlatishdan saqlanish

questionTextSource: What must be regularly serviced to prevent high fuel consumption and excessive pollutant emission?
explanationSource: The fuel consumption of a vehicle should be as low as possible. As a car driver, you should therefore regularly check and maintain all the components of your vehicle that are important for fuel consumption. These are, for example, the ignition and injection system and the engine air filter and the carburetor.
answerASource: Engine air filter
answerBSource: Carburettor or fuel-injection system
answerCSource: Ignition system
questionTextTarget: Yuqori yoqilg‘i sarfi va ortiqcha zararli chiqindilarni oldini olish uchun nima muntazam texnik xizmatdan o‘tishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Yoqilg‘i sarfiga ta’sir qiluvchi qismlar muntazam tekshirilishi kerak: dvigatel havo filtri, karbyurator yoki yonilg‘i purkash tizimi, shuningdek, yoqish tizimi.

questionTextSource: What happens as a result of tyre pressures being well below the recommended levels?
explanationSource: Too low air pressure in the tire as well leads to increased fuel consumption. The effort required to keep the tire running is significantly higher than when the tire pressure has been set correctly. This leads to higher wear on the tire, increased fuel consumption and harms the environment.
answerASource: Fuel consumption increases
answerBSource: Tyre wear increases
answerCSource: Pollutant emission decreases
questionTextTarget: Shina bosimi tavsiya etilgan darajadan ancha past bo‘lsa nima yuz beradi?
explanationTarget: Shina bosimi juda past bo‘lsa, yoqilg‘i sarfi va shina yeyilishi ortadi. Bu atrof-muhitga ham zarar keltiradi.

questionTextSource: When should you switch off the engine to save fuel and reduce pollution?
explanationSource: In order to avoid unnecessary consumption of gasoline, the engine should be switched off in certain situations. These include, for example, moments in traffic jams or in front of level crossings. Although there is an increased consumption during starting, it is compensated again starting from a downtime of one minute. You should not turn off the engine at a stop sign.
answerASource: When you have to wait in a traffic jam for a long time
answerBSource: When you have to wait at level crossings or building sites
answerCSource: When you stop at a "STOP" sign
questionTextTarget: Yoqilg‘ini tejash va ifloslanishni kamaytirish uchun qachon dvigatelni o‘chirish kerak?
explanationTarget: Tirbandlikda yoki temiryo‘l kesishmasi oldida uzoq kutishda dvigatelni o‘chirish kerak. Stop belgisi oldidagi qisqa to‘xtashda esa odatda o‘chirilmaydi.
answerBTarget: Temiryo‘l kesishmasi yoki qurilish joyida kutganda

questionTextSource: Your vehicle loses oil. How much drinking water can be polluted by a single drop of oil?
explanationSource: You should urgently avoid oil loss. Because even a single drop of oil can contaminate up to 600 liters of water and make it unfit for consumption.
answerASource: 600 litres
answerBSource: 50 litres
answerCSource: 1 litre
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangizdan moy oqmoqda. Bir tomchi moy qancha ichimlik suvini ifloslantirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Moy oqishini darhol bartaraf etish kerak. Hatto bitta tomchi moy 600 litrgacha suvni ichishga yaroqsiz qilib qo‘yishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What must you remember when refuelling?
explanationSource: Inhaling fuel vapors is harmful to your health. Therefore, make sure that the dispenser is being used correctly and pay attention to any defects when refueling. When the tank is full, the automatic system should be switched off. This prevents the overflow of gasoline or diesel. In addition, some air must remain in the tank for the fuel to expand.
answerASource: Do not breath in any fuel fumes
answerBSource: Do not refuel when the tank is full and the nozzle has switched off
answerCSource: Fill up to the brim if possible
questionTextTarget: Yoqilg‘i quyishda nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yoqilg‘i bug‘larini nafasga olish sog‘liq uchun zararli. Bak to‘lgach va pistolet avtomatik o‘chgach, quyishni davom ettirmang. Bakda yoqilg‘i kengayishi uchun joy qolishi kerak.
answerBTarget: Bak to‘lib, pistolet o‘chgach, yana yoqilg‘i quyishni davom ettirmang

questionTextSource: The engine and exhaust system of a vehicle have been "souped up". What could be the effects?
explanationSource: A souped-up engine and muffler provide increased noise pollution. In addition, the vehicle consumes more fuel. On top of that, exhaust emissions are increased and pollute the environment. In the worst case, the driver can expect a withdrawal of the operating license.
answerASource: Increased noise pollution
answerBSource: Increased pollutant emission
answerCSource: Considerable reduction in fuel consumption
questionTextTarget: Transport vositasining dvigateli va chiqarish tizimi “kuchaytirilgan”. Buning oqibatlari qanday bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Kuchaytirilgan dvigatel va chiqarish tizimi shovqinni, yoqilg‘i sarfini va zararli chiqindilarni oshiradi. Eng yomon holatda foydalanish ruxsatnomasi bekor qilinishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: How can you reduce the noise made by a car?
explanationSource: In the low-speed speed range, the engine runs quieter than in high-revving areas. Deep-tread tires and driving without air filters also cause noise pollution. A driving style predominantly in the low-speed range saves fuel, is environmentally friendly and quiet. The minimum speeds must, however, be met, otherwise the engine runs twitchy, is cogging and sputtering. The lower the speed at which the engine is still running without cogging, the lower the noise.
answerASource: By driving at a low engine speed
answerBSource: By using all-terrain tyres
answerCSource: By removing the air filter
questionTextTarget: Avtomobil shovqinini qanday kamaytirish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Dvigatel past aylanishlarda jimroq ishlaydi. Past aylanishda haydash yoqilg‘ini tejaydi, atrof-muhitga foydali va shovqinni kamaytiradi.
answerBTarget: Hamma joyga mos shinalardan foydalanish orqali

questionTextSource: Where can used oil, lubricants and car batteries be taken to be disposed of properly?
explanationSource: Waste oils, lubricants and vehicle batteries can be disposed of properly in the recycling center or via the car repair shop. Never should these substances be disposed of with household waste. It is special waste.
answerASource: To recycling centres
answerBSource: To car workshops
answerCSource: In the household waste
questionTextTarget: Ishlatilgan moy, moylash materiallari va avtomobil akkumulyatorlarini to‘g‘ri utilizatsiya qilish uchun qayerga topshirish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Ishlatilgan moylar, moylash materiallari va akkumulyatorlar qayta ishlash markazlari yoki avtomobil ustaxonalari orqali topshirilishi kerak. Ularni maishiy chiqindiga tashlash mumkin emas.

questionTextSource: How can you drive fuel-efficiently when travelling at a constant speed?
explanationSource: At constant speed, you can save fuel with the following measures: 1. by driving evenly in the low speed range; 2. by using the cruise control. The low speed range is just above the minimum speed that the engine needs for its optimal performance. If you drive below that, the engine is cogging; if you drive over it the fuel consumption increases in the high-speed range due to the engine performance. With steady driving in the low-speed speed range, the engine runs smoothly and with low fuel consumption. Cruise control allows a uniform driving style and relieves the / the car driver.
answerASource: By using cruise control
answerBSource: By driving at a low engine speed
answerCSource: By driving at a high engine speed
questionTextTarget: Doimiy tezlikda harakatlanganda yoqilg‘ini qanday tejash mumkin?
explanationTarget: Doimiy tezlikda past dvigatel aylanishlarida bir maromda haydash va kruiz-nazoratdan foydalanish yoqilg‘ini tejaydi.

questionTextSource: At which engine speed range will fuel consumption be lower?
explanationSource: An engine consumes the least fuel in the speed range just above the minimum speed. This is the so-called low-speed speed range. When driving in the low-speed range, the speed should always be above the idle speed. An engine below the minimum speed runs twitchy, is cogging, sputtering or turns off. As a rule of thumb, the lower the speed at which the engine runs without cogging, the more fuel can be saved.
answerASource: At low engine speed
answerBSource: At high engine speed
questionTextTarget: Qaysi dvigatel aylanish oralig‘ida yoqilg‘i sarfi kamroq bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: Dvigatel eng kam yoqilg‘ini minimal ishlash tezligidan biroz yuqori past aylanish oralig‘ida sarflaydi.

questionTextSource: You have to wait because of a closed rail-crossing barrier. How can you now help protect the environment and save fuel?
explanationSource: When waiting in front of closed gates it is recommended to switch off the engine. On the one hand you save fuel and thus money, on the other hand, a switched-off engine is environmentally friendly. A pure gearshift to idle is not recommended, as even at idle the engine does not turn off and continues to use fuel.
answerASource: By switching off the engine
answerBSource: By switching off the automatic start-stop
answerCSource: By letting the engine idle
questionTextTarget: Yopiq temiryo‘l shlagbaumi sabab kutishingiz kerak. Atrof-muhitni himoya qilish va yoqilg‘ini tejash uchun nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Yopiq shlagbaum oldida kutganda dvigatelni o‘chirish tavsiya etiladi. Bu yoqilg‘i va pulni tejaydi hamda atrof-muhitga foydali.

questionTextSource: What measures help protect the environment?
explanationSource: Turning the air conditioning off saves fuel as well. Low rolling resistance tires are designed for lower rolling resistance and can save fuel. Low-friction oils are synthetic oils with improved flow behavior, the so-called viscosity. This lubricates the engine faster and better and reduces friction. This also leads to a noticeable saving of fuel. Only oils approved by the engine/vehicle manufacturer should be used to prevent engine damage.
answerASource: - low-resistance tyres
answerBSource: - low viscosity engine oil
answerCSource: - air-conditioning systems
questionTextTarget: Atrof-muhitni himoya qilishga qaysi choralar yordam beradi?
explanationTarget: Past qarshilikli shinalar va past ishqalanishli motor moyi yoqilg‘ini tejaydi. Konditsionerni o‘chirish ham yoqilg‘i sarfini kamaytiradi.

questionTextSource: What should you do to protect the environment?
explanationSource: You should avoid driving at high speeds. If the vehicle develops smoke, have it checked and repaired in a workshop.
answerASource: - a lot of smoke is coming from the exhaust, I should arrange for the motor vehicle to be checked
answerBSource: - waiting for prolonged periods, I should switch off the engine
answerCSource: - driving, I should use the upper engine speed range
questionTextTarget: Atrof-muhitni himoya qilish uchun nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yuqori tezlikda haydashdan saqlaning. Transport vositasidan ko‘p tutun chiqsa, uni ustaxonada tekshirtirib, ta’mirlating. Uzoq kutishda dvigatelni o‘chiring.
answerATarget: - chiqarish trubasidan ko‘p tutun chiqsa, transport vositasini tekshirtirishim kerak
answerCTarget: - haydashda yuqori dvigatel aylanishlaridan foydalanishim kerak

questionTextSource: What can regular vehicle maintenance help achieve?
explanationSource: Regular vehicle maintenance helps to ensure road safety, low fuel consumption and low emissions.
answerASource: Keeping fuel consumption low
answerBSource: Keeping emission levels low
answerCSource: Ensuring road safety

questionTextSource: In which situations should you switch off the engine to save fuel and reduce environmental pollution?
explanationSource: You should turn off the engine before a gated railway crossing or if you are in a traffic jam, as you cannot accurately estimate the length of the waiting time. This way you can reduce your environmental impact and save fuel at the same time.

answerBSource: - I have to wait at a gated level crossing
answerCSource: - I have to stop at a “Stop” sign

questionTextSource: What can cause unnecessary noise pollution when driving?
explanationSource: If you drive at high speed or your muffler is defective, the noise level is increased. Low-speed driving also reduces fuel consumption. A defective muffler should be repaired in a workshop.

answerBSource: A defective exhaust
answerCSource: Driving at low revolutions per minute

questionTextSource: How should you change gears in order to drive with particular consideration to the environment and fuel saving?
explanationSource: Changing gears environmentally friendly means to upshift early and shift down late. Do not drive the gears into the upper speeds, because this leads to the highest fuel consumption. You should start in first gear and then switch directly to second gear if possible. However, in some traffic situations, such as on the highway acceleration lane or while overtaking, it is necessary to drive with high speed. Of course you should do this in such a situation.
answerASource: Change to a higher gear as early as possible
answerBSource: Change to a lower gear as late as possible
answerCSource: Change gears only when reaching the upper revolution limit
questionTextTarget: Atrof-muhit va yoqilg‘i tejamkorligini hisobga olib viteslarni qanday almashtirish kerak?

questionTextSource: What is important to avoid pollution and to save energy when driving?
explanationSource: Low fuel consumption defines environmentally friendly and energy-saving driving. This requires the regular examination of consumption values ​​in order to optimize engine timing and to detect errors in good time.

answerCSource: Wash the engine regularly, at least four times a year

explanationSource: If you drive hectically, switching constantly between braking and accelerating and "playing with the gas", your vehicle consumes too much unnecessary fuel. Especially when accelerating a lot of energy is needed. When driving downhill in high gear, vehicle drivers burden the brakes unnecessarily. However, this does not result in increased fuel consumption.

questionTextSource: What indicates excessive petrol consumption due to high wear or wrong tuning of the engine?
explanationSource: Dark smoke indicates increased fuel consumption. It may be causally related to a fault of the engine control. You should definitely visit a workshop. Condensation, which drips from the exhaust, or white water vapor in cold weather, however, are normal.

answerBSource: Condensation water from the exhaust

questionTextSource: What kind of driving results in high fuel consumption?
explanationSource: High speeds require more power due to the increased air resistance. As a result, the fuel consumption increases. If the driver drives rapidly or accelerates unnecessarily, this driving style also leads to an increased consumption. The same applies if gears are driven at full speed.

questionTextSource: How do you drive with consideration to the environment?
explanationSource: Avoid constant acceleration and braking. Accelerating consumes unnecessary fuel and can be avoided, for example, in front of red lights by laying off the gas pedal. Maximum acceleration leads to high pollutant emissions and high noise as well as environmental pollution.

questionTextSource: How can you cover more kilometres on less fuel?
explanationSource: The least fuel is consumed in the low-speed range. Timely upshifting avoids high-speed, fuel-intensive driving. Anticipatory driving saves fuel, as you can lay off the gas pedal early and let the vehicle roll out with its existing momentum.

questionTextSource: What can you do to help protect the environment?
explanationSource: The best way to protect the environment is to drive less. All journeys that are not absolutely necessary should be avoided. Certain driving styles consume extra fuel: Short-distance driving, especially when the engine is still cold, stop-and-go traffic, for example in crowded inner cities and searching for a parking space. On top of that, in areas with heavy traffic, the risk of smog from the exhaust emissions of vehicles increases. Driving at full throttle will not only cause noise, but your fuel consumption will increase disproportionately. However, once you are only 20% below the maximum speed, you reduce your fuel consumption by about 40%. Carpooling is also good for the environment.
answerASource: - driving short distances
answerBSource: - driving at flat-out speed
answerCSource: - driving in crowded city centres
questionTextTarget: Atrof-muhitni himoya qilish uchun nima qilishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Eng yaxshi himoya — keraksiz haydamaslik. Qisqa masofalar, shahar markazidagi tirbandlik va maksimal tezlikda haydash ortiqcha yoqilg‘i sarflaydi va chiqindilarni oshiradi.

questionTextSource: How can you achieve efficient fuel consumption and low pollutant emissions?
explanationSource: Before you drive off, you should make sure that the correct tire pressure is set. All important information about this topic can be found in the operating instructions of your vehicle. If the tire internal pressure is too high or too low, there will be an increase in pollutant emissions. Even unbalanced driving can lead to high fuel consumption. Therefore, instead of accelerating to the upper rotational speed limit and only change gears then, you should shift up in the lower or middle rotational speed limit range. This means you consume less fuel and at the same time reduce the exhaust emissions of your car.
answerASource: By having the proper tyre pressure
answerBSource: By maintaining an even driving style at low engine speeds
answerCSource: By using the total capacity of every gear

questionTextSource: Why is it beneficial to use low viscosity engine oil?
explanationSource: Low-friction oils are characterized by a better flow behavior. These are synthetic oils that reduce friction in the engine through their improved viscosity and optimize oiling. This saves fuel. When using low-friction oils, attention must be paid to the approval of the manufacturer of the engine or vehicle.
answerASource: - generate less friction in the engine
answerBSource: - reduce fuel consumption
answerCSource: - can be disposed of as household waste
questionTextTarget: Past viskoziteli motor moyidan foydalanish nega foydali?

questionTextSource: What should you do after starting the vehicle?
explanationSource: After starting the car, you should drive off directly in the low-speed range. Warming up the engine while standing is prohibited and wastes fuel. In the low-speed range, the engine can be warmed up gently. Driving at high-revving directly is not good for the engine. Generally, the engine consumes more fuel at high speed. At too low speeds, the engine is cogging and sputtering. The consumption of an engine is the lowest just above the minimum speed.
answerASource: - drive off as promptly as possible
answerBSource: - drive at low engine speeds where possible
answerCSource: - if possible, allow the engine of the stationary vehicle to warm up

answerCTarget: - imkon bo‘lsa, turgan transport vositasi dvigatelini qizdirish

questionTextSource: How can you save fuel?
explanationSource: You can save fuel by: 1. driving smoothly and anticipatory while avoiding high engine speeds; 2. remove unused roof structures, as they increase fuel consumption with air resistance; 3. swap winter tires for summer tires in the warm season. Driving smoothly means avoiding unnecessary acceleration and deceleration. For example, by slowly rolling toward a red light, you can use the rest of the momentum to drive on if it is already green when you reach the traffic light. Only having to give gas, saves fuel compared to starting from standing completely still.
answerASource: - removing any non-essential roof boxes etc
answerBSource: - driving in a foresighted manner
answerCSource: - driving with winter tyres the whole year round
questionTextTarget: Yoqilg‘ini qanday tejash mumkin?

questionTextSource: How can you minimise tyre wear?
explanationSource: Driving with winter tires in non-winter weather leads to increased tire wear. Strong acceleration is associated with increased abrasion. The tire pressure recommended by the vehicle manufacturer must be observed. Too little tire pressure increases the tire wear considerably. If the air pressure is too low, the tire will deform more with each rotation than with correct tire pressure. Thereby the fabric layers of the tires rub against each other. Heat can be generated that irreparably damages the tire.
answerASource: I refrain as much as possible from rapid acceleration
answerBSource: I regularly check the tyre inflation pressure
answerCSource: I use winter tyres all year round
questionTextTarget: Shina yeyilishini qanday kamaytirish mumkin?

questionTextSource: What influences the degree of centrifugal force on bends?
explanationSource: The centrifugal force can throw your vehicle out of the curve. When doubling the speed, the centrifugal force quadruples. In addition, the curve radius influences this force as well. The tighter the curve, the more the centrifugal force increases. Therefore, you must brake early in tight corners.
answerASource: The radius of the bend
answerBSource: Speed
answerCSource: Headwind
questionTextTarget: Burilishlarda markazdan qochma kuch darajasiga nima ta’sir qiladi?
explanationTarget: Markazdan qochma kuch avtomobilni burilishdan chiqarib yuborishi mumkin. Tezlik ikki baravar oshsa, bu kuch to‘rt baravar ortadi. Burilish radiusi ham ta’sir qiladi.

questionTextSource: Wet conditions can impair the effectiveness of drum brakes. What should you do?
explanationSource: The drum brake can run dry. For that you as the car driver brake cautiously. The drum brake heats up and the water can evaporate. Of course, you brake only when the traffic flow allows it. A rear-end collision must be avoided at all costs. Keep an eye on the traffic behind you.
answerASource: I carefully drive to dry the brakes
answerBSource: I apply the brakes repeatedly while stationary
answerCSource: I refill the brake fluid
questionTextTarget: Namlik barabanli tormozlarning samaradorligini pasaytirishi mumkin. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Tormozlarni ehtiyotkorlik bilan bosib, quritish mumkin. Buni faqat harakat oqimi imkon berganda va orqadagi transportga e’tibor bergan holda qiling.
answerATarget: Tormozlarni quritish uchun ehtiyotkorlik bilan haydayman

questionTextSource: When will offences carrying two points be deleted from the Central Register of Road Traffic Offenders?
explanationSource: Registered misdemeanors, which have been scored and entered in Register of Driver Fitness with two points, become statute-barred after five years. Serious violations are always punished with two points.
answerASource: - 5 years
answerBSource: - 3 years
answerCSource: - 2 years
questionTextTarget: Ikki ball bilan baholanadigan qoidabuzarliklar Markaziy yo‘l harakati qoidabuzarlari reyestridan qachon o‘chiriladi?
explanationTarget: Haydashga yaroqlilik reyestrida ikki ball bilan qayd etilgan jiddiy qoidabuzarliklar besh yildan keyin o‘chiriladi.

questionTextSource: What can cause skidding on bends?
explanationSource: Defective shock absorbers can be the cause of a vehicle skidding or swinging off the curve when turning. The correct tire pressure specified by the manufacturer is important for a stable vehicle position in curves. It is tailored to the overall design of the vehicle. Too low or too different tire pressure reduces driving stability and increases the risk of skidding on turns. Too high a load has an influence on the driving stability. There is not too little loading.
answerASource: Faulty shock-absorbers
answerBSource: Insufficient or uneven tyre pressure
answerCSource: Load is too small
questionTextTarget: Burilishlarda sirpanishga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Nosoz amortizatorlar, yetarli bo‘lmagan yoki notekis shina bosimi burilishlarda avtomobil barqarorligini kamaytiradi va sirpanish xavfini oshiradi.
answerBTarget: Yetarli bo‘lmagan yoki notekis shina bosimi

questionTextSource: What can cause skidding on bends?
explanationSource: In curves, the following factors can lead to skidding: 1. excessive speed; 2. wet or icy roads; 3. strong braking. In turns, much of the stiction forces are needed for the cornering forces that hold the vehicle in the lane. If you brake too much, the stiction is instead used largely for the transmission of the braking force. As a result, the cornering forces are too low to counteract the centrifugal force, the same applies to excessive speed. On wet roads, a film of water between the road surface and the tire reduces grip and promotes skidding.
answerASource: Heavy braking
answerBSource: Driving fast on a wet roadway
answerCSource: Slight acceleration when leaving the bend
questionTextTarget: Burilishlarda sirpanishga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Burilishlarda haddan tashqari tezlik, ho‘l yoki muzli yo‘l va kuchli tormozlash sirpanishga olib kelishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What can cause a dangerous situation?
explanationSource: When cutting a corner, the vehicle in the curve is directed inward and the opposite lane is used as well in order to progress faster. This represents a serious threat to oncoming traffic and can lead to serious accidents. Dimming too late can also jeopardize oncoming drivers as they are dazzled and drive almost blindly.
answerASource: Cutting corners
answerBSource: Dipping your headlights too late
answerCSource: Driving too far behind the vehicle in front
questionTextTarget: Xavfli vaziyatga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Burilishni kesib o‘tish qarama-qarshi yo‘lakka chiqishga olib keladi va qarshidan kelayotgan transport uchun jiddiy xavf tug‘diradi. Farani juda kech pasaytirish ham haydovchilarni ko‘r qilishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What do you do if the white car does not stop?
explanationSource: Even if you are in the right of way: Do not take risks in case of bad traffic behavior of other participants. Draw attention to the error with horn signal, but do not insist on your right and renounce your right of way. Lower your speed as well.
answerASource: Reduce speed, waive your priority
answerBSource: Sound your horn and try to pass in front of the car
questionTextTarget: Oq avtomobil to‘xtamasa, nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Ustunlikka ega bo‘lsangiz ham, boshqa ishtirokchilarning noto‘g‘ri harakati holatida tavakkal qilmang. Signal bilan xatoga e’tibor qarating, lekin ustunlikni talab qilmang; tezlikni kamaytiring.
answerBTarget: Signal chalib, avtomobil oldidan o‘tishga harakat qilaman

questionTextSource: What results in specific risks to motorcyclists?
explanationSource: If you ride with the visor open, an insect can fly into it at any time. This can be very painful and distracting. If the road surface changes, there is a risk of falling down because the grip level is different. In heavy rain, motorbikes are more likely to aquaplane than cars.
answerASource: Riding with the visor open
answerBSource: Riding in heavy rain
answerCSource: Changes in the road surfacing
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklchilar uchun o‘ziga xos xavflar nimadan kelib chiqadi?
explanationTarget: Vizor ochiq holda yursangiz, hasharot istalgan vaqtda ichkariga kirishi mumkin. Bu juda og‘riqli va chalg‘ituvchi bo‘ladi. Yo‘l qoplamasi o‘zgarsa, ilashish darajasi boshqacha bo‘lgani uchun yiqilish xavfi bor. Kuchli yomg‘irda mototsikllarda akvaplaning xavfi avtomobillarga qaraganda yuqoriroq.

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: The overtaking vehicle will probably not be able to complete its overtaking manoeuvre as planned. To prevent an accident, you should let the overtaking vehicle get into the lane.
answerASource: I reduce my speed so that the overtaking vehicle can pull in ahead of me
answerBSource: I accelerate so that the overtaking vehicle can pull in behind me
answerCSource: I maintain my speed because there is sufficient safety distance
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Quvib o‘tayotgan transport vositasi, ehtimol, quvib o‘tish manevrini rejalashtirilganidek yakunlay olmaydi. Avariyaning oldini olish uchun unga yo‘lakka qayta kirishga imkon berishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Quvib o‘tayotgan transport vositasi oldimga kira olishi uchun tezligimni kamaytiraman
answerBTarget: Quvib o‘tayotgan transport vositasi ortimga kira olishi uchun tezlashaman
answerCTarget: Xavfsiz masofa yetarli bo‘lgani uchun tezligimni saqlayman

questionTextSource: Why should you allow the truck to change lane?
explanationSource: If you are in the dead corner of the truck and the truck suddenly exhaust yourself, a dangerous situation can occur and you would have to slow down. Since there is enough space between the vehicle in front, you should take the truck into account and enable it to change lanes.
answerASource: Because the driver of the truck may fail to see me
answerBSource: Because I should show due consideration to the truck
answerCSource: Because the alternate merging procedure applies here
questionTextTarget: Nega yuk mashinasiga yo‘lakni almashtirishga imkon berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar siz yuk mashinasining ko‘r nuqtasida bo‘lsangiz va yuk mashinasi to‘satdan yo‘lakni almashtirsa, xavfli vaziyat yuzaga kelishi mumkin va siz sekinlashishga majbur bo‘lasiz. Oldindagi transport vositasi bilan orada yetarli joy borligi sabab yuk mashinasini hisobga olib, unga yo‘lak almashtirishga imkon berishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Chunki yuk mashinasi haydovchisi meni ko‘rmay qolishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Chunki yuk mashinasiga nisbatan e’tiborli bo‘lishim kerak
answerCTarget: Chunki bu yerda navbat bilan qo‘shilish tartibi amal qiladi

questionTextSource: As a motorcyclist , why is it important that you adopt an anticipatory driving style especially on very winding stretches of road?
explanationSource: By riding with foresight, you can recognise the behaviour of oncoming traffic and potentially dangerous situations, such as dirt on the road or a change in cornering radius, in good time and adapt your riding behaviour accordingly.
answerASource: Because the turning radius can reduce as the road continues
answerBSource: Because otherwise I will not be able to see dirt on the roadway in time
answerCSource: Because it means I am able to adjust myself in good time to the actions of oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklchi sifatida, ayniqsa juda ko‘p burilishli yo‘l qismlarida nega oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydash muhim?
explanationTarget: Oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydasangiz, qarshidan kelayotgan transportning xatti-harakatini va yo‘ldagi kir yoki burilish radiusining o‘zgarishi kabi xavfli vaziyatlarni vaqtida payqab, haydash uslubingizni moslashtira olasiz.
answerATarget: Chunki yo‘l davomida burilish radiusi kichrayishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Chunki aks holda yo‘ldagi kirni vaqtida ko‘ra olmayman
answerCTarget: Chunki qarshidan kelayotgan transport harakatlariga o‘z vaqtida moslasha olaman

questionTextSource: As a motorcyclist, you can easily go unnoticed by other vehicle drivers. How can you reduce this risk?
explanationSource:
Try to put yourself in the shoes of the drivers involved so that you can better understand what they might do next. This way, you may be able to recognise a potential hazard and react to it in good time.
If you are driving in a vehicle's side blind spot, the driver will not be able to see you. If possible, drive in such a way that you are not in the blind spot for an unnecessarily long time. You should also try to make eye contact with the drivers involved before turning to ensure that they can see you.
answerASource: I avoid remaining for too long in the blind spot to the side of other vehicles
answerBSource: I try to see the road situation from the perspective of other vehicle drivers
answerCSource: Before taking a turn, I try to establish eye-contact with other drivers in my vicinity
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklchi sifatida boshqa haydovchilar sizni oson payqamay qolishi mumkin. Bu xavfni qanday kamaytirasiz?
explanationTarget: Boshqa haydovchilarning o‘rniga o‘zingizni qo‘yib ko‘ring, shunda ular keyin nima qilishi mumkinligini yaxshiroq tushunasiz. Shu yo‘l bilan ehtimoliy xavfni vaqtida payqab, javob bera olasiz. Transport vositasining yon ko‘r nuqtasida yursangiz, haydovchi sizni ko‘rmaydi. Iloji bo‘lsa, keraksiz uzoq vaqt ko‘r nuqtada qolmaydigan qilib harakatlaning. Burilishdan oldin yaqin atrofdagi haydovchilar bilan ko‘z aloqasi o‘rnatishga ham harakat qiling.
answerATarget: Boshqa transport vositalarining yon ko‘r nuqtasida uzoq qolishdan saqlanaman
answerBTarget: Yo‘l vaziyatini boshqa haydovchilar nuqtayi nazaridan ko‘rishga harakat qilaman
answerCTarget: Burilishdan oldin atrofdagi boshqa haydovchilar bilan ko‘z aloqasi o‘rnatishga harakat qilaman

questionTextSource: What can cause a dangerous situation?
explanationSource: If a foot brake has a strong one-sided effect, the vehicle may swing off laterally during braking. The car may skid and overturn. Therefore, unequal braking forces are extremely dangerous. Excessive steering can also lead to skidding at high speeds because you can no longer keep the lane properly. A disturbed traffic radio is not a technically dangerous defect.
answerASource: Brakes which engage heavily on one side
answerBSource: Too much steering-wheel play
answerCSource: Disturbed reception of traffic information on the radio
questionTextTarget: Xavfli vaziyatga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Agar oyoq tormozi bir tomonga kuchliroq ta’sir qilsa, transport vositasi tormoz paytida yon tomonga og‘ib ketishi mumkin. Avtomobil sirpanib, ag‘darilishi mumkin. Shu sabab tormoz kuchlarining teng bo‘lmasligi juda xavfli. Rulda ortiqcha bo‘shliq bo‘lsa, yuqori tezlikda sirpanishga olib kelishi mumkin, chunki yo‘lakni to‘g‘ri ushlab bo‘lmaydi. Yo‘l radiosining nosozligi texnik xavfli nuqson hisoblanmaydi.
answerCTarget: Radioda yo‘l harakati axborotini qabul qilishning buzilishi

questionTextSource: What are the effects of listening to loud music - especially with an extremely loud bass volume - in the car?
explanationSource: Loud music in the car leads to two negative effects: The driver is distracted by the music and he cannot concentrate on the road. Deep basses in particular lead to strong uncertainty in blind road users. These can lose their orientation, especially with low-frequency music.
answerASource: Blind people lose their orientation when they are near the car
answerBSource: The driver’s attention is significantly impaired
answerCSource: It makes it easier for blind people to recognise where the road is
questionTextTarget: Avtomobilda baland musiqa, ayniqsa juda baland bass tovushi eshitish qanday ta’sir qiladi?
explanationTarget: Avtomobildagi baland musiqa ikki salbiy ta’sirga olib keladi: haydovchi musiqa bilan chalg‘iydi va yo‘lga diqqatini jamlay olmaydi. Ayniqsa chuqur basslar ko‘zi ojiz yo‘l ishtirokchilarida kuchli noaniqlik keltirib chiqaradi. Ular, ayniqsa past chastotali musiqa sabab, orientatsiyasini yo‘qotishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Ko‘zi ojiz odamlar avtomobil yaqinida orientatsiyasini yo‘qotadi
answerCTarget: Ko‘zi ojiz odamlarga yo‘l qayerda ekanini aniqlashni osonlashtiradi

questionTextSource: What can create a hazard when driving?
explanationSource: If the dipped headlights are not working, you will see poorly on the one hand and you will be seen worse on the other. If the service brake is too one-sided, the vehicle could swerve or have a longer braking distance. If there is too much play in the steering, the steering command will not be carried out.
answerASource: A service brake that responds heavily on one side
answerBSource: An excessive amount of play in the steering
answerCSource: A faulty dipped headlight
questionTextTarget: Haydash paytida nima xavf tug‘dirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Qisqa faralar ishlamasa, bir tomondan yomon ko‘rasiz, boshqa tomondan sizni ham yomonroq ko‘rishadi. Ishchi tormoz bir tomonga kuchliroq ta’sir qilsa, transport vositasi chetga og‘ishi yoki tormoz yo‘li uzayishi mumkin. Rulda ortiqcha bo‘shliq bo‘lsa, rul buyrug‘i bajarilmaydi.
answerATarget: Bir tomonga kuchliroq javob beradigan ishchi tormoz

questionTextSource: You are driving on a narrow road. About 20 m ahead of you a child suddenly runs onto the roadway. When is a collision unavoidable despite emergency braking?
explanationSource: For this question, you must first calculate the thinking distance and the hazard braking distance. At 50 km/h, the thinking distance is 50/10 x 3 = 15. So, there are 15 meters of thinking distance. The hazard braking distance is determined by the following calculation: [(50/10 x 50/10) / 2] = 12.5. 50 km/h is the right answer.
answerASource: 50 km/h
answerBSource: 30 km/h
answerCSource: 20 km/h
questionTextTarget: Siz tor yo‘lda ketyapsiz. Taxminan 20 m oldinda bola to‘satdan yo‘lga yugurib chiqdi. Favqulodda tormozga qaramay, qaysi tezlikda to‘qnashuvdan qochib bo‘lmaydi?
explanationTarget: Bu savolda avval fikrlash masofasi va favqulodda tormoz masofasini hisoblash kerak. 50 km/soat tezlikda fikrlash masofasi 50/10 x 3 = 15 metr bo‘ladi. Favqulodda tormoz masofasi [(50/10 x 50/10) / 2] = 12,5 metr. Shuning uchun to‘g‘ri javob 50 km/soat.

questionTextSource: Why do you have to brake?
explanationSource: You have to expect the person standing in front of the stationary truck to move to the left. Braking serves to protect the person.
answerASource: Because someone is walking onto the road
answerBSource: Because passengers are exiting the tram
answerCSource: Because the truck is switching into my lane
questionTextTarget: Nega tormoz berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: To‘xtab turgan yuk mashinasi oldida turgan odam chapga siljishi mumkinligini kutishingiz kerak. Tormozlash odamni himoya qilish uchun kerak.
answerCTarget: Chunki yuk mashinasi mening yo‘lagimga o‘tmoqda

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: When turning right, you must always be aware of pedestrians and cyclists approaching. They may cross the road in front of you.
answerASource: I stop
answerBSource: I continue driving as before
answerCSource: I accelerate
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: O‘ngga burilganda siz har doim yaqinlashayotgan piyodalar va velosipedchilarga e’tibor berishingiz kerak. Ular sizning oldingizdan yo‘lni kesib o‘tishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What must you anticipate in this situation?
explanationSource:
The road sign signals increased caution against children who could walk across the road between the vehicles.
In addition, you have to expect that people get off to the side of the road.
answerASource: Children walking out onto the road
answerBSource: People exiting their vehicles via the side nearest the road
answerCSource: There is a pedestrian crossing up ahead
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l belgisi avtomobillar orasidan yo‘lni kesib o‘tishi mumkin bo‘lgan bolalar sabab ehtiyotkorlikni oshirishni bildiradi. Bundan tashqari, odamlar yo‘l tomonga tushib qolishi mumkinligini kutishingiz kerak.
answerBTarget: Odamlar transport vositalaridan yo‘l tomondan tushishiga

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: Since a person wants to cross the intersection, you have to stop and have the person crossed the traffic light.
answerASource: I stop
answerBSource: I continue driving as before
answerCSource: I accelerate
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Bir kishi chorrahani kesib o‘tmoqchi bo‘lgani uchun siz to‘xtab, u svetofor orqali o‘tib ketishiga imkon berishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What must you reckon with when you are driving in the left-hand lane of an autobahn at high speed?
explanationSource: At high speed, motorcycles are very sensitive to wind from the side. Small fast motorcycles are hard to see, other vehicles might therefore not see you.
answerASource: Motorists in front of you may suddenly pull out to overtake
answerBSource: Even a slight, unexpected side wind can effect road stability
answerCSource: If you have full beam switched on, vehicles travelling in front of you will not pull out to overtake
questionTextTarget: Avtomagistralning chap yo‘lagida yuqori tezlikda ketayotganda nimani hisobga olishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yuqori tezlikda mototsikllar yon shamolga juda sezgir bo‘ladi. Kichik va tez mototsikllarni ko‘rish qiyin, shuning uchun boshqa transport vositalari sizni ko‘rmay qolishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Oldingizdagi haydovchilar quvib o‘tish uchun to‘satdan yo‘lakdan chiqishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Hatto yengil kutilmagan yon shamol ham yo‘lda barqarorlikka ta’sir qilishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Uzoq faralar yoqilgan bo‘lsa, oldindagi transport quvib o‘tish uchun chiqmaydi

questionTextSource: When is there a danger of a motorcycle veering sideways at high speed?
explanationSource: Sudden side wind increases the risk of a motorcycle to veer sideways. Sudden side wind can occur when exiting under a bridge, out of a tunnel, or when overtaking a truck.
answerASource: When you overtake a truck
answerBSource: When driving under a bridge at high speed in a strong side wind
answerCSource: When the braking effect is different on both sides of the front disc brake
questionTextTarget: Qachon mototsikl yuqori tezlikda yon tomonga og‘ib ketish xavfi bor?
explanationTarget: To‘satdan yon shamol mototsiklning yon tomonga og‘ish xavfini oshiradi. Bunday shamol ko‘prik ostidan chiqishda, tunnel chiqishida yoki yuk mashinasini quvib o‘tayotganda paydo bo‘lishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Kuchli yon shamolda ko‘prik ostidan yuqori tezlikda o‘tganda
answerCTarget: Old disk tormozining ikki tomonidagi tormoz ta’siri har xil bo‘lganda

questionTextSource: What must you reckon with when it starts raining after a longer period of dry weather?
explanationSource: Rain clean up part of the dirt on the road. If the weather was dry for a long period of time, the road will accumulate a lot of dirt. With the addition of water, it will create a film on the road that will make the surface more slippery and increase the braking distance. You can also expect poor visibility on your helmet or goggles.
answerASource: A dangerous greasy film on the surface of the road
answerBSource: Bad visibility through helmet visor or goggles
answerCSource: Shorter braking distance
questionTextTarget: Uzoq quruq davrdan keyin yomg‘ir boshlansa, nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yomg‘ir yo‘ldagi kirning bir qismini yuvadi. Ob-havo uzoq vaqt quruq bo‘lsa, yo‘lda ko‘p kir yig‘iladi. Suv qo‘shilganda yo‘l yuzasida sirpanchiq qatlam hosil bo‘ladi, bu sirtni sirpanchiq qilib, tormoz masofasini uzaytiradi. Shuningdek, shlem vizori yoki ko‘zoynak orqali ko‘rinish yomonlashishini kutishingiz mumkin.
answerBTarget: Shlem vizori yoki ko‘zoynak orqali yomon ko‘rinish

questionTextSource: You come unexpectedly upon a stretch of road with loose chippings. What do you do?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: Avoid braking if possible
answerBSource: Hold your course if possible
answerCSource: Brake hard using the handbrake
questionTextTarget: Kutilmaganda yo‘lda bo‘sh shag‘alli qismga duch keldingiz. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Bo‘sh shag‘al ustida iloji boricha tormozlamaslik va yo‘nalishni barqaror ushlab turish kerak. Keskin tormozlash sirpanish yoki yiqilish xavfini oshiradi.

questionTextSource: What can happen if you drive around a left-hand bend near the marked central line?
explanationSource: When turning left, being near the central line is dangerous. Due to the inclination left, you could be hit by a vehicle going in the opposite direction. Road markings such as the central line are slippery, if your motorcycle run on it, it could slip resulting in a fall
answerASource: Because of the inclined position, the upper part of your body could be hit by oncoming traffic
answerBSource: The motorcycle could catch the central line and slip from under you
answerCSource: There is no danger as long as the tyres are new
questionTextTarget: Chap burilishda belgilangan markaziy chiziqqa yaqin yursangiz, nima yuz berishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Chapga burilganda markaziy chiziqqa yaqin bo‘lish xavfli. Mototsikl chapga egilgani sabab tanangizning yuqori qismi qarshidan kelayotgan transportga urilishi mumkin. Markaziy chiziq kabi yo‘l belgilarining yuzasi sirpanchiq bo‘ladi; mototsikl u ustidan yursa, sirpanib yiqilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Egilgan holat sabab tananing yuqori qismi qarshidan kelayotgan transportga urilishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Mototsikl markaziy chiziqqa chiqib, tagidan sirpanib ketishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What are the dangers on wet cobblestones?
explanationSource: Cobblestones are slippery and will therefore increase the risk of falling or tires to lose adhesion to the road and spin when accelerating as well as a tendency of breaks to lock
answerASource: Increased tendency for the brakes to lock
answerBSource: Increased danger of falling
answerCSource: Spinning and skidding of the rear wheel when accelerating
questionTextTarget: Ho‘l tosh yo‘lda qanday xavflar bor?
explanationTarget: Tosh qoplamalar sirpanchiq bo‘ladi, shuning uchun yiqilish xavfi oshadi. Tezlashganda shinalar yo‘lga ilashishini yo‘qotishi va orqa g‘ildirak sirpanishi, tormozlaganda esa g‘ildiraklar bloklanishga moyil bo‘lishi mumkin.
answerCTarget: Tezlashganda orqa g‘ildirakning aylanishi va sirpanishi

questionTextSource: What should you particularly remember when it is raining?
explanationSource: Rain reduces visibility. The road surface is less visible when wet. The visibility can also be lowered by water particles coming from other vehicles. Your visor will also accumulate water droplets and further diminish your visibility.
answerASource: Visibility through goggles or helmet visor gets considerably worse
answerBSource: Road surface damage is less noticeable when the road is wet
answerCSource: Visibility is further reduced by water sprayed up by other vehicles
questionTextTarget: Yomg‘ir yog‘ayotganda ayniqsa nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yomg‘ir ko‘rinishni kamaytiradi. Yo‘l yuzasi ho‘l bo‘lganda kamroq ko‘rinadi. Boshqa transport vositalaridan sachragan suv ham ko‘rinishni pasaytiradi. Vizorda suv tomchilari to‘planib, ko‘rinishni yanada yomonlashtiradi.
answerATarget: Ko‘zoynak yoki shlem vizori orqali ko‘rinish ancha yomonlashadi
answerBTarget: Yo‘l qoplamasidagi shikastlar ho‘l yo‘lda kamroq seziladi
answerCTarget: Boshqa transport vositalari sachratgan suv ko‘rinishni yanada kamaytiradi

questionTextSource: What should you remember when there are tramlines in your lane?
explanationSource: Tramlines are made of metal which is slippery. A motorcycle therefore has a higher risk of sliding and falling on them. When crossing you should try to be as perpendicular to them as possible to avoid slipping
answerASource: Tramlines should always be crossed at the widest angle possible
answerBSource: There is always greater danger of falling on tramlines
answerCSource: Tramlines should always be crossed at the narrowest angle possible
questionTextTarget: Yo‘lagizda tramvay relslari bo‘lsa, nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Tramvay relslari metall bo‘lgani uchun sirpanchiq. Mototsikl ularning ustida sirpanib yiqilish xavfiga ko‘proq duch keladi. Kesib o‘tayotganda iloji boricha perpendikulyar burchakda kesib o‘tishga harakat qiling.
answerATarget: Tramvay relslarini har doim imkon qadar keng burchakda kesib o‘tish kerak
answerBTarget: Tramvay relslarida yiqilish xavfi har doim yuqoriroq
answerCTarget: Tramvay relslarini har doim imkon qadar tor burchakda kesib o‘tish kerak

questionTextSource: What can cause the danger of falling on bends?
explanationSource: When turning on bends, slippery surfaces such as lane markings, oil on the road, dirt, manholes, sand or leaves can lead to a fall
answerASource: Oil on the roadway
answerBSource: Lane markings
answerCSource: The outside edge of the bend is higher than the inside
questionTextTarget: Burilishlarda yiqilish xavfiga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Burilishlarda sirpanchiq yuzalar, masalan yo‘l chiziqlari, yo‘ldagi moy, kir, lyuk qopqoqlari, qum yoki barglar yiqilishga olib kelishi mumkin.
answerCTarget: Burilishning tashqi cheti ichki chetidan balandroq bo‘lishi

questionTextSource: What can cause the danger of falling on bends?
explanationSource: When turning on bends or braking, slippery surfaces such as lane markings, oil on the road, dirt, manholes, sand, dust, gravel, wet surfaces, cobblestones or leaves will increase the risk of falling
answerASource: Manhole covers on the roadway
answerBSource: Leaves on the roadway
answerCSource: Sand on the roadway
questionTextTarget: Burilishlarda yiqilish xavfiga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Burilish yoki tormozlash paytida yo‘l chiziqlari, moy, kir, lyuk qopqoqlari, qum, chang, shag‘al, ho‘l yuzalar, tosh yo‘l yoki barglar kabi sirpanchiq yuzalar yiqilish xavfini oshiradi.

questionTextSource: When must you apply the brakes with particular care?
explanationSource: Braking is less effective on slippery surfaces (wet road, cobblestones, dirt road) and needs to be applied with care
answerASource: When travelling on cobblestones
answerBSource: When it starts raining
answerCSource: On a concrete roadway with good grip
questionTextTarget: Qachon tormozni ayniqsa ehtiyotkorlik bilan bosishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Sirpanchiq yuzalarda, masalan ho‘l yo‘l, tosh qoplama yoki iflos yo‘lda, tormoz ta’siri kamroq bo‘ladi va tormozni ehtiyotkorlik bilan qo‘llash kerak.

questionTextSource: What can cause in aquaplaning (sliding on wet roads) on wet road surfaces?
explanationSource: Aquaplaning - also known as hydroplaning - occurs when the tread depth of the tires is too low to displace the accumulated amount of water or when the amount of water to be discharged is too large due to a high speed (from 60 km/h). In addition, wheel ruts in the road, in which water accumulates, favor this effect.
answerASource: High speed
answerBSource: Worn tyres
answerCSource: Grooves in the roadway
questionTextTarget: Ho‘l yo‘l yuzasida akvaplaningga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Akvaplaning shina protektori yig‘ilgan suvni chiqarib yuborish uchun yetarli bo‘lmaganda yoki yuqori tezlik sabab chiqarilishi kerak bo‘lgan suv miqdori juda katta bo‘lganda yuzaga keladi. Suv to‘planadigan yo‘l izlari ham bu holatni kuchaytiradi.

questionTextSource: Why could overtaking be dangerous here?
explanationSource: Overtaking in slush can lead to many dangers. Under the snow there could be a layer of ice that makes overtaking dangerous. In addition, you could hurl snow masses at other vehicles or to start swerving back and forth yourself.
answerASource: There is still slush on the overtaking lane
answerBSource: Slush could be thrown up and impair visibility
answerCSource: Because beneath the slush there could also be ice on the road
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda quvib o‘tish xavfli bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Qor-shira ustida quvib o‘tish ko‘p xavflarga olib keladi. Qor ostida muz qatlami bo‘lishi mumkin. Bundan tashqari, qor-shira boshqa transport vositalariga sachrashi va ko‘rinishni yomonlashtirishi yoki o‘zingizni chayqalishga olib kelishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Quvib o‘tish yo‘lagida hali qor-shira bor
answerCTarget: Qor-shira ostida yo‘lda muz ham bo‘lishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What must you do if your vehicle is caught by a strong side wind?
explanationSource: If your vehicle is hit by strong crosswinds, you should not accelerate, slow down instead and countersteer. The faster you drive, the less secure you can keep your vehicle on the road, since crosswinds can lead to skidding of the vehicle.
answerASource: Steer against the wind
answerBSource: Reduce speed
answerCSource: Accelerate rapidly
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz kuchli yon shamolga tushsa, nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Kuchli yon shamol transport vositangizga ta’sir qilsa, tezlashmang; aksincha, tezlikni kamaytirib, shamolga qarshi rul bering. Qanchalik tez yursangiz, transport vositasini yo‘lda barqaror ushlab turish shunchalik qiyinlashadi.

questionTextSource: When can strong side wind be particularly dangerous?
explanationSource: Changing wind directions are dangerous when driving. Sudden gusts can catch your vehicle and push it aside. You have to countersteer strongly to keep your vehicle in the lane. If the wind changes direction, you have to react quickly and adjust your steering behavior. Strong crosswind is a danger especially on bridges and on level, undeveloped and unwooded terrain. If you overtake one or more trucks, you will have to expect changing pressure conditions when entering the slipstream of the truck and when leaving the truck. At forest aisles or when leaving wooded areas, a strong crosswind can also hit you abruptly.
answerASource: When overtaking trucks
answerBSource: When driving across bridges
answerCSource: When driving past firebreaks in forests
questionTextTarget: Qachon kuchli yon shamol ayniqsa xavfli bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Harakat paytida shamol yo‘nalishining o‘zgarishi xavfli. To‘satdan shamol transport vositangizni yon tomonga surishi mumkin. Ko‘priklarda, ochiq tekis hududlarda, yuk mashinalarini quvib o‘tayotganda, o‘rmon yo‘laklari yoki o‘rmon hududidan chiqishda kuchli yon shamol ayniqsa xavfli.

questionTextSource: What must you reckon with here?
explanationSource: If you drive on the motorway in a strong crosswind from the right, the crosswind constantly pushes the car to the left. You have to countersteer to the right to stay in the lane. If you overtake a truck, expect that the pressure from the crosswind is gone immediately as you enter the slipstream of the truck. If you continue to countersteer, there is a risk that you drive against the truck. Since the crosswind comes from the right, the front vehicle could be pushed to the left.
answerASource: Your vehicle could be blown to the left by the strong side wind
answerBSource: When overtaking, your vehicle is pulling to the right when you enter the slipstream of the truck
answerCSource: The vehicle travelling in front of you can be blown to the right
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar avtomagistralda o‘ng tomondan kuchli yon shamol essa, u avtomobilni doim chapga suradi. Yo‘lakda qolish uchun o‘ngga qarshi rul berishingiz kerak. Yuk mashinasini quvib o‘tayotganda uning shamol panasi hududiga kirganda yon shamol bosimi darhol yo‘qoladi; qarshi rulni davom ettirsangiz, yuk mashinasiga yaqinlashib ketish xavfi bor.
answerATarget: Kuchli yon shamol transport vositamni chapga surishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Quvib o‘tayotganda yuk mashinasining shamol panasi hududiga kirganimda transport vositam o‘ngga tortishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Oldinda ketayotgan transport vositasi o‘ngga surilishi mumkin

questionTextSource: A strong side wind is blowing from the right. When are you particularly exposed to danger when overtaking?
explanationSource: If there is strong crosswind from the right, you are particularly at risk as a car driver if you enter the slipstream of a truck as part of an overtaking maneuver. This danger arises from the fact that strong side wind from the right pushes your vehicle to the left, whereupon you automatically start countersteering. As you overtake a truck, you fall into its slipstream; the crosswind is instantly gone and you have to adjust the steering. As soon as you get out of the slipstream, the pressure starts again with the crosswind; So, you have to countersteer again.
answerASource: When you enter the slipstream of the truck
answerBSource: When you leave the slipstream of the truck
answerCSource: When you change lane after overtaking
questionTextTarget: O‘ng tomondan kuchli yon shamol esmoqda. Quvib o‘tishda qachon ayniqsa xavf ostida bo‘lasiz?
explanationTarget: O‘ng tomondan kuchli yon shamol esganda, yuk mashinasini quvib o‘tayotganda uning shamol panasi hududiga kirish va undan chiqish ayniqsa xavfli. Shamol ta’siri yo‘qolib-qayta paydo bo‘lgani uchun rulni tez moslashtirish kerak.
answerATarget: Yuk mashinasining shamol panasi hududiga kirganda
answerBTarget: Yuk mashinasining shamol panasi hududidan chiqqanda

questionTextSource: Why must you reduce your speed in heavy rain?
explanationSource: Water on the windshield or visor breaks the light and worsens the view, whirling up water also obstructs the view. The braking distance is longer on wet roads because of lower grip. The profile of the tires drains the water. At high speed, the amount of water to be drained is too large, there is a risk of aquaplaning. In this case, there is no contact between the road and the tire. The vehicle cannot be controlled any longer.
answerASource: Because braking distance is increased
answerBSource: Because visibility is reduced
answerCSource: Because aquaplaning (sliding on wet roads) can occur
questionTextTarget: Kuchli yomg‘irda nega tezlikni kamaytirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Old oynadagi yoki vizordagi suv yorug‘likni sindirib, ko‘rinishni yomonlashtiradi. Sachragan suv ham ko‘rinishga xalaqit beradi. Ho‘l yo‘lda ilashish kamroq bo‘lgani uchun tormoz yo‘li uzayadi. Yuqori tezlikda akvaplaning xavfi bor, bunda shina yo‘l bilan aloqani yo‘qotadi va transport vositasi boshqarilmay qoladi.

questionTextSource: What adversely affects road safety here?
explanationSource: The rain and the whirled-up water create a haze that can significantly affect traffic safety. Assume that the grip of the tires is significantly lower due to the wet road surface than on dry roads and that this prolongs your braking distance. The low beam of oncoming traffic does not affect the traffic safety, as the car driver is not dazzled by it.
answerASource: Poor visibility
answerBSource: Reduced grip of the tyres on the wet roadway
answerCSource: The dipped headlights of oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda yo‘l xavfsizligiga nima salbiy ta’sir qiladi?
explanationTarget: Yomg‘ir va ko‘tarilgan suv tumansimon qatlam hosil qilib, harakat xavfsizligini ancha yomonlashtiradi. Ho‘l yo‘l yuzasi sabab shinalarning ilashishi quruq yo‘lga qaraganda ancha past bo‘ladi va tormoz masofasi uzayadi. Qarshidan kelayotgan transportning qisqa faralari bu holatda xavfsizlikka salbiy ta’sir qilmaydi.

questionTextSource: What can be caused if the road surface suddenly becomes worse?
explanationSource: As the road surface deteriorates, it always results in a change and deterioration of traction. As the wheels lose stiction, the vehicle is slipping and skidding faster. The tire noise also depends on the condition of the road surface and changes when, for example, the road turns from a paved road to a cobblestone track.
answerASource: Danger of sliding and skidding
answerBSource: Changes in tyre noise
answerCSource: Longer reaction distance
questionTextTarget: Yo‘l qoplamasi to‘satdan yomonlashsa, nima yuz berishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l yuzasi yomonlashganda ilashish ham o‘zgaradi va yomonlashadi. G‘ildiraklar ilashishni yo‘qotsa, transport vositasi tezroq sirpanadi. Shina shovqini ham yo‘l qoplamasi holatiga bog‘liq va yo‘l asfaltlangan qismdan tosh qoplamaga o‘tganda o‘zgaradi.

questionTextSource: What are the special conditions when driving along tree-lined avenues?
explanationSource: The road is usually very narrow. In addition, it is often heavily curved to drain rainwater. Therefore, special care should be taken with oncoming traffic. Curves are not clear due to the trees. You have to drive particularly careful because of the possible oncoming traffic in curves. Left turns are especially dangerous. The trees don't offer any protection to the driver, not even windbreak.
answerASource: Bends are often very narrow and blind
answerBSource: The narrow and often cambered roadway requires special caution when there is oncoming traffic
answerCSource: The trees provide protection from the sides
questionTextTarget: Daraxtzor xiyobon yo‘llarida haydashning o‘ziga xos sharoitlari qanday?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l odatda juda tor bo‘ladi. Bundan tashqari, yomg‘ir suvi oqishi uchun u ko‘pincha qavariq shaklda bo‘ladi. Qarshidan kelayotgan transportda alohida ehtiyot bo‘lish kerak. Daraxtlar sabab burilishlar yaxshi ko‘rinmaydi. Chap burilishlar ayniqsa xavfli. Daraxtlar haydovchini himoya qilmaydi.
answerATarget: Burilishlar ko‘pincha juda tor va ko‘rinishi cheklangan
answerBTarget: Tor va ko‘pincha qavariq yo‘l qarshidan transport kelganda alohida ehtiyotkorlikni talab qiladi

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: While overtaking a cyclist, the oncoming truck also partly gets on your lane. Brake and drive as far to the right as possible.
answerASource: I brake
answerBSource: I drive over to the right-side as far as possible
answerCSource: I remain in the centre of my lane
questionTextTarget: To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Siz velosipedchini quvib o‘tayotganda qarshidan kelayotgan yuk mashinasi ham qisman sizning yo‘lagizga chiqmoqda. Tormoz bering va imkon qadar o‘ngga yuring.

questionTextSource: Why should you brake now?
explanationSource: Snow is a special danger for you as a car driver. Your lane is covered in snow. In addition, your view is restricted by a heap of snow. The upcoming green car does not respect the right of way. Therefore, you should brake early, because due to the slipperiness of the braking distance is extended. Probably the green car is also hampered by the snow pile.
answerASource: - green car
answerBSource: - blue car
answerCSource: - tractor
questionTextTarget: Nega hozir tormoz berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Qor avtomobil haydovchisi uchun alohida xavf tug‘diradi. Sizning yo‘lagiz qor bilan qoplangan. Bundan tashqari, qor uyumi ko‘rinishni cheklaydi. Yaqinlashayotgan yashil avtomobil ustunlikka rioya qilmayapti. Sirpanchiq sabab tormoz yo‘li uzaygani uchun erta tormoz berishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: Why should you ready yourself to have to stop here?
explanationSource: The street looks very narrow. Expect that you have to stop when the truck approaches you. You should drive as far to the right as possible and prepare for a stop to avoid a collision.
