answerASource: I cease the overtaking manoeuvre and remain behind the truck
answerBSource: I accelerate and quickly continue the overtaking manoeuvre
answerCSource: I maintain my speed and continue the overtaking manoeuvre
questionTextTarget: Siz quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Siz allaqachon signal berib, yuk mashinasini quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Orqa ko‘zguda chap yo‘lakda yuqori tezlikda yaqinlashayotgan qizil avtomobilni ko‘ryapsiz. Quvib o‘tish jarayonini darhol to‘xtatib, yuk mashinasi ortida qolishingiz kerak. Davom etsangiz, qizil avtomobilni keskin tormozlashga majbur qilasiz. U sizning avtomobilingizga urilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Quvib o‘tish manevrini to‘xtatib, yuk mashinasi ortida qolaman
answerBTarget: Tezlashib, quvib o‘tish manevrini tez davom ettiraman
answerCTarget: Tezligimni saqlab, quvib o‘tishni davom ettiraman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: While overtaking a truck, you observe a fast approaching car in the rearview mirror. It is too late to complete the overtaking process. Accelerate and complete the overtaking process quickly but safely. Basically, subsequent vehicles do not have priority; even not on the freeway.
answerASource: I quickly continue the overtaking manoeuvre
answerBSource: I cease the overtaking manoeuvre, and pull back into the right-hand lane
answerCSource: I brake, but continue the overtaking manoeuvre
questionTextTarget: To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Yuk mashinasini quvib o‘tayotganda orqa ko‘zguda tez yaqinlashayotgan avtomobilni ko‘ryapsiz. Quvib o‘tish jarayonini yakunlash uchun juda kech. Tezlashib, quvib o‘tish manevrini tez, lekin xavfsiz yakunlang. Asosan, ortdan kelayotgan transport vositalari ustunlikka ega emas, hatto avtomagistralda ham.
answerATarget: Quvib o‘tish manevrini tez davom ettiraman
answerBTarget: Quvib o‘tish manevrini to‘xtatib, o‘ng yo‘lakka qaytaman
answerCTarget: Tormoz beraman, lekin quvib o‘tishni davom ettiraman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: A driver drives dangerously close to you on the left-hand lane and signals his/her overtaking intent with his flash light. You should still overtake the transporter on the mid-lane and then get back into the lane in front of it to defuse the situation.
answerASource: I overtake the van and then move into the middle lane
answerBSource: I move immediately into the lane to the right
answerCSource: I brake slightly to prompt the vehicle behind to keep its distance
questionTextTarget: To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Chap yo‘lakda bir haydovchi sizga xavfli darajada yaqin kelmoqda va chiroq bilan quvib o‘tish niyatini bildirayotir. Shunga qaramay, siz o‘rta yo‘lakdagi transporterni quvib o‘tib, vaziyatni yumshatish uchun keyin uning oldidagi yo‘lakka qaytishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Furgonni quvib o‘tib, keyin o‘rta yo‘lakka o‘taman
answerCTarget: Orqadagi transport masofa saqlashi uchun yengil tormoz beraman

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: As a vehicle is approaching from the front and want to overtake a car behind you (red), you should slow down and extremely drive far right.
answerASource: I slow down
answerBSource: I drive as far to the right-side as possible
answerCSource: I accelerate
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Old tomondan transport vositasi yaqinlashmoqda va u sizning ortingizdagi qizil avtomobilni quvib o‘tmoqchi. Shuning uchun tezlikni kamaytirib, imkon qadar juda o‘ng tomonda yurishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: Why must you slow down here?
explanationSource: The oncoming car overtakes despite opposing traffic about 250 m in front of you. You have to reduce your speed and drive to the far right. So, you defuse the situation and give the overtaking car more time and space to complete the overtaking process. The tractor moves away from the intersection and poses no danger.
answerASource: Because of the overtaking car
answerBSource: Because the maximum permitted speed is 80 km/h
answerCSource: Because of the tractor
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda tezlikni kamaytirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Qarshidan kelayotgan avtomobil sizdan taxminan 250 m oldinda qarama-qarshi transport bo‘lsa ham quvib o‘tmoqda. Tezlikni kamaytirib, eng o‘ng tomonda yurishingiz kerak. Shunday qilib vaziyatni yumshatasiz va quvib o‘tayotgan avtomobilga quvib o‘tishni yakunlash uchun ko‘proq vaqt va joy berasiz. Traktor kesishmadan uzoqlashmoqda va xavf tug‘dirmaydi.
answerBTarget: Ruxsat etilgan maksimal tezlik 80 km/soat bo‘lgani sabab

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: If a car overtakes you despite oncoming traffic, you should delay and try to drive to the right as far as possible. This gives the other vehicle enough space to safely complete the overtaking process.
answerASource: I slow down
answerBSource: I drive as far to the right-side as possible
answerCSource: I accelerate
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar avtomobil qarama-qarshi transport bo‘lsa ham sizni quvib o‘tayotgan bo‘lsa, tezlikni kamaytirib, iloji boricha o‘ng tomonda yurishga harakat qiling. Bu boshqa transport vositasiga quvib o‘tishni xavfsiz yakunlash uchun yetarli joy beradi.

questionTextSource: Why are you not allowed to overtake in this situation?
explanationSource: You are not allowed to overtake because of the motorbike coming at a fast speed behind you that will overtake you. Also the distance required to overtake is too long in this situation
answerASource: Because the motorbike wants to overtake me
answerBSource: Because my overtaking distance is too long
answerCSource: Because this is a no-overtaking zone
questionTextTarget: Nega bu vaziyatda quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas?
explanationTarget: Ortingizdan yuqori tezlikda kelayotgan mototsikl sizni quvib o‘tmoqchi bo‘lgani sabab quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas. Bundan tashqari, bu vaziyatda quvib o‘tish uchun kerakli masofa juda uzun.
answerBTarget: Chunki quvib o‘tish masofam juda uzun
answerCTarget: Chunki bu quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan hudud

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: Given the truck that is overtaking you has incoming traffic, you should slow down and drive as far to the right as possible to allow him to overtake you
answerASource: I slow down
answerBSource: I drive as far to the right-side as possible
answerCSource: I stop
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Sizni quvib o‘tayotgan yuk mashinasi qarama-qarshi transportga duch kelmoqda. U quvib o‘tishni yakunlay olishi uchun siz tezlikni kamaytirib, imkon qadar o‘ng tomonda yurishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: You want to overtake. What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: You should not overtake the truck, as you cannot see the distance required for this.
answerASource: I refrain from overtaking the truck, because I do not have a clear view over the necessary stretch of road
answerBSource: I follow the motorbike, because the truck is using its indicators to signal an opportunity to overtake
answerCSource: I reduce my distance to the truck, to enable me to overtake more quickly
questionTextTarget: Siz quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Yuk mashinasini quvib o‘tmasligingiz kerak, chunki buning uchun kerakli masofani ko‘ra olmayapsiz.
answerATarget: Kerakli yo‘l qismini aniq ko‘ra olmaganim uchun yuk mashinasini quvib o‘tmayman
answerBTarget: Yuk mashinasi burilish ko‘rsatkichlari bilan quvib o‘tish imkonini bildirayotgani uchun mototsikl ortidan boraman
answerCTarget: Tezroq quvib o‘tish uchun yuk mashinasigacha masofani kamaytiraman

questionTextSource: Why must you abort your overtaking manoeuvre?
explanationSource: You should abort the overtaking maneuver because the tractor wants to turn left and because oncoming traffic may be obstructed.
answerASource: Because the tractor wants to turn left
answerBSource: Because it could obstruct oncoming traffic
answerCSource: Because a no-overtaking zone is visible ahead
questionTextTarget: Nega quvib o‘tish manevrini bekor qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Traktor chapga burilmoqchi bo‘lgani va qarama-qarshi transportga xalaqit berilishi mumkinligi sabab quvib o‘tish manevrini bekor qilishingiz kerak.
answerBTarget: Chunki bu qarama-qarshi transportga xalaqit berishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Chunki oldinda quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan hudud ko‘rinmoqda

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: You should not overtake because the tractor will swerve to the left (see indicator).
answerASource: - do not overtake, because the tractor wants to pull out to the left
answerBSource: - overtake carefully, because the tractor is demanding I do so
answerCSource: - overtake immediately, because the overtaking distance is large enough
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?

questionTextSource: You want to overtake. What is the right course of action here?

answerBTarget: Qarama-qarshi transport paydo bo‘lishi mumkinligi sabab quvib o‘tmayman

questionTextSource: Why are you not allowed to overtake here now?
explanationSource: At this moment, a motorcyclist passes the tractor. Wait until you can safely begin the overtaking manoeuvre.

questionTextSource: Why are you not allowed to overtake here?
explanationSource: Due to the curve and the trees, you cannot see the rest of the road sufficiently. Out of town, you must keep a minimum distance of 2 metres to the side of cyclists. In the event of sudden oncoming traffic, you would not be able to maintain this distance when overtaking. Therefore, you must not overtake here.

explanationTarget: Burilish va daraxtlar sabab oldingi yo‘l qismini yetarlicha ko‘ra olmaysiz. Shahar tashqarisida velosipedchilardan kamida 2 metr yon masofa saqlashingiz kerak. To‘satdan qarama-qarshi transport paydo bo‘lsa, quvib o‘tishda bu masofani saqlay olmaysiz. Shuning uchun bu yerda quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas.

answerCTarget: - markaziy yo‘lak chiziqlarini kesib o‘tishim mumkin emas

questionTextSource: Why are you not allowed to overtake here?
explanationSource: The road is too small to allow enough side distance to cyclists and oncoming traffic at the same time.

answerCSource: Because I may not cross the centre line
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l velosipedchilar va qarama-qarshi transport orasida bir vaqtning o‘zida yetarli yon masofa qoldirish uchun juda tor.

answerBTarget: Chunki qarama-qarshi transportga xavf tug‘dirishim mumkin
answerCTarget: Chunki markaziy chiziqdan o‘tishim mumkin emas

questionTextSource: You want to overtake on a tree-lined avenue. What special aspect should you bear in mind?
explanationSource: The avenue is framed by trees. Therefore, the change of light and shadow often leads to the incorrect estimation of distances. Likewise, it can often lead to trees falling and vehicles with high bodies trying to avoid branches.
answerASource: Side clearances are frequently misjudged in this situation
answerBSource: Vehicles with high superstructures frequently perform evasive manoeuvres to avoid branches in this situation
answerCSource: Accidents involving trees are particularly frequent here
questionTextTarget: Siz daraxtzor xiyobonli yo‘lda quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Qaysi alohida jihatni yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Xiyobon daraxtlar bilan o‘ralgan. Shuning uchun yorug‘lik va soyaning almashishi masofalarni noto‘g‘ri baholashga olib keladi. Shuningdek, daraxtlar qulashi va baland ustki tuzilishga ega transport vositalari shoxlardan qochishga harakat qilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Bunday vaziyatda yon masofalar ko‘pincha noto‘g‘ri baholanadi
answerBTarget: Baland ustki tuzilishga ega transport vositalari ko‘pincha shoxlardan qochish uchun chetlashadi
answerCTarget: Bu yerda daraxtlar bilan bog‘liq avariyalar ayniqsa ko‘p uchraydi

questionTextSource: Why must you discontinue your overtaking manoeuvre here?
explanationSource: The tractor starts to turn left. The tractor drives across the left lane of the road. If you overtake now, you would collide with the tractor.
answerASource: Because the tractor will turn off to the left
answerBSource: Because the motorbike will overtake me
answerCSource: Because I can see a no-overtaking sign
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda quvib o‘tish manevrini to‘xtatishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Traktor chapga burila boshlaydi. Traktor yo‘lning chap yo‘lagi orqali harakatlanadi. Hozir quvib o‘tsangiz, traktor bilan to‘qnashasiz.
answerCTarget: Chunki quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan belgini ko‘ryapman

questionTextSource: You are driving on a road with one lane for each direction. A convoy of motor vehicles is driving up ahead of you. Why should you refrain from overtaking in order to prevent a dangerous situation from occurring?
explanationSource:
A group of pedestrians, cyclists or motor vehicles, which is traveling together in road traffic, is called a closed association. Closed associations must be clearly marked and must not be interrupted.
Because a closed association consists of several vehicles, you cannot really understand the traffic situation. When overtaking a closed bandage, you should avoid premature inserting, which makes the overtaking path significantly longer.
answerASource: Because the overtaking distance is considerably larger than with single vehicles
answerBSource: Because I should not break the convoy by pulling back into my lane early
answerCSource: Because I cannot assess the road traffic situation ahead of the convoy
questionTextTarget: Siz har bir yo‘nalishda bittadan yo‘lakli yo‘lda ketyapsiz. Oldingizda motorli transport vositalari kolonnasi ketmoqda. Xavfli vaziyatning oldini olish uchun nega quvib o‘tishdan voz kechishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l harakatida birgalikda harakatlanayotgan piyodalar, velosipedchilar yoki motorli transport vositalari guruhi yopiq kolonna deyiladi. Yopiq kolonnalar aniq belgilangan bo‘lishi va bo‘linmasligi kerak. Kolonna bir nechta transport vositasidan iborat bo‘lgani uchun oldindagi harakat vaziyatini to‘liq baholay olmaysiz. Yopiq kolonnani quvib o‘tayotganda erta qayta kirishdan saqlanish kerak, bu quvib o‘tish yo‘lini ancha uzaytiradi.
answerATarget: Chunki quvib o‘tish masofasi yakka transport vositalariga qaraganda ancha uzun
answerBTarget: Chunki yo‘lagimga erta qaytib, kolonnani bo‘lmasligim kerak
answerCTarget: Chunki kolonna oldidagi yo‘l harakati vaziyatini baholay olmayman

questionTextSource: Why is it dangerous to overtake in this situation?
explanationSource:
You are driving in a convoy of several cars behind a lorry on a winding road with oncoming traffic. Ideally, the car behind the lorry overtakes first before the vehicles behind move up and start to overtake. 
On the left-hand bend, you cannot see the overtaking lane sufficiently. You will probably have to cancel the overtaking manoeuvre and pull in between two vehicles. There is a possibility that the distance between the vehicles in front is too small and that you will endanger yourself and other road users by pulling in.
answerASource: Because vehicles ahead may swerve out
answerBSource: Because I cannot see far enough along the route necessary for overtaking
answerCSource: Because there is not sufficient space to pull back in between the vehicles ahead
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda quvib o‘tish nega xavfli?
explanationTarget: Siz qarama-qarshi transport bo‘lgan egri yo‘lda yuk mashinasi ortidan bir nechta avtomobillar kolonnasida ketyapsiz. Ideal holatda avval yuk mashinasi ortidagi avtomobil quvib o‘tadi, keyin orqadagi transport vositalari yaqinlashib, quvib o‘tishni boshlaydi. Chap burilishda quvib o‘tish yo‘lagini yetarlicha ko‘ra olmaysiz. Ehtimol quvib o‘tishni bekor qilib, ikkita transport vositasi orasiga kirishingizga to‘g‘ri keladi. Oldindagi transportlar orasidagi masofa juda kichik bo‘lishi va qayta kirishda o‘zingizga ham, boshqalarga ham xavf tug‘dirishingiz mumkin.
answerATarget: Chunki oldindagi transport vositalari chetga chiqishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Chunki quvib o‘tish uchun zarur yo‘l qismini yetarlicha ko‘ra olmayman
answerCTarget: Chunki oldindagi transport vositalari orasiga qayta kirish uchun yetarli joy yo‘q

questionTextSource: Why are you not permitted to overtake in this situation?
explanationSource:
You are not allowed to overtake in this situation because the tractor is travelling too fast for you to overtake it at your maximum speed of 50 km/h.
The motorbike is also approaching at high speed. It will probably overtake you as there is a long straight ahead and no oncoming traffic in sight.
answerASource: Because the motorbike might overtake me
answerBSource: Because I do not have enough speed
answerCSource: Because overtaking is prohibited here
questionTextTarget: Nega bu vaziyatda quvib o‘tishga ruxsat yo‘q?
explanationTarget: Bu vaziyatda quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas, chunki traktor sizning maksimal 50 km/soat tezligingizda uni quvib o‘tish uchun juda tez harakatlanmoqda. Mototsikl ham yuqori tezlikda yaqinlashmoqda. Oldinda uzun to‘g‘ri yo‘l bor va qarama-qarshi transport ko‘rinmayotgani uchun u ehtimol sizni quvib o‘tadi.
answerATarget: Chunki mototsikl meni quvib o‘tishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Chunki bu yerda quvib o‘tish taqiqlangan

questionTextSource: The vehicles ahead of you are driving at about 30 km/h. Why are you not permitted to overtake before the road bend?
explanationSource: You are not allowed to overtake before the bend as your overtaking distance is too long to overtake both vehicles before the bend. There is also not enough distance between the two cars for you to pull in. In addition, the red car has the right of way to overtake in front of you; if you both start the overtaking manoeuvre, there is a danger for you and oncoming traffic. As the bend is not visible, you cannot know whether oncoming traffic is coming.
answerASource: Because my overtaking distance is too long
answerBSource: Because the [red] car might pull out to overtake
answerCSource: Because I am not permitted to cross the lane marking
questionTextTarget: Oldingizdagi transport vositalari taxminan 30 km/soat tezlikda ketyapti. Nega burilishdan oldin quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas?
explanationTarget: Burilishdan oldin quvib o‘tishingiz mumkin emas, chunki ikkala transport vositasini ham burilishgacha quvib o‘tish uchun quvib o‘tish masofangiz juda uzun. Ikki avtomobil orasida qayta kirish uchun yetarli masofa ham yo‘q. Bundan tashqari, qizil avtomobil sizdan oldin quvib o‘tish ustunligiga ega; agar ikkalangiz ham quvib o‘tishni boshlasangiz, siz va qarama-qarshi transport uchun xavf tug‘iladi. Burilish ko‘rinmagani uchun qarama-qarshi transport kelayotgan-kelmayotganini bila olmaysiz.
answerATarget: Chunki quvib o‘tish masofam juda uzun
answerBTarget: Chunki [qizil] avtomobil quvib o‘tish uchun chiqishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Chunki yo‘lak chizig‘ini kesib o‘tishga ruxsat yo‘q

questionTextSource: Why do you have to switch to the right-hand lane?
explanationSource:
The traffic sign indicates a narrowing (end of a lane) in 200 metres. 
The lane is led into oncoming traffic through the narrowing, so you must be extra vigilant not to end up in oncoming traffic.

answerCTarget: [Velosipedchilar] bir-birining ortidan yurishi uchun signal chalaman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: In such a situation, you must slow down to walking speed and keep to the right as much as possible. You should not drive past the pedestrians because the danger is too high.

questionTextSource: Why should you not overtake the moped rider in this situation?
explanationSource:
In the roadworks area, the speed limit is 30 km/h and the road is narrowed. 
You are therefore not allowed to drive as fast as would be necessary to overtake the moped rider safely. 
Due to the narrowness of the road, you cannot keep the required distance to the side and the poor condition of the road could cause the moped rider to fall if you overtake him.

answerBSource: Because I am not allowed to drive significantly faster than the moped rider
answerCSource: Because I am unable to maintain the requisite amount of side clearance

Shuning uchun moped haydovchisini xavfsiz quvib o‘tish uchun zarur bo‘lgan tezlikda yurishingiz mumkin emas. Yo‘lning torligi sabab zarur yon masofani saqlay olmaysiz, yo‘lning yomon holati esa quvib o‘tsangiz moped haydovchisining yiqilishiga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Chunki bu moped haydovchisining yiqilishiga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Chunki men moped haydovchisidan ancha tez yura olmayman
answerCTarget: Chunki zarur yon masofani saqlay olmayman

questionTextSource: What must you reckon with on this autobahn car park?
explanationSource: The surface of this freeway parking lot consists of cobblestones that are not only uneven but also wet. Be prepared for the fact that the braking distance of your vehicle is extended by the lower traction. You do not have to expect oncoming vehicles. Careless pedestrians, however, can unexpectedly step onto the road at any time.
answerASource: People suddenly stepping onto the roadway
answerBSource: Danger of skidding when you brake
answerCSource: Oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Bu avtomagistral parkovkasida nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu avtomagistral parkovkasining yuzasi notekis va ho‘l tosh qoplamadan iborat. Ilashish pastligi sabab avtomobilingizning tormoz yo‘li uzayishini kuting. Qarama-qarshi transportni kutishingiz shart emas. Ammo ehtiyotsiz piyodalar istalgan paytda kutilmaganda yo‘lga chiqishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What do you do if you want to drive straight on?
explanationSource: You behave correctly if you reduce the speed of your vehicle and allow the preceding vehicle to change lane. The left lane may only be used for the purpose of turning left. Since you want to drive straight in the example, you must not use the left lane.
answerASource: Brake so that the driver in front can change lanes
answerBSource: 'Overtake the other vehicle in the left-hand lane since the traffic light is "green"'
answerCSource: Sound your horn to indicate to the driver in front that he may not change lanes so close to the crossroads
questionTextTarget: To‘g‘ri yurmoqchi bo‘lsangiz, nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Transport vositangiz tezligini kamaytirib, oldindagi transport vositasiga yo‘lakni almashtirish imkonini bersangiz, to‘g‘ri harakat qilgan bo‘lasiz. Chap yo‘lak faqat chapga burilish uchun ishlatilishi mumkin. Misolda siz to‘g‘ri yurmoqchi bo‘lganingiz uchun chap yo‘lakdan foydalanmasligingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Oldindagi haydovchi yo‘lakni almashtira olishi uchun tormoz beraman

answerCTarget: Oldindagi haydovchiga chorrahaga yaqin joyda yo‘lak almashtira olmasligini bildirish uchun signal chalaman

questionTextSource: You are approaching the vehicles in this picture. What do you do?
explanationSource: Outside of built-up areas, slow vehicles such as tractors, trucks and mopeds often ride on the hard shoulder and can thus be overtaken more easily. If such a vehicle wants to turn left, or if it has to return to the main road for other reasons, you have to allow the driver to change his/her lane.
answerASource: Watch if the truck and trailer remain on the hard shoulder
answerBSource: Allow the truck and trailer to enter the roadway when it indicates left
answerCSource: When the truck and trailer are indicating left, flash your headlights and proceed at a brisk pace
questionTextTarget: Rasmdagi transport vositalariga yaqinlashyapsiz. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida traktorlar, yuk mashinalari va mopedlar kabi sekin transport vositalari ko‘pincha yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida yuradi va shu orqali ularni osonroq quvib o‘tish mumkin. Agar bunday transport vositasi chapga burilmoqchi bo‘lsa yoki boshqa sabab bilan asosiy yo‘lga qaytishi kerak bo‘lsa, haydovchiga yo‘lakni almashtirishga imkon berishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Yuk mashinasi va tirkama yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida qoladimi-yo‘qmi kuzataman
answerBTarget: Yuk mashinasi va tirkama chapga signal berganda qatnov qismiga kirishiga imkon beraman
answerCTarget: Yuk mashinasi va tirkama chapga signal berganda chiroqlarimni chaqnatib, tez yurib o‘taman

questionTextSource: What should you anticipate in this situation?
explanationSource: The sign at the beginning of the video indicates "Beware of rolling gravel", so you must be aware that there is rolling gravel on the road and the yellow vehicle could miss you because the tractor in front of you obscures the view for the yellow car and for you.
answerASource: That the driver of the [yellow car] fails to see me
answerBSource: That there are loose chippings on the carriageway
answerCSource: That the vehicle ahead will turn right
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Video boshidagi belgi “sochilma shag‘aldan ehtiyot bo‘ling” degan ma’noni bildiradi. Shuning uchun yo‘lda sochilma shag‘al borligini va oldingizdagi traktor sariq avtomobil hamda siz uchun ko‘rinishni to‘sayotgani sabab sariq transport vositasi sizni payqamay qolishi mumkinligini hisobga olishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: [The white car] wants to turn left. What is the right course of action if [the car] fails to stop?
explanationSource: The white car wants to turn left and since you do not know whether it will stop (you have the right of way), it is better to give up your right of way and reduce your speed.

answerBSource: I waive my right of way
answerCSource: I sound my horn and continue driving as before
questionTextTarget: [Oq avtomobil] chapga burilmoqchi. Agar [avtomobil] to‘xtamasa, to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Oq avtomobil chapga burilmoqchi. U to‘xtaydimi-yo‘qmi aniq bilmaganingiz uchun, siz ustunlikka ega bo‘lsangiz ham, ustunlik huquqingizdan voz kechib, tezlikni kamaytirganingiz ma’qul.

questionTextSource: Why must you brake now?
explanationSource: You should brake because of the green vehicle, as it appears to be driving onto the road behind the tractor.
answerASource: - [green vehicle]
answerBSource: - motorbike
answerCSource: - [yellow car]
questionTextTarget: Nega hozir tormoz berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yashil transport vositasi sabab tormoz berishingiz kerak, chunki u traktor ortidan yo‘lga chiqayotgandek ko‘rinadi.

questionTextSource: What must you anticipate in this parking area?
explanationSource: Vehicles can leave the parking space, watch out for vehicles leaving the parking space. People can walk on the roadway because you are taking a break. Truck drivers often park in car parking spaces.
answerASource: Trucks that are incorrectly parked
answerBSource: Vehicles emerging from parking spaces
answerCSource: People on the roadway
questionTextTarget: Bu parkovka hududida nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Transport vositalari parkovka joylaridan chiqishi mumkin, shuning uchun chiqayotgan transport vositalariga e’tibor bering. questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: The car will probably overtake the cyclist. To be on the safe side, slow down and ride as far to the right as possible.
answerASource: I drive as far to the right as possible
answerBSource: I brake
answerCSource: I change direction to the left
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Avtomobil ehtimol velosipedchini quvib o‘tadi. Xavfsizlik uchun tezlikni kamaytiring va imkon qadar o‘ng tomonda yuring.

questionTextSource: Why should you be ready to brake in this situation?
explanationSource: The tractor driver could drive into your lane at any moment, so be ready to brake to defuse the situation in time.
answerASource: Because of the tractor
answerBSource: Because of the motorbike
answerCSource: Because of the speed limit
questionTextTarget: Nega bu vaziyatda tormozga tayyor turishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Traktor haydovchisi istalgan vaqtda sizning yo‘lagizga chiqishi mumkin. Vaziyatni vaqtida yumshatish uchun tormozga tayyor turing.

questionTextSource: What must be observed when several motorcycles are travelling together in a group?
explanationSource: Drive in a staggered manner to avoid rear-end collisions caused by sudden braking. Group rides are not easy; if one driver makes a mistake, all the others have to react.
answerASource: They should drive in a staggered formation when travelling on straight sections of road
answerBSource: The driving style of the group should be based on that of the least experienced motorcyclist
answerCSource: The group must remain together in every road traffic situation
questionTextTarget: Bir nechta mototsikl bir guruh bo‘lib harakatlanayotganda nimaga rioya qilish kerak?
explanationTarget: To‘satdan tormozlashdan kelib chiqadigan orqadan urilishlarning oldini olish uchun siljigan, ya’ni staggered shaklda yurish kerak. Guruh bo‘lib yurish oson emas; bir haydovchi xato qilsa, boshqalarning hammasi bunga javob qaytarishi kerak.
answerATarget: To‘g‘ri yo‘l qismlarida siljigan shaklda harakatlanishlari kerak
answerBTarget: Guruhning haydash uslubi eng tajribasiz mototsiklchiga qarab moslashtirilishi kerak
answerCTarget: Guruh har qanday yo‘l harakati vaziyatida birga qolishi shart

questionTextSource: What should you anticipate in this situation?
explanationSource: Because of the turning truck, the van could miss you. Be ready to brake.
answerASource: The driver of the [red] vehicle fails to see me
answerBSource: The [green] truck performs a turn
answerCSource: The tractor moves onto the road
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Burilayotgan yuk mashinasi sabab furgon sizni ko‘rmay qolishi mumkin. Tormozga tayyor turing.
answerATarget: [Qizil] transport vositasi haydovchisi meni ko‘rmay qolishiga

questionTextSource: Why should you further reduce your speed here?
explanationSource: It's unlikely that the car in the left lane will continue as it appears to have broken down. Even if it did, it wouldn't affect you. However, since there is a person in the lane, extra caution is required here. It's also possible that other people get out of the vehicle and run onto the road. The stationary car may be hidden by the bush or no warning triangle was set up. The following car could therefore recognize too late that the vehicle has stopped in front of it. You should therefore drive with foresight and expect the car behind to swerve into your lane.
answerASource: Because the [red] car could cross onto my lane
answerBSource: Because other people may walk onto the road
answerCSource: Because [the blue car] could continue moving
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda tezligingizni yanada kamaytirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Chap yo‘lakdagi avtomobil buzilib qolgandek ko‘ringani uchun uning davom etishi ehtimoldan yiroq. Davom etsa ham, sizga ta’sir qilmaydi. Ammo yo‘lakda odam borligi sabab bu yerda alohida ehtiyotkorlik talab qilinadi. Boshqa odamlar ham transport vositasidan tushib, yo‘lga yugurib chiqishi mumkin. To‘xtab turgan avtomobil buta bilan yashiringan yoki ogohlantirish uchburchagi qo‘yilmagan bo‘lishi mumkin. Shuning uchun ortdan kelayotgan avtomobil oldida transport vositasi to‘xtaganini juda kech sezishi mumkin. Shu sabab oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydab, ortdagi avtomobil sizning yo‘lagizga chiqishini kutishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: [Qizil] avtomobil mening yo‘lagimga chiqishi mumkinligi sabab
answerBTarget: Boshqa odamlar yo‘lga chiqishi mumkinligi sabab
answerCTarget: [Ko‘k avtomobil] harakatni davom ettirishi mumkinligi sabab

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: The stalled vehicle is blocking the other vehicle's lane and restricting your view. You should reduce your speed and drive as far to the right as possible in your driving.
answerASource: I reduce my speed
answerBSource: I drive as far to the right as possible on my lane
answerCSource: I drive as far to the left as possible on my lane
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Buzilib qolgan transport vositasi boshqa transport vositasining yo‘lagini to‘sib, ko‘rinishingizni cheklamoqda. Tezlikni kamaytirib, harakat vaqtida imkon qadar o‘ng tomonda yurishingiz kerak.
answerBTarget: O‘z yo‘lagimda imkon qadar o‘ng tomonda yuraman
answerCTarget: O‘z yo‘lagimda imkon qadar chap tomonda yuraman

questionTextSource: Why should you continue to slow down here?
explanationSource: On the left lane a car has broken down. There's a person standing in front of the vehicle. Other passengers could leave the car and enter the lane. The approaching vehicle in the opposite lane could dodge onto your lane to overtake the broken-down vehicle and drive past the obstacle. If you delay, the danger of the situation would be reduced
answerASource: Because the red vehicle could cross onto my lane
answerBSource: Because other people may walk onto the road
answerCSource: Because otherwise my vehicle could leave the road
questionTextTarget: Nega bu yerda sekinlashishda davom etishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Chap yo‘lakda avtomobil buzilib qolgan. Transport vositasi oldida bir kishi turibdi. Boshqa yo‘lovchilar ham avtomobildan tushib, yo‘lakka chiqishi mumkin. Qarama-qarshi yo‘lakdagi yaqinlashayotgan transport buzilgan avtomobilni quvib o‘tish va to‘siq yonidan o‘tish uchun sizning yo‘lagizga chiqishi mumkin. Tezlikni kamaytirsangiz, vaziyat xavfi kamayadi.
answerATarget: Qizil transport vositasi mening yo‘lagimga chiqishi mumkinligi sabab
answerBTarget: Boshqa odamlar yo‘lga chiqishi mumkinligi sabab
answerCTarget: Aks holda transport vositam yo‘ldan chiqib ketishi mumkinligi sabab

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: The cyclist cannot continue his journey due to the transporter on the bike path. He will dodge onto the road and get into your lane. You cannot switch to the left lane because there is a vehicle to the left behind you. Slow down to defuse this dangerous situation.
answerASource: I continue braking
answerBSource: I move into the left-hand lane
answerCSource: I continue driving as before
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Veloyo‘lakdagi transporter sabab velosipedchi harakatini davom ettira olmaydi. U yo‘lga chiqib, sizning yo‘lagizga kiradi. Chap yo‘lakka o‘ta olmaysiz, chunki chap orqangizda transport vositasi bor. Bu xavfli vaziyatni yumshatish uchun sekinlashing.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: The motorcyclist is approaching you at high speed. He could overtake you even though the blue truck is already very close. Drive as far to the right as possible to increase the distance to the oncoming lane and reduce your speed so that the motorcyclist can complete the overtaking manoeuvre safely and in good time.
answerASource: I reduce my speed
answerBSource: I drive as far to the right-side as possible
answerCSource: I indicate right
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Mototsiklchi sizga yuqori tezlikda yaqinlashmoqda. Ko‘k yuk mashinasi allaqachon juda yaqin bo‘lsa ham, u sizni quvib o‘tishi mumkin. Qarama-qarshi yo‘lakka masofani oshirish uchun imkon qadar o‘ng tomonda yuring va mototsiklchi quvib o‘tishni xavfsiz hamda o‘z vaqtida yakunlay olishi uchun tezlikni kamaytiring.

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: The yellow car comes towards you as a wrong-way driver on the highway. Drive to the right as far as possible and brake. To warn other road users, turn on the hazard warning lights.
answerASource: I continue driving as far to the right as possible
answerBSource: I brake
answerCSource: I move into the left-hand lane
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Sariq avtomobil avtomagistralda noto‘g‘ri yo‘nalishda sizga qarab kelmoqda. Imkon qadar o‘ng tomonda yuring va tormoz bering. Boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarini ogohlantirish uchun avariya chiroqlarini yoqing.
answerATarget: Imkon qadar o‘ng tomonda harakatni davom ettiraman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: Given that you have traffic on the left line behind you, you should slow down and stop behind the taxi and wait for the traffic on the left to clear before overtaking the taxi
answerASource: I stop behind the taxi
answerBSource: I move into the left-hand lane
answerCSource: I sound my horn repeatedly
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Chap yo‘lakda ortingizdan transport kelayotganligi sabab tezlikni kamaytirib, taksi ortida to‘xtashingiz va taksini quvib o‘tishdan oldin chapdagi transport bo‘shashini kutishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What is the correct course of action in this situation?
explanationSource:
Animals on the road are unpredictable. You should continue to reduce your speed and monitor the situation carefully, and be ready to brake in case the animals run across the road.
Hazard braking could lead to a rear-end collision if the vehicle behind you cannot react quickly enough.
answerASource: - reduce my speed further
answerBSource: - be ready to brake
answerCSource: - perform an emergency braking manoeuvre
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Yo‘ldagi hayvonlar oldindan aytib bo‘lmaydi. Tezlikni kamaytirishda davom eting, vaziyatni diqqat bilan kuzating va hayvonlar yo‘lni kesib o‘tib qolsa tormozga tayyor turing. Favqulodda tormozlash ortingizdagi transport vaqtida javob bera olmasa, orqadan urilishiga olib kelishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: Why should you reduce your speed now?
explanationSource: Even if you keep to the speed limit of 60 km/h, an animal will run onto the road right in front of you. To avoid an accident, you have to reduce your speed. The oncoming car does not affect your driving style.
answerASource: Because of the animal
answerBSource: Because of the [red car]
answerCSource: Because of the speed limit
questionTextTarget: Nega hozir tezligingizni kamaytirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: 60 km/soat tezlik chekloviga rioya qilsangiz ham, hayvon to‘g‘ridan-to‘g‘ri oldingizda yo‘lga yugurib chiqadi. Avariyaning oldini olish uchun tezlikni kamaytirishingiz kerak. Qarshidan kelayotgan avtomobil haydash uslubingizga ta’sir qilmaydi.

questionTextSource: What do you have to be aware of in this situation?
explanationSource:
The driver of the yellow car wants to turn left. He may overlook you behind the tractor. Expect this and be ready to brake.
You should also take care not to drive on the chippings, as chippings increase the risk of skidding on the carriageway.
answerASource: The driver of the [yellow car] may fail to see me
answerBSource: The loose chippings on the carriageway mean there is an increased risk of crashing
answerCSource: I have to allow right of way to the [red car]
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Sariq avtomobil haydovchisi chapga burilmoqchi. U sizni traktor ortida ko‘rmay qolishi mumkin. Buni kuting va tormozga tayyor turing. Shuningdek, shag‘al ustida yurmaslikka ehtiyot bo‘ling, chunki shag‘al qatnov qismida sirpanish xavfini oshiradi.
answerATarget: [Sariq avtomobil] haydovchisi meni ko‘rmay qolishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Qatnov qismidagi bo‘sh shag‘al avariya xavfini oshiradi

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: As the blue car will probably be travelling on the road without observing the right of way rules, you must slow down sharply and give up your right of way.
answerASource: I brake sharply
answerBSource: I yield my right of way
answerCSource: I continue driving as before
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Ko‘k avtomobil ehtimol ustunlik qoidalariga rioya qilmasdan yo‘lga chiqadi. Shuning uchun keskin sekinlashib, ustunlik huquqingizdan voz kechishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: The tractor is signalling by flashing its lights that it wants to move back into the lane. You should therefore reduce your speed and allow the tractor to merge into the lane.
answerASource: I reduce my speed further
answerBSource: I allow the tractor to pull into the lane
answerCSource: I move into the left-hand lane
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Traktor chiroq bilan yo‘lakka qaytmoqchi ekanini bildirmoqda. Shuning uchun tezlikni kamaytirib, traktorning yo‘lakka qo‘shilishiga imkon berishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: What is the right thing to do in this situation?
explanationSource: On the narrow country road, it is possible that you and the tractor will not be able to pass each other easily. Be prepared to stop and let the tractor pass.
answerASource: I must stop if necessary
answerBSource: I have to steer to the right onto the field as a precaution
answerCSource: I have priority over the tractor
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat nima?
explanationTarget: Tor qishloq yo‘lida siz va traktor bir-biringizdan oson o‘ta olmasligingiz mumkin. To‘xtashga va traktorga o‘tib ketishga imkon berishga tayyor bo‘ling.
answerBTarget: Ehtiyot chorasi sifatida o‘ngga, dala tomonga burilishim kerak

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource:
The yellow car has an unusual driving style. It may be distracted or drunk.
The abrupt braking and steering manoeuvres of the car in front are dangerous. Pay attention to how he continues to drive, increase the distance and be ready to brake.
answerASource: I increase my distance to the [car] ahead
answerBSource: I continue driving with increased care
answerCSource: I overtake [the car ahead] leaving a large side clearance
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Sariq avtomobil noodatiy tarzda boshqarilmoqda. Haydovchi chalg‘igan yoki mast bo‘lishi mumkin. Oldindagi avtomobilning keskin tormozlashi va rul manevrlari xavfli. U qanday haydashda davom etishini kuzating, masofani oshiring va tormozga tayyor turing.
answerBTarget: Yuqori ehtiyotkorlik bilan haydashda davom etaman
answerCTarget: [Oldindagi avtomobil]ni katta yon masofa qoldirib quvib o‘taman

questionTextSource: What must you be aware of when driving along narrow avenues?
explanationSource:
Visibility in avenues is more restricted than in open fields and therefore requires an adapted driving style.
On bends, your view of the carriageway may be restricted after the bend. You may therefore only see obstacles very late.
answerASource: - it is frequently difficult for me to see into the road bends
answerBSource: - I have to drive particularly defensively
answerCSource: - I am protected against black ice
questionTextTarget: Tor daraxtzor yo‘llarda harakatlanganda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Daraxtzor yo‘llarda ko‘rinish ochiq dalalarga qaraganda ko‘proq cheklangan bo‘ladi va shuning uchun moslashtirilgan haydash uslubini talab qiladi. Burilishlarda burilishdan keyingi qatnov qismi ko‘rinmasligi mumkin. Shu sabab to‘siqlarni juda kech ko‘rishingiz mumkin.
answerATarget: - yo‘l burilishlariga qarash ko‘pincha qiyin bo‘ladi
answerBTarget: - ayniqsa ehtiyotkor va himoyaviy haydashim kerak

questionTextSource: What is the right behaviour now?
explanationSource:
There is no other option for you in this situation other than to pull over behind the taxi. Because you are not allowed to pass to the right of the taxi as this is a sidewalk. Driving on a sidewalk is generally prohibited.
You also can't change to the left lane because there is a motorcycle next to you. If you change lane you risk a collision.
answerASource: I stop behind the taxi
answerBSource: I moving into the left-hand lane
answerCSource: I carefully drive past the taxi on the right
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri xatti-harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Bu vaziyatda siz uchun taksi ortida chetga to‘xtashdan boshqa imkoniyat yo‘q. Taksining o‘ng tomonidan o‘tishga ruxsat yo‘q, chunki bu piyodalar yo‘lagi. Piyodalar yo‘lagida haydash odatda taqiqlangan. Chap yo‘lakka ham o‘ta olmaysiz, chunki yoningizda mototsikl bor. Yo‘lakni almashtirsangiz, to‘qnashuv xavfi tug‘iladi.
answerCTarget: Taksining o‘ng tomonidan ehtiyotkorlik bilan o‘taman

questionTextSource: You are taking part in a group tour with several motorbikes. What is the right behaviour?
explanationSource:
Your position in the group should be decided before the group ride and should not change during the ride to avoid constant position changes. You should always pay attention to the necessary safety distance from the motorcycle in front of you.
This prevents potentially dangerous situations with other motorcycles or oncoming traffic and allows you to react in a timely manner to dangers or sudden changes in speed.
answerASource: I keep my position in the group
answerBSource: I make sure I keep a safe distance from the motorbike in front
answerCSource: I always ride as fast as the motorbike in front
questionTextTarget: Siz bir nechta mototsikl bilan guruh safarida qatnashyapsiz. To‘g‘ri xatti-harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Guruhdagi o‘rningiz safar boshlanishidan oldin belgilanib, safar davomida o‘zgarmasligi kerak. Bu doimiy o‘rin almashishlarning oldini oladi. Oldingizdagi mototsiklgacha zarur xavfsiz masofaga doimo e’tibor bering. Bu boshqa mototsikllar yoki qarama-qarshi transport bilan xavfli vaziyatlarni oldini oladi va xavflarga yoki tezlikning to‘satdan o‘zgarishiga vaqtida javob berishga imkon beradi.
answerBTarget: Oldimdagi mototsiklgacha xavfsiz masofa saqlashimga ishonch hosil qilaman
answerCTarget: Har doim oldimdagi mototsikl kabi tez yuraman

questionTextSource: What could cause a fast travelling motor vehicle suddenly to veer sideways on a dry straight road?
explanationSource: A vehicle on a straight, dry road can swing off sideways in the event of a strong crosswind or a burst tire. In this case, immediately lay off the gas pedal, countersteer and brake gently.
answerASource: It is suddenly hit by a gust of strong side wind
answerBSource: A burst tyre
answerCSource: Sudden headwind
questionTextTarget: Quruq va to‘g‘ri yo‘lda tez harakatlanayotgan motorli transport vositasi to‘satdan yon tomonga og‘ishiga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: To‘g‘ri va quruq yo‘lda transport vositasi kuchli yon shamol yoki shina yorilishi tufayli yon tomonga chiqib ketishi mumkin. Bunday holatda darhol gaz pedalini qo‘yib yuboring, qarshi rul bering va ehtiyotkorlik bilan tormozlang.

questionTextSource: What makes driving in a stream of vehicles easier?
explanationSource: Slightly offset driving allows you to observe the vehicles in front. This allows you to see the traffic situation in front of you or through the windows of the driver in front and react faster to sudden events. Driving with hazard lights in a convoy is generally prohibited.
answerASource: Watching the queue through the windows of the vehicles travelling in front
answerBSource: Driving in a slightly staggered position in your own lane
answerCSource: Keeping your hazard warning lights switched on when driving
questionTextTarget: Transport oqimida haydashni nima osonlashtiradi?
explanationTarget: Biroz siljigan holatda haydash oldindagi transport vositalarini kuzatishga imkon beradi. Shu tariqa oldingizdagi harakat vaziyatini yoki oldindagi haydovchining oynalari orqali ko‘rib, to‘satdan yuz beradigan hodisalarga tezroq javob bera olasiz. Kolonnada avariya chiroqlari bilan yurish odatda taqiqlangan.
answerATarget: Oldindagi transport vositalari oynalari orqali navbatni kuzatish
answerBTarget: O‘z yo‘lagida biroz siljigan holatda yurish
answerCTarget: Harakat vaqtida avariya chiroqlarini yoqib yurish

questionTextSource: What must you do after an accident with a game animal (for example a deer)?
explanationSource: After a wildlife accident, you must stop, turn on your hazard lights and secure the scene of the accident. You also have to inform the police or the nearest forestry office about the accident. Under no circumstances should you touch the game with your bare hands due to the danger of rabies!
answerASource: Stop, switch on hazard warning lights and make the scene of the accident safe
answerBSource: Inform the police or the nearest forestry office
answerCSource: Proceed without stopping
questionTextTarget: Yovvoyi hayvon, masalan kiyik bilan avariyadan keyin nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yovvoyi hayvon bilan avariyadan keyin to‘xtashingiz, avariya chiroqlarini yoqishingiz va avariya joyini xavfsizlantirishingiz kerak. Shuningdek, avariya haqida politsiyaga yoki eng yaqin o‘rmon xo‘jaligi idorasiga xabar berishingiz kerak. Quturish xavfi sabab yovvoyi hayvonga hech qanday holatda yalang qo‘l bilan tegmang!
answerATarget: To‘xtash, avariya chiroqlarini yoqish va avariya joyini xavfsizlantirish
answerBTarget: Politsiya yoki eng yaqin o‘rmon xo‘jaligi idorasiga xabar berish

questionTextSource: One of your tyres bursts while you are travelling at high speed on an autobahn. What do you do?
explanationSource: Avoid emergency braking on the freeway and instead steer and brake gently to stabilize your vehicle. If possible, bring your vehicle to a stop on the hard shoulder. Turn on your hazard lights and set up your warning triangle to warn subsequent vehicles.
answerASource: Throttle down, if necessary, steer against and brake cautiously
answerBSource: Stop, if possible, on the hard shoulder, switch on hazard warning lights and place the warning triangle
answerCSource: Immediately apply the brakes fully and move over onto the hard shoulder
questionTextTarget: Avtomagistralda yuqori tezlikda ketayotganingizda shinalardan biri yorildi. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Avtomagistralda favqulodda tormozlashdan saqlaning. Buning o‘rniga transport vositasini barqarorlashtirish uchun ehtiyotkorlik bilan rulni boshqaring va tormozlang. Imkon bo‘lsa, transport vositasini yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida to‘xtating. Avariya chiroqlarini yoqing va ortdan kelayotganlarni ogohlantirish uchun ogohlantirish uchburchagini qo‘ying.
answerATarget: Gazni kamaytiraman, zarur bo‘lsa qarshi rul beraman va ehtiyotkorlik bilan tormozlayman
answerBTarget: Imkon bo‘lsa yo‘l cheti yo‘lagida to‘xtab, avariya chiroqlarini yoqaman va ogohlantirish uchburchagini qo‘yaman
answerCTarget: Darhol to‘liq tormoz berib, yo‘l cheti yo‘lagiga o‘taman

questionTextSource: You increase your speed from 50 km/h to 100 km/h. How is the braking distance changed according to the rule of thumb?
explanationSource: According to the rule of thumb, the braking distance quadruples when the speed doubles. At 40 km/h, for example, it is 16 meters and at 80 km/h 64 meters.
answerASource: It is quadrupled from 25 m to 100 m
answerBSource: It is doubled from 15 m to 30 m
answerCSource: It is halved from 50 m to 25 m
questionTextTarget: Siz tezlikni 50 km/soatdan 100 km/soatga oshirdingiz. Oddiy qoida bo‘yicha tormoz yo‘li qanday o‘zgaradi?
explanationTarget: Oddiy qoida bo‘yicha tezlik ikki baravar oshsa, tormoz yo‘li to‘rt baravar ortadi. Masalan, 40 km/soatda 16 metr, 80 km/soatda esa 64 metr bo‘ladi.
answerATarget: 25 m dan 100 m gacha to‘rt baravar ortadi
answerBTarget: 15 m dan 30 m gacha ikki baravar ortadi
answerCTarget: 50 m dan 25 m gacha ikki baravar kamayadi

questionTextSource: When leaving a built-up area, both you and the vehicle approximately 15 m ahead of you increase speed from 50 km/h to 100 km/h. How should you change the safety distance between you and the vehicle ahead?
explanationSource: Keep a safe distance from the vehicle in front of you outside of closed areas that is at least half the speed in meters. At 100 km/h, the safety distance should therefore be at least 50 meters.
answerASource: - increase to at least 50 m
answerBSource: - remain the same
answerCSource: - increase to at least 25 m
questionTextTarget: Aholi yashash hududidan chiqayotganda siz ham, oldingizda taxminan 15 m masofadagi transport vositasi ham tezlikni 50 km/soatdan 100 km/soatga oshirmoqda. Oldindagi transportgacha xavfsiz masofani qanday o‘zgartirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Aholi yashash hududidan tashqarida oldindagi transport vositasigacha kamida tezlikning yarmi metrda bo‘lgan xavfsiz masofani saqlang. 100 km/soatda xavfsiz masofa kamida 50 metr bo‘lishi kerak.

questionTextSource: Why must you be ready to brake in this situation?
explanationSource: You see that a vehicle wants to drive onto the road from the right. Since it comes from a field or forest path, you have right of way. Due to the forest cover the visibility for the vehicle driver may be limited. It is possible that he/she will continue despite having to wait. For this reason, you must be ready to brake until you clearly recognize that he/she is stopping.
answerASource: Because the other vehicle might continue moving
answerBSource: Because the direction of the road ahead demands it
answerCSource: Because a speed limit is visible
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda nega tormozga tayyor turishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: O‘ng tomondan transport vositasi yo‘lga chiqmoqchi ekanini ko‘ryapsiz. U dala yoki o‘rmon yo‘lidan kelayotgani uchun siz ustunlikka egasiz. Ammo o‘rmon qoplamasi sabab u haydovchining ko‘rinishi cheklangan bo‘lishi mumkin. U kutishi kerak bo‘lsa ham, davom etishi mumkin. Shu sabab u to‘xtayotganini aniq ko‘rmaguningizcha tormozga tayyor turishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Chunki boshqa transport vositasi harakatni davom ettirishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Chunki oldindagi yo‘l yo‘nalishi shuni talab qiladi

questionTextSource: Why should you lower your speed now?
explanationSource: Basically, you have the right of way, because you are on a priority road. However, to avoid a dangerous situation, you should still reduce your speed and be ready to brake, as the car driver of the car coming from the right-hand side might recognize you too late or miss you altogether. Due to the trees on the roadside his/her view is clearly limited.
answerASource: Because I am badly visible to other road users
answerBSource: Because the direction of the road ahead demands it
answerCSource: Because I have to give right of way
questionTextTarget: Nega hozir tezlikni kamaytirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Aslida siz ustunlikka egasiz, chunki ustun yo‘ldasiz. Biroq xavfli vaziyatning oldini olish uchun baribir tezlikni kamaytirib, tormozga tayyor turishingiz kerak. O‘ng tomondan kelayotgan avtomobil haydovchisi sizni juda kech ko‘rishi yoki umuman payqamay qolishi mumkin. Yo‘l chetidagi daraxtlar sabab uning ko‘rinishi ancha cheklangan.
answerATarget: Chunki boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga yomon ko‘rinaman
answerBTarget: Chunki oldindagi yo‘l yo‘nalishi shuni talab qiladi

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: In this situation, you need to reduce the speed and allow the car driver to go back into lane on the left. If a lane ends on a multi-lane road or if it is not possible for the drivers driving on the other lane to drive through the lane continuously, they must be able to change lanes using the zipper procedure.
answerASource: I slow down
answerBSource: I accelerate
answerCSource: I continue driving as before
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Bu vaziyatda tezlikni kamaytirib, avtomobil haydovchisiga chap tomonda yana yo‘lakka qaytishga imkon berishingiz kerak. Ko‘p yo‘lakli yo‘lda bir yo‘lak tugasa yoki boshqa yo‘lakdagi haydovchilar uzluksiz davom eta olmasa, ular zipper tartibi bo‘yicha yo‘lakni almashtira olishi kerak.

questionTextSource: What should you anticipate in this situation?
explanationSource: Although you are on the priority road, you must always expect dangerous situations to arise. For example, the tractor driver approaching your street at a junction could not fulfill his duty of waiting and force the vehicle in front of you to brake. By driving anticipatory you can help defuse potentially dangerous situations.
answerASource: - motorcyclist will slow down
answerBSource: - tractor will proceed onto the road
answerCSource: - tractor will wait
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Siz ustun yo‘lda bo‘lsangiz ham, xavfli vaziyatlar yuzaga kelishini doimo kutishingiz kerak. Masalan, kesishmada sizning ko‘chaga yaqinlashayotgan traktor haydovchisi kutish majburiyatini bajarmasligi va oldingizdagi transport vositasini tormozlashga majbur qilishi mumkin. Oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydash orqali bunday xavfli vaziyatlarni yumshatishingiz mumkin.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: The maximum speed limit on this road is 80 km/h. You drive 80 km/h. The driver driving behind you harasses you to drive quicker; he/she comes dangerously close and falls below the required safety distance. Keep your speed. If you try to increase the safety margin by accelerating, the driver behind you will probably also accelerate. Braking, even briefly, endangers you and the car behind.
answerASource: I maintain my speed and continue driving as before
answerBSource: I accelerate in order to create a large enough safety distance
answerCSource: I brake briefly in order that that the driver behind will reduce his speed
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘lda maksimal ruxsat etilgan tezlik 80 km/soat. Siz 80 km/soat tezlikda ketyapsiz. Ortingizdagi haydovchi sizni tezroq yurishga majbur qilmoqda; u xavfli darajada yaqin kelib, zarur xavfsiz masofadan kamroq masofa qoldirmoqda. Tezligingizni saqlang. Agar xavfsiz masofani oshirish uchun tezlashsangiz, ortingizdagi haydovchi ham ehtimol tezlashadi. Hatto qisqa tormozlash ham sizga va orqadagi avtomobilga xavf tug‘diradi.
answerATarget: Tezligimni saqlayman va oldingidek davom etaman
answerBTarget: Yetarlicha xavfsiz masofa yaratish uchun tezlashaman
answerCTarget: Orqadagi haydovchi tezligini kamaytirishi uchun qisqa tormoz beraman

questionTextSource: What should you do?
explanationSource: If you suddenly have to brake immediately as much as possible, you stay on your lane and, if necessary, accept that you collide with the obstacle. Do not turn left because of oncoming traffic. Dodging to the right is out of the question as well, because you will get off the lane and possibly drive against one of the trees.
answerASource: I brake sharply and immediately
answerBSource: I take no evasive movement
answerCSource: I swerve towards the left
questionTextTarget: Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar to‘satdan imkon qadar kuchli tormoz berishingiz kerak bo‘lsa, o‘z yo‘lagizda qoling va zarur bo‘lsa, to‘siq bilan to‘qnashishni qabul qiling. Qarama-qarshi transport sabab chapga burilmang. O‘ngga chetlashish ham mumkin emas, chunki yo‘ldan chiqib ketib, daraxtlardan biriga urilishingiz mumkin.

questionTextSource: What must you pay attention to when turning right?
explanationSource: All drivers driving on the priority road must be given priority. The motorcycle is on the lane where you want to turn right. Before you turn right into the priority road, you have to wait and let the motorcycle pass.
answerASource: To the motorbike
answerBSource: To vehicles coming from the left
answerCSource: To [the tractor]
questionTextTarget: O‘ngga burilganda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Ustun yo‘lda harakatlanayotgan barcha haydovchilarga ustunlik berilishi kerak. Mototsikl siz o‘ngga burilmoqchi bo‘lgan yo‘lakda. Ustun yo‘lga o‘ngga burilishdan oldin kutib, mototsiklni o‘tkazib yuborishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: You want to remain on the priority road. What must you anticipate now?
explanationSource: In this situation, it is likely that the black car did not see you on your motorcycle. The children further down the road are likely to cross the road. The red van will not continue on the priority road and is turning right as indicated by his blinkers
answerASource: That the [red car] fails to see me
answerBSource: That the children will cross the road
answerCSource: That the van continues driving on the priority road
questionTextTarget: Siz ustun yo‘lda qolmoqchisiz. Hozir nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu vaziyatda qora avtomobil sizni mototsiklingizda ko‘rmagan bo‘lishi ehtimol. Yo‘lning pastroq qismidagi bolalar ehtimol yo‘lni kesib o‘tadi. Qizil furgon ustun yo‘lda davom etmaydi va burilish ko‘rsatkichi bo‘yicha o‘ngga burilmoqda.

questionTextSource: What should you do, if it is no longer possible to avoid a collision with wild animals?
explanationSource: If a collision with an animal is no longer avoidable, the direction of travel is to be maintained. Then brake hard and hold the steering wheel firmly. An evasive maneuver can injure other road users or increase the risk of greater damage than a controlled collision with the animal.
answerASource: I brake as hard as possible
answerBSource: I maintain my direction of movement
answerCSource: I always take an evasive movement
questionTextTarget: Yovvoyi hayvonlar bilan to‘qnashuvdan qochishning iloji qolmasa, nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar hayvon bilan to‘qnashuvdan qochishning iloji qolmasa, harakat yo‘nalishini saqlash kerak. Keyin qattiq tormoz bering va rulni mahkam ushlang. Chetga burilish manevri boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarini jarohatlashi yoki hayvon bilan nazoratli to‘qnashuvdan ko‘ra katta zarar xavfini oshirishi mumkin.
answerCTarget: Har doim chetga chiqish manevrini qilaman

questionTextSource: The cruise control system of your motor vehicle is set to 130 km/h. What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: You must interrupt the cruise control by braking. The motorcyclist changes to your safety distance. You can restore it only by breaking. It is not possible to change to the right-hand lane, as otherwise you would get into the safety distance of the vehicles in succession. The speed limit prohibits to drive faster than 130 km/h.
answerASource: - restore the safety distance by braking
answerBSource: - overtake the motorbike
answerCSource: - move to the right-hand lane
questionTextTarget: Motorli transport vositangizning kruiz-kontrol tizimi 130 km/soatga sozlangan. Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Tormoz berish orqali kruiz-kontrolni uzishingiz kerak. Mototsiklchi sizning xavfsiz masofangizga kirib keldi. Uni faqat tormozlash orqali qayta tiklay olasiz. O‘ng yo‘lakka o‘tish mumkin emas, aks holda siz ketma-ket kelayotgan transport vositalarining xavfsiz masofasiga kirib qolasiz. Tezlik cheklovi 130 km/soatdan tezroq yurishni taqiqlaydi.

questionTextSource: What must you do in this situation?
explanationSource: In this situation, you should immediately brake hard but also not swerve.
answerASource: I immediately brake sharply
answerBSource: I do not swerve
answerCSource: I steer to the left
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bu vaziyatda darhol kuchli tormoz berishingiz, lekin chetga burilmasligingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: You are driving on a winding section of road popular with motorcyclists. What must you anticipate?
explanationSource: On curvy roads, motorcyclists can cut their curves or protrude on your roadway in curves because of their strong inclinations. Even motorcyclists who drive in the same direction of travel can also take advantage of the curves and could tend to carry out risky overtaking maneuvers.
answerASource: Motorcyclists encroaching into my lane due to their strongly tilted position when cornering
answerBSource: Motorcyclists cutting corners
answerCSource: Motorcyclists overtaking me in a risky manner
questionTextTarget: Siz mototsiklchilar orasida mashhur bo‘lgan burilishli yo‘l qismida ketyapsiz. Nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Egri yo‘llarda mototsiklchilar kuchli egilgan holatda burilish olgani sabab burilishni kesib o‘tishi yoki sizning yo‘lagizga chiqib ketishi mumkin. Siz bilan bir yo‘nalishda ketayotgan mototsiklchilar ham burilishlardan foydalanib, xavfli quvib o‘tish manevrlariga moyil bo‘lishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Mototsiklchilar burilishda kuchli egilgan holati sabab mening yo‘lagimga kirib kelishi
answerCTarget: Mototsiklchilar meni xavfli tarzda quvib o‘tishi

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: The driver of the red vehicle cuts the bend. Brake and stay behind the vehicle until you are sure that it will stay in its lane after the bend.
answerASource: I reduce my speed
answerBSource: I remain behind the [red] vehicle for now
answerCSource: I drive quickly past the [red] vehicle
questionTextTarget: Hozir nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Qizil transport vositasi haydovchisi burilishni kesib o‘tmoqda. Tormoz bering va transport vositasi burilishdan keyin o‘z yo‘lagida qolishiga ishonch hosil qilguncha uning ortida qoling.
answerCTarget: [Qizil] transport vositasi yonidan tez o‘tib ketaman

questionTextSource: What is the right behaviour now?
explanationSource:
On confusing roadways or when there is oncoming traffic on a narrow street, you should always pay close attention to other road users and adjust your speed. In this way, dangerous situations can be reduced in advance. 
You should also drive as far to the right as possible to avoid a collision with the oncoming truck. You can't see through the tree how far in the middle the oncoming truck is driving. You also create more space on the road if the motorcycle behind you tries to overtake and hasn't seen the truck yet.
answerASource: I reduce my speed
answerBSource: I drive as far to the right as possible
answerCSource: I signal to the motorcyclist that he can overtake me
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri xatti-harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Noaniq yo‘llarda yoki tor ko‘chada qarama-qarshi transport bo‘lganda, boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga doimo diqqat bilan e’tibor berib, tezlikni moslashtirish kerak. Shu tariqa xavfli vaziyatlar oldindan kamaytiriladi. Qarshidan kelayotgan yuk mashinasi bilan to‘qnashuvdan qochish uchun imkon qadar o‘ng tomonda yuring. Daraxt sabab qarshidan kelayotgan yuk mashinasi yo‘l o‘rtasida qanchalik harakatlanayotganini ko‘ra olmaysiz. Ortingizdagi mototsiklchi quvib o‘tishga urinib, sizni hali ko‘rmagan bo‘lsa, yo‘lda ko‘proq joy ham yaratasiz.
answerCTarget: Mototsiklchiga meni quvib o‘tishi mumkinligini signal bilan bildiraman

questionTextSource: What should you do?
explanationSource: A car driving in front of you parks. You must reduce your speed and then change the lane to avoid the parked car when the motorcycle has passed you.
answerASource: Reduce speed, be ready to brake
answerBSource: Move to the left-hand lane
answerCSource: Continue driving, flash lights to signal
questionTextTarget: Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Oldingizda harakatlanayotgan avtomobil parkovka qilmoqda. Tezlikni kamaytirishingiz, keyin mototsikl yoningizdan o‘tib ketgach, parkovka qilgan avtomobilni chetlab o‘tish uchun yo‘lakni almashtirishingiz kerak.
answerCTarget: Harakatni davom ettirib, chiroq bilan signal beraman

questionTextSource: What should you know about using the rear-view mirror?
explanationSource: Using the rear-view mirrors requires you to know the following: 1. Rear-view mirrors must be adjusted to the driver before starting to drive. 2. There are blind spots on all types of rear-view mirrors. These indicate areas hidden from view in which pedestrians, small vehicles or obstacles can be overlooked. By optimally adjusting the outer rearview mirror and the inner mirror, you keep the blind spot as low as possible.
answerASource: I am unable to see vehicles and pedestrians in the blind spot
answerBSource: Rear-view mirrors must be adjusted to the particular driver
answerCSource: The interior mirror has no blind spot to the right-side
questionTextTarget: Orqa ko‘zgudan foydalanish haqida nimani bilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Orqa ko‘zgulardan foydalanishda quyidagilarni bilishingiz kerak: 1. Harakatni boshlashdan oldin orqa ko‘zgular haydovchiga moslab sozlanishi kerak. 2. Har qanday orqa ko‘zguda ko‘r nuqtalar mavjud. Bu ko‘rinmaydigan hududlar bo‘lib, u yerda piyodalar, kichik transport vositalari yoki to‘siqlar ko‘zdan qochishi mumkin. Tashqi va ichki orqa ko‘zgularni optimal sozlash orqali ko‘r nuqtani imkon qadar kamaytirasiz.
answerATarget: Ko‘r nuqtada transport vositalari va piyodalarni ko‘ra olmayman
answerBTarget: Orqa ko‘zgular muayyan haydovchiga moslab sozlanishi kerak
answerCTarget: Ichki ko‘zguda o‘ng tomonda ko‘r nuqta yo‘q

questionTextSource: You are driving into a right-hand bend. A motorcyclist approaches you at high speed. What risks should you take into account?
explanationSource: As you enter a right-hand turn, the oncoming motorcyclist makes a left turn. His upper body is tilted towards you. Bear in mind that the motorcyclist is almost as wide as a car while doing that. If the rider is riding too far at the center line to increase the radius of curvature and lower centrifugal forces, his upper body could be caught by your vehicle.
answerASource: - will intrude into my lane because of the heavily tilted position
answerBSource: - will cut the corner and intrude into my lane
answerCSource: - will brake in good time and avoid intruding into my lane
questionTextTarget: Siz o‘ng burilishga kirmoqdasiz. Qarshingizdan mototsiklchi yuqori tezlikda yaqinlashmoqda. Qanday xavflarni hisobga olishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Siz o‘ng burilishga kirayotganda qarshidan kelayotgan mototsiklchi chapga burilmoqda. Uning yuqori tanasi siz tomonga egilgan. Shuni hisobga olingki, bu holatda mototsiklchi deyarli avtomobil kengligida bo‘ladi. Agar haydovchi burilish radiusini oshirish va markazdan qochma kuchlarni kamaytirish uchun markaziy chiziqqa juda yaqin yursa, uning yuqori tanasi sizning transport vositangizga tegib ketishi mumkin.
answerATarget: - kuchli egilgan holati sabab mening yo‘lagimga kirib kelishi
answerBTarget: - burilishni kesib o‘tib, mening yo‘lagimga kirib kelishi
answerCTarget: - o‘z vaqtida tormozlab, mening yo‘lagimga kirmasligi

questionTextSource: On a narrow road you want to overtake cyclists on an incline. What should you do?
explanationSource: Cyclists tend to sway more on inclines. So, the required minimum distance to the cyclist of 1.5 m should therefore be increased. Oncoming traffic must be allowed to pass before overtaking. Do not drive close to the cyclists while passing them.
answerASource: - maintain a large distance to the side
answerBSource: - allow the oncoming traffic to pass before overtaking
answerCSource: - drive carefully close past the cyclists
questionTextTarget: Tor yo‘lda qiyalikda velosipedchilarni quvib o‘tmoqchisiz. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Velosipedchilar qiyaliklarda ko‘proq tebranishga moyil. Shu sabab velosipedchigacha talab qilinadigan 1,5 m minimal masofa oshirilishi kerak. Quvib o‘tishdan oldin qarama-qarshi transportni o‘tkazib yuborish kerak. Velosipedchilar yonidan yaqin o‘tmang.
answerBTarget: - quvib o‘tishdan oldin qarama-qarshi transportni o‘tkazib yuborish
answerCTarget: - velosipedchilar yonidan ehtiyotkorlik bilan yaqin o‘tish

questionTextSource: You are driving on a rural road. A line of approximately 15 slow-moving vehicles is travelling in front of you. What should you do?
explanationSource: In such a convoy, it is important to stay calm and to maintain the necessary safety distance. So-called queue, that is the overtaking of individual vehicles, brings no time gain and leads to a high accident risk.
answerASource: I remain behind the line of vehicles for the moment
answerBSource: I flash my lights and sound my horn to urge vehicles ahead to overtake
answerCSource: I overtake the line of vehicles as quickly as possible
questionTextTarget: Siz qishloq yo‘lida ketyapsiz. Oldingizda taxminan 15 ta sekin harakatlanuvchi transport vositasi ketmoqda. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bunday kolonnada tinch qolish va zarur xavfsiz masofani saqlash muhim. Ayrim transport vositalarini birma-bir quvib o‘tish vaqt yutug‘i bermaydi va katta avariya xavfiga olib keladi.
answerATarget: Hozircha transport vositalari kolonnasi ortida qolaman
answerBTarget: Oldindagi transportlarni quvib o‘tishga undash uchun chiroq chaqnatib, signal chalaman
answerCTarget: Transport vositalari kolonnasini imkon qadar tez quvib o‘taman

questionTextSource: You stop to allow passengers to exit your vehicle on the right-side. A cycle path runs along there. What should you do?
explanationSource: You as a car driver have a special duty of care. So, if you're stopping at a bike path with a co-driver, you should warn him/her about the cyclist before he/she gets off.
answerASource: I should make sure that no cyclists are approaching
answerBSource: I should point out the cycle path to the persons exiting
answerCSource: I should observe the traffic using my rear-view mirror only
questionTextTarget: Yo‘lovchilarni transport vositangizning o‘ng tomonidan tushirish uchun to‘xtadingiz. U tomonda veloyo‘lak bor. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Avtomobil haydovchisi sifatida sizda alohida ehtiyotkorlik majburiyati bor. Shuning uchun veloyo‘lak yonida yo‘lovchi bilan to‘xtasangiz, u tushishidan oldin velosipedchi haqida ogohlantirishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: Velosipedchilar yaqinlashmayotganiga ishonch hosil qilishim kerak
answerBTarget: Tushayotgan shaxslarga veloyo‘lak borligini aytishim kerak
answerCTarget: Transportni faqat orqa ko‘zgu orqali kuzatishim kerak

questionTextSource: You increase your speed from 50 km/h to 100 km/h. How does the reaction distance change in accordance with the rule of thumb?
explanationSource: If the car driver doubles the speed of the vehicle, the braking distance doubles from 15 to 30 meters.
answerASource: It is doubled from 15 m to 30 m
answerBSource: It is quadrupled from 25 m to 100 m
answerCSource: It is halved from 50 m to 25 m
questionTextTarget: Siz tezlikni 50 km/soatdan 100 km/soatga oshirdingiz. Oddiy qoida bo‘yicha reaksiya masofasi qanday o‘zgaradi?
explanationTarget: Haydovchi transport vositasi tezligini ikki baravar oshirsa, reaksiya masofasi 15 metrdan 30 metrga ikki baravar ortadi.
answerATarget: 15 m dan 30 m gacha ikki baravar ortadi
answerBTarget: 25 m dan 100 m gacha to‘rt baravar ortadi
answerCTarget: 50 m dan 25 m gacha ikki baravar kamayadi

questionTextSource: What can cause a faster-moving vehicle to suddenly swerve on a dry, straight road?
explanationSource: By gusts of wind and tire blow your vehicle can break out and distract you from your direction of travel.
answerASource: Gusts of wind
answerBSource: A tyre blow-out
answerCSource: Continuous head wind
questionTextTarget: Quruq, to‘g‘ri yo‘lda tezroq harakatlanayotgan transport vositasining to‘satdan chetga og‘ishiga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Shamolning kuchli esishi va shina yorilishi transport vositangizning yo‘nalishdan chiqishiga va sizni harakat yo‘nalishidan chalg‘itishiga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What should you anticipate?
explanationSource: The danger sign warns of a sharp left turn. The crest blocks the view forward on the road. The curve is not visible. You have to expect a broken-down vehicle or another obstacle. Because of the road, there can be no cross traffic in front of the crest.
answerASource: A dangerous left-hand bend
answerBSource: An obstacle situated around the corner
answerCSource: Cross-wise moving traffic before the summit
questionTextTarget: Nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Xavf belgisi keskin chap burilish haqida ogohlantiradi. Tepalik oldindagi yo‘l ko‘rinishini to‘sadi. Burilish ko‘rinmaydi. Buzilib qolgan transport vositasi yoki boshqa to‘siq bo‘lishini kutishingiz kerak. Yo‘lning tuzilishi sabab tepalik oldida ko‘ndalang harakat bo‘lishi mumkin emas.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: As you can see in the rearview mirror, there is a vehicle behind you in the left lane. So stay in the middle lane and let the truck change lanes to overtake.
answerASource: I stay in the middle lane
answerBSource: I move into the left-hand lane
answerCSource: I move into the right-hand lane
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Orqa ko‘zguda ko‘rib turganingizdek, chap yo‘lakda ortingizda transport vositasi bor. Shuning uchun o‘rta yo‘lakda qoling va yuk mashinasiga quvib o‘tish uchun yo‘lakni almashtirishga imkon bering.

questionTextSource: What must you reckon with here?
explanationSource: The sign announces the end of the left lane. The traffic flow will condense from two lanes to a single lane. Halting traffic might occur. The vehicle in the left lane will change the lane. You have to allow the vehicles on the left side of the lane to change over to your lane according to the zip merging principle.
answerASource: The vehicle in front changing lanes
answerBSource: Denser traffic beyond the underpass
answerCSource: The right-hand lane coming to an end
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Belgi chap yo‘lak tugashini bildiradi. Harakat oqimi ikki yo‘lakdan bitta yo‘lakka zichlashadi. To‘xtab qolgan transport yuzaga kelishi mumkin. Chap yo‘lakdagi transport vositasi yo‘lakni almashtiradi. Chap tomondagi transport vositalariga zipper qo‘shilish tamoyiliga ko‘ra sizning yo‘lagizga o‘tishga imkon berishingiz kerak.
answerBTarget: Yer osti o‘tishidan keyin harakat zichlashishi

questionTextSource: What must you do here?
explanationSource: If the car driver drives at high speed on the highway for a long time, the senses get used to the fast pace. There is a risk of underestimating the pace. In particular, if you want to drive out, check your speed on the speedometer. Use the deceleration lane of the freeway to reduce your speed. Braking there doesn't hinder anybody. Then you can enter the sharp bend of the exit at a reasonable speed.
answerASource: Check your speed again and, if necessary, brake
answerBSource: Brake only on the bend so as not to obstruct traffic following behind
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Haydovchi avtomagistralda uzoq vaqt yuqori tezlikda yursa, sezgilar tez sur’atga o‘rganib qoladi. Tezlikni kam baholash xavfi bor. Ayniqsa chiqmoqchi bo‘lsangiz, tezligingizni spidometrda tekshiring. Tezlikni kamaytirish uchun avtomagistralning sekinlashish yo‘lagidan foydalaning. U yerda tormozlash hech kimga xalaqit bermaydi. Shundan so‘ng chiqishdagi keskin burilishga mos tezlikda kirishingiz mumkin.
answerATarget: Tezligingizni yana tekshiring va zarur bo‘lsa tormozlang
answerBTarget: Orqadagi transportga xalaqit bermaslik uchun faqat burilishda tormozlang

questionTextSource: A traffic jam is building up here. What is the correct procedure?
explanationSource: If you drive towards a traffic jam, turn on your hazard lights to alert other road users. It is important to build a rescue lane for any approaching rescue vehicles. In this case, drive as far to the right as possible.
answerASource: If possible, switch on hazard warning lights to warn vehicles following behind
answerBSource: Drive as far as possible to the right in order to leave room for a channel on the left
answerCSource: Drive as far as possible to the left in order to leave room for a channel on the right
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda tirbandlik yuzaga kelmoqda. To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
