explanationTarget: Transport vositasining ekspluatatsiyasi uchun haydovchi ham, egasi ham javobgar.

questionTextSource: What do you have to consider when tipping bulk goods?
explanationSource: When dumping of materials, please make sure that the vehicle is on sufficiently solid ground, and protective must be released so that the dumping body can be fully tilted.
answerASource: The vehicle must stand on sufficiently firm ground
answerBSource: The relevant safety devices must be unlocked to allow the tipping bridge to be completely tilted
answerCSource: The side walls should only be opened when the tipping bridge is in its tilted end position
questionTextTarget: Sochilma yukni ag‘darib tushirishda nimani hisobga olishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Materiallarni ag‘darib tushirishda transport vositasi yetarlicha mustahkam yerda turganiga va ag‘darish kuzovi to‘liq ko‘tarilishi uchun tegishli xavfsizlik moslamalari bo‘shatilganiga e’tibor bering.
answerATarget: Transport vositasi yetarlicha mustahkam yerda turishi kerak
answerBTarget: Ag‘darish kuzovi to‘liq ko‘tarilishi uchun tegishli xavfsizlik moslamalari qulfdan chiqarilishi kerak
answerCTarget: Yon devorlar faqat ag‘darish kuzovi oxirgi ko‘tarilgan holatga yetganda ochilishi kerak

questionTextSource: Why is it necessary to observe the load distribution plan?
explanationSource: In order to avoid exceeding the axle load, it is necessary to adhere to the load distribution plan. So you can also ensure the steering ability.
answerASource: To prevent exceeding the axle loads
answerBSource: To ensure steering capacity is maintained
answerCSource: To make loading and unloading easier
questionTextTarget: Nega yuk taqsimoti rejasiga rioya qilish zarur?
explanationTarget: O‘q yuklamalari oshib ketmasligi uchun yuk taqsimoti rejasiga rioya qilish zarur. Shu orqali rul boshqaruvi saqlanishini ham ta’minlaysiz.
answerATarget: O‘q yuklamalari oshib ketishining oldini olish uchun

questionTextSource: What is the purpose of a load distribution plan?
explanationSource: The load distribution plan shows how the vehicle must be loaded. If the distribution is uneven, the braking behaviour changes greatly.
answerASource: To help with the road-worthy loading of the vehicle
answerBSource: To avoid falling below the axle load limit of the vehicle
answerCSource: To determine the unloading sequence for the vehicle
questionTextTarget: Yuk taqsimoti rejasining maqsadi nima?
explanationTarget: Yuk taqsimoti rejasi transport vositasi qanday yuklanishi kerakligini ko‘rsatadi. Yuk notekis taqsimlansa, tormozlash xatti-harakati keskin o‘zgaradi.
answerATarget: Transport vositasini yo‘lga yaroqli tarzda yuklashga yordam berish
answerBTarget: Transport vositasining o‘q yuklamasi chegarasidan past tushib ketmaslik

questionTextSource: What could happen if your vehicle is not loaded according to the load distribution plan?
explanationSource: The load distribution plan shows how the vehicle must be loaded. If the load is unevenly distributed, the braking behaviour will change considerably. Damage to tyres occurs and steering ability is also impaired.
answerASource: The tyres may become damaged
answerBSource: The steering ability may be affected
answerCSource: Its braking performance may be adversely affected
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz yuk taqsimoti rejasiga muvofiq yuklanmasa nima yuz berishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yuk taqsimoti rejasi transport vositasi qanday yuklanishi kerakligini ko‘rsatadi. Yuk notekis taqsimlansa, tormozlash xususiyati ancha o‘zgaradi. Shinalar shikastlanishi va rul boshqaruvi ham yomonlashishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What specific information can you find in a load distribution plan?
explanationSource: The load distribution plan gives information on the load centre of gravity with the maximum permissible load.
answerASource: Information about the centre of gravity of the load at the maximum allowable load limit
answerBSource: Information about securing the load on the load platform
answerCSource: Information about the maximum height of the load on the load platform
questionTextTarget: Yuk taqsimoti rejasida qanday aniq ma’lumotlarni topish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yuk taqsimoti rejasi maksimal ruxsat etilgan yuk chegarasida yukning og‘irlik markazi haqida ma’lumot beradi.
answerATarget: Maksimal ruxsat etilgan yuk chegarasida yukning og‘irlik markazi haqida ma’lumot
answerBTarget: Yuk maydonida yukni mahkamlash haqida ma’lumot
answerCTarget: Yuk maydonidagi yukning maksimal balandligi haqida ma’lumot

questionTextSource: Who is responsible for securing the load on the vehicle?
answerASource: The driver
answerBSource: The shipper
answerCSource: The receiver
questionTextTarget: Transport vositasida yukni mahkamlash uchun kim javobgar?
explanationTarget: Yukni mahkamlash uchun avvalo haydovchi javobgar. Yuk jo‘natuvchi ham o‘z majburiyatlariga ega bo‘lishi mumkin. Qabul qiluvchi odatda yukni mahkamlash uchun javobgar emas.

questionTextSource: What can help with friction-locked load securing?
explanationSource:
In force-locking load securing, the transported goods are pressed onto the loading surface by means of lashing. This type of lashing is also known as tie-down lashing.
The load usually stands freely on the loading surface and is only secured by the increased force applied. In most cases, the frictional force between the loading surface and the load is increased.
The load is secured with the aid of load securing equipment such as lashing straps, lashing chains, anti-slip mats or cover nets and with the aid of attachment points on the loading surface.
This prevents the load from slipping.
answerASource: Lashing straps
answerBSource: Anti-slip mats
answerCSource: Lashing chains
questionTextTarget: Ishqalanish orqali yukni mahkamlashda nima yordam beradi?
explanationTarget: Kuch bilan mahkamlashda yuk bog‘lash vositalari yordamida yuk maydoniga bosiladi. Bu “pastga bosib bog‘lash” deb ham ataladi. Odatda yuk erkin turadi va qo‘shimcha kuch orqali mahkamlanadi. Ko‘pincha yuk maydoni bilan yuk orasidagi ishqalanish kuchi oshiriladi. Bunda tortish tasmalari, zanjirlar, sirpanishga qarshi gilamchalar yoki yopuvchi to‘rlar yordam beradi.

questionTextSource: What should be taken into consideration when selecting load-securing lashing equipment?
explanationSource:
Among other things, the face and shape of the load are decisive for the selection of suitable and necessary lashing equipment. 
Equally important are the requirements of the vehicle, such as the permissible payload and the attachment points.
answerASource: The shape of the load
answerBSource: The weight of the load
answerCSource: The available lashing points
questionTextTarget: Yukni mahkamlash uchun bog‘lash vositalarini tanlashda nimani hisobga olish kerak?
explanationTarget: Mos va zarur bog‘lash vositalarini tanlashda yukning shakli va og‘irligi muhim. Transport vositasining talablari, masalan ruxsat etilgan yuk ko‘tarish qobiliyati va mavjud mahkamlash nuqtalari ham muhim.

questionTextSource: You want to secure your load by lashing it down. What should you bear in mind?
explanationSource: When lashing down, the load is pressed onto the loading area using lashing devices to increase the friction force and prevent slipping. It is important to check the tension of the lashing devices, as the necessary contact force and thus the required friction can only be achieved with sufficient tension. In addition, this method is only suitable for dimensionally stable loads; flexible goods can deform under the tension, which means that the pre-tensioning force is lost and load securing is no longer guaranteed.
answerASource: - regularly check the tension of the lashing equipment
answerBSource: - only secure dimensionally stable loads by lashing them down
answerCSource: - choose the smallest possible lashing angle
questionTextTarget: Yukni pastga bosib bog‘lash orqali mahkamlamoqchisiz. Nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Pastga bosib bog‘lashda yuk bog‘lash vositalari yordamida yuk maydoniga bosiladi, ishqalanish kuchi oshiriladi va sirpanish oldi olinadi. Bog‘lash vositalari tarangligini muntazam tekshirish muhim, chunki zarur bosish kuchi faqat yetarli taranglik bilan hosil bo‘ladi. Bu usul faqat shaklini saqlaydigan yuklarga mos; egiluvchan yuklar taranglik ostida deformatsiyalanib, mahkamlash kuchi yo‘qolishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: - faqat shaklini saqlaydigan yuklarni pastga bosib bog‘lash orqali mahkamlash
answerCTarget: - imkon qadar eng kichik bog‘lash burchagini tanlash

questionTextSource: What is better for reasons of driving safety?
explanationSource: Since you could load (truck) in a truck with a trailer on the front part of the weight, it is better for the sake of driving safety when the trailer is empty.
answerASource: The truck is loaded and the trailer is empty
answerBSource: The trailer is loaded and the truck is empty
questionTextTarget: Haydash xavfsizligi nuqtayi nazaridan nima yaxshiroq?
explanationTarget: Tirkamali yuk mashinasida og‘irlikni yuk mashinasining old qismiga joylashtirish mumkin bo‘lgani uchun haydash xavfsizligi nuqtayi nazaridan yuk mashinasi yuklangan, tirkama esa bo‘sh bo‘lgani ma’qul.

questionTextSource: What must you remember when you wish to transport animals on a trailer?
explanationSource: You have to make sure that the maximum authorized mass of the trailer is not exceeded and subject to special rules for the transport of animals in an animal transportation.
answerASource: The special regulations for the transport of animals
answerBSource: The total permissible mass of the trailer must not be exceeded
answerCSource: Animals may only be transported on trailers with air-brakes
questionTextTarget: Tirkamada hayvon tashimoqchi bo‘lsangiz, nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Tirkamaning ruxsat etilgan maksimal massasi oshib ketmasligiga va hayvonlarni tashish bo‘yicha maxsus qoidalarga rioya qilinishiga ishonch hosil qilishingiz kerak.
answerBTarget: Tirkamaning ruxsat etilgan umumiy massasi oshib ketmasligi kerak
answerCTarget: Hayvonlar faqat pnevmatik tormozli tirkamalarda tashilishi mumkin

questionTextSource: When must attached working equipment be marked with red-white warning plates?
explanationSource: A red and white warning board is then to mount when it protrudes rearward more than 1 m on the rear lamps of the tractor if it has traffic hazardous parts and also when it laterally by more than 40 cm beyond the boundary or rear lamps of the tractor protrudes. All three are correct.
answerASource: When it has parts presenting a danger to traffic
answerBSource: When extending laterally more than 40 cm beyond the side lights or rear lights of the tractor
answerCSource: When extending more than 1 m to the back beyond the rear lights of the tractor
questionTextTarget: Ulangan ish jihozlari qachon qizil-oq ogohlantirish taxtalari bilan belgilanishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar ish jihozi traktor orqa chiroqlaridan orqaga 1 m dan ortiq chiqsa, harakat uchun xavfli qismlari bo‘lsa yoki traktor yon chiroqlari yoki orqa chiroqlaridan yon tomonga 40 sm dan ortiq chiqsa, qizil-oq ogohlantirish taxtasi o‘rnatilishi kerak.
answerBTarget: Traktorning yon yoki orqa chiroqlaridan yon tomonga 40 sm dan ortiq chiqsa
answerCTarget: Traktorning orqa chiroqlaridan orqaga 1 m dan ortiq chiqsa

questionTextSource: What duties do you have when driving a loaded vehicle?
explanationSource: If you lead a loaded vehicle, you are responsible for ensuring that the safety of the vehicle is not affected by the charge and you have to adjust your speed to the load conditions.
answerASource: I am responsible for ensuring that the load does not impair the road safety of the vehicle
answerBSource: I must adjust my speed to the nature of the load
answerCSource: With loads at risking of tipping, I have to arrange for someone to accompany the load on the loading area to ensure it is secure
questionTextTarget: Yuklangan transport vositasini boshqarganda qanday majburiyatlaringiz bor?
explanationTarget: Yuklangan transport vositasini boshqarganda yuk transport vositasining yo‘l xavfsizligiga salbiy ta’sir qilmasligini ta’minlash va tezlikni yuk xususiyatlariga moslashtirish sizning majburiyatingizdir.
answerATarget: Yuk transport vositasining yo‘l xavfsizligiga salbiy ta’sir qilmasligini ta’minlashga javobgarman
answerCTarget: Ag‘darilish xavfi bo‘lgan yuklarda, yuk maydonida yukni kuzatib boruvchi shaxs tashkil qilishim kerak

questionTextSource: What happens if you do not wear snug-fitting clothing?
explanationSource: Clothes that are not loose and not snug-fitting will be flapping at high speed which reduces your stability. They could also reduce your rear-view vision. They, however, will not have any impact on air resistance.
answerASource: At high speed, flapping clothing affects road safety
answerBSource: Blown up clothing reduces your vision in the rear-view mirror
answerCSource: Blown up clothing reduces air resistance
questionTextTarget: Jips kiyim kiymasangiz nima yuz beradi?
explanationTarget: Bo‘sh va jips bo‘lmagan kiyim yuqori tezlikda hilpiraydi va barqarorligingizni kamaytiradi. U orqa ko‘zgudagi ko‘rinishni ham cheklashi mumkin. Biroq havo qarshiligini kamaytirmaydi.
answerATarget: Yuqori tezlikda hilpiragan kiyim yo‘l xavfsizligiga ta’sir qiladi
answerBTarget: Shishib ketgan kiyim orqa ko‘zgudagi ko‘rinishni kamaytiradi
answerCTarget: Shishib ketgan kiyim havo qarshiligini kamaytiradi

questionTextSource: What must you do before setting off on a journey?
explanationSource: All three are correct. Make sure that everything is fixed well on your motorcycle. Make sure that you wear adequate clothing, check your helmet visor. And finally, ensure the safety of the road and motorcycle.
answerASource: Check road safety and operational safety of the motorcycle
answerBSource: Check helmet visor and snug-fitting clothing
answerCSource: Check if panniers and top case are fixed correctly
questionTextTarget: Safarga chiqishdan oldin nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Uchala javob ham to‘g‘ri. Mototsiklda hamma narsa yaxshi mahkamlanganiga, mos kiyim kiyganingizga va dubulg‘a vizorini tekshirganingizga ishonch hosil qiling. Shuningdek, mototsiklning yo‘lga yaroqliligi va ekspluatatsion xavfsizligini tekshiring.
answerATarget: Mototsiklning yo‘lga yaroqliligi va ekspluatatsion xavfsizligini tekshirish
answerBTarget: Dubulg‘a vizori va jips kiyimni tekshirish
answerCTarget: Yon sumkalar va top-keyz to‘g‘ri mahkamlanganini tekshirish

questionTextSource: Why are motorcyclists required to wear an appropriate protective helmet?
explanationSource: A helmet is required to protect your head against injuries and potential death
answerASource: To avoid head injuries as much as possible
answerBSource: So it is easier to listen to the radio
answerCSource: To reduce air resistance at higher speed
questionTextTarget: Nega mototsiklchilar mos himoya dubulg‘asini kiyishi shart?
explanationTarget: Dubulg‘a bosh jarohatlari va o‘lim xavfidan himoya qilish uchun kerak.
answerATarget: Bosh jarohatlarini imkon qadar oldini olish uchun
answerCTarget: Yuqori tezlikda havo qarshiligini kamaytirish uchun

questionTextSource: Which items are part of a motorcyclists safety equipment?
explanationSource: An appropriate jacket, trousers and boots are part of the safety equipment that can protect you in case of accidents and injuries. Gym shoes are not protective equipment
answerASource: Appropriate jacket
answerBSource: Appropriate trousers
answerCSource: Gym shoes
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklchining xavfsizlik jihozlariga nimalar kiradi?
explanationTarget: Mos kurtka, shim va etiklar xavfsizlik jihozlariga kiradi va avariya hamda jarohatlardan himoya qiladi. Sport poyabzali himoya jihozi emas.

questionTextSource: Why should you wear appropriate boots when riding a motorcycle?
explanationSource: Boots do not reduce air resistance. Appropriate boots are a protective that will protect you from injury and undercooling
answerASource: You could suffer considerable foot injuries even if a motorbike just topples over whilst standing
answerBSource: Undercooling due to weather factors can damage your health
answerCSource: Because air resistance is reduced
questionTextTarget: Nega mototsikl haydaganda mos etik kiyish kerak?
explanationTarget: Etiklar havo qarshiligini kamaytirmaydi. Mos etiklar jarohatlardan va sovuq urishidan himoya qiladigan himoya vositasidir.
answerATarget: Mototsikl turgan joyida ag‘darilsa ham oyoqda jiddiy jarohatlar bo‘lishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Ob-havo ta’sirida sovqotish sog‘liqqa zarar yetkazishi mumkin

questionTextSource: Which motorcycle clothing increases optical perceptibility?
explanationSource: To increase your visibility, wear bright and light colours. Dark colours are less visible, especially at night.
answerASource: Clothing in bright colours
answerBSource: Clothing in light colours
answerCSource: Clothing in dark colours
questionTextTarget: Qaysi mototsikl kiyimi ko‘rinuvchanlikni oshiradi?
explanationTarget: Ko‘rinuvchanlikni oshirish uchun yorqin va och rangdagi kiyim kiying. To‘q ranglar, ayniqsa tunda, yomonroq ko‘rinadi.

questionTextSource: Why should you regularly apply the brakes with force at standstill?
explanationSource: When standing still, use your brakes to ensure that the system works correctly (both the braking transmission, connection and the breaks themselves)
answerASource: - whether the mechanical transmission and connection components are in functioning order
answerBSource: - whether a hydraulic braking system has no leaks
answerCSource: - the deceleration of the brakes is adequate
questionTextTarget: Nega turgan holatda tormozlarni muntazam kuch bilan bosib tekshirish kerak?
explanationTarget: Turgan holatda tormozlardan foydalanib tizim to‘g‘ri ishlayotganini tekshiring: mexanik uzatish va ulanish qismlari, gidravlik tizimda sizib chiqish yo‘qligi hamda tormozlarning sekinlatish kuchi.
answerATarget: - mexanik uzatish va ulanish qismlari ish holatida ekanini
answerBTarget: - gidravlik tormoz tizimida sizib chiqish yo‘qligini

questionTextSource: What are the effects of a badly scratched helmet visor?
explanationSource: A badly scratched helmet visor will diminish your vision and will make light more intensely seen with the risk of dazzling
answerASource: The wearer is dazzled more intensely than usual
answerBSource: Own vision is impaired
answerCSource: In daylight, there are no negative effects
questionTextTarget: Juda tirnalgan dubulg‘a vizori qanday ta’sir qiladi?
explanationTarget: Juda tirnalgan vizor ko‘rishni yomonlashtiradi va yorug‘likni kuchliroq tarqatib, ko‘zni qamashtirish xavfini oshiradi.

questionTextSource: What is correct for checking the brake light?
explanationSource: Make sure that the brake light works for the hand brake and foot break separately.
answerASource: Apply hand brake and foot brake one after the other
answerBSource: Apply hand brake and foot brake at the same time
answerCSource: Apply the hand brake only
questionTextTarget: Tormoz chirog‘ini tekshirishda qaysi javob to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Tormoz chirog‘i qo‘l tormozi va oyoq tormozi bilan alohida-alohida ishlashini tekshiring.
answerATarget: Qo‘l tormozi va oyoq tormozini ketma-ket bosish
answerBTarget: Qo‘l tormozi va oyoq tormozini bir vaqtda bosish

questionTextSource: Where are you allowed to store luggage on motorcycles?
explanationSource: You can store luggage in the tank-top bag, panniers (equally distributed on the right and left), luggage rack, handlebars.
answerASource: In panniers or on the luggage rack
answerBSource: In the tank-top bag
answerCSource: Evenly distributed on the right and left of the handlebars
questionTextTarget: Mototsikllarda bagajni qayerda joylashtirish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Bagajni bak usti sumkasida, yon sumkalarda — chap va o‘ng tomonga teng taqsimlab — bagaj tokchasida yoki rulda joylashtirish mumkin.
answerCTarget: Rulning chap va o‘ng tomoniga teng taqsimlab

questionTextSource: How must you protect yourself from serious head injuries?
explanationSource: An officially approved protective helmet is required to protect your head against injuries
answerASource: - an officially approved protective helmet
answerBSource: - a steel helmet
answerCSource: - a tested protective work helmet
questionTextTarget: O‘zingizni og‘ir bosh jarohatlaridan qanday himoya qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bosh jarohatlaridan himoyalanish uchun rasmiy tasdiqlangan himoya dubulg‘asi kerak.

questionTextSource: What applies to the installation and use of rear-view mirrors on motorcycles?
explanationSource: In order to be able to use your rearview mirror, you must ensure that they are well fixed, adjusted, and work (are not cracked, blind)
answerASource: They must be fixed and adjusted properly
answerBSource: They must neither be cracked nor blind
answerCSource: A mirror on the right replaces the look over your shoulder
questionTextTarget: Mototsikllarda orqa ko‘zgularni o‘rnatish va ulardan foydalanish bo‘yicha nima amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: Orqa ko‘zgulardan foydalanish uchun ular mustahkam o‘rnatilgan, to‘g‘ri sozlangan va ish holatida bo‘lishi, ya’ni yorilmagan yoki xiralashmagan bo‘lishi kerak.
answerATarget: Ular mustahkam o‘rnatilgan va to‘g‘ri sozlangan bo‘lishi kerak
answerBTarget: Ular yorilmagan va xiralashmagan bo‘lishi kerak
answerCTarget: O‘ng tomondagi ko‘zgu yelka oshirib qarashning o‘rnini bosadi

questionTextSource: What is required when the motor liability insurance of your vehicle has expired?
explanationSource: It is required to have an insurance for your vehicle, without one you are not allowed to drive it
answerASource: - may no longer be used in road traffic
answerBSource: - must be submitted to the technical test centre
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangizning fuqarolik javobgarligi sug‘urtasi muddati tugagan bo‘lsa, nima talab qilinadi?
explanationTarget: Transport vositangiz uchun sug‘urta bo‘lishi shart. Sug‘urtasiz uni yo‘l harakatida boshqarishga ruxsat berilmaydi.
answerBTarget: - texnik ko‘rik markaziga taqdim etilishi kerak

questionTextSource: What can prevent you from hearing warning signals?
explanationSource: Other sounds, such as a loud radio or a loud exhaust, can prevent car drivers from perceiving important warning signals. Also, the use of headphones usually limits the ability to hear. This often means that warning signals are ignored by drivers. Make sure that you can always hear warning signals.
answerASource: Having the radio on too loud
answerBSource: Using headphones
answerCSource: The exhaust being too loud
questionTextTarget: Ogohlantiruvchi signallarni eshitishingizga nima xalaqit berishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Baland radio yoki baland chiqindi ovozi kabi boshqa tovushlar muhim ogohlantiruvchi signallarni eshitishga xalaqit beradi. Quloqchinlardan foydalanish ham eshitish qobiliyatini odatda cheklaydi. Ogohlantiruvchi signallarni doimo eshita olishingizga ishonch hosil qiling.
answerCTarget: Chiqindi tizimi ovozining juda baland bo‘lishi

questionTextSource: You have sold your vehicle which is still registered. The buyer has paid. What must you do?
explanationSource: If you have sold your licensed vehicle and received the payment, proceed as follows: 1. You hand over all vehicle documents to the new vehicle owner in exchange for a confirmation of receipt. 2. You report the name and address of the vehicle buyer to the admission office. This way, you protect yourself from unjustified claims that could be caused by traffic violations on the part of the new owner. 3. The inspection plate remains on the vehicle.
answerASource: Inform the registration centre immediately of the buyer's name and address
answerBSource: Hand over the vehicle registration certificate (Fahrzeugschein) and vehicle registration book (Fahrzeugbrief) or permit for use (Betriebserlaubnis) to the buyer against receipt
answerCSource: Remove the test stamp from the official registration plate
questionTextTarget: Hali ro‘yxatdan chiqarilmagan transport vositangizni sotdingiz. Xaridor pulni to‘ladi. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Ro‘yxatdan chiqarilmagan transport vositasini sotib, pulni olganingizdan keyin barcha hujjatlarni xaridorga tilxat evaziga topshiring va ro‘yxatdan o‘tkazish organiga xaridorning ismi va manzilini darhol xabar qiling. Bu yangi egasining qoidabuzarliklari sabab nohaq talablarning oldini oladi. Texnik ko‘rik belgisi raqamda qoladi.
answerATarget: Xaridorning ismi va manzilini darhol ro‘yxatdan o‘tkazish markaziga xabar qilish
answerBTarget: Ro‘yxatdan o‘tkazish guvohnomasi va transport vositasi hujjatlarini xaridorga tilxat evaziga topshirish
answerCTarget: Rasmiy davlat raqamidan texnik ko‘rik belgisini olib tashlash

questionTextSource: What is important with regard to the official registration plates?
explanationSource: For license numbers, it is important that they are placed in the required place. In addition, they must be easy to read and illuminated in the dark.
answerASource: They must be securely attached at the appropriate places
answerBSource: They must always be easily legible
answerCSource: The rear registration plates must be lit up in darkness
questionTextTarget: Rasmiy davlat raqamlari bo‘yicha nima muhim?
explanationTarget: Davlat raqamlari belgilangan joylarga o‘rnatilgan bo‘lishi kerak. Ular doimo oson o‘qiladigan va qorong‘ida yoritilgan bo‘lishi shart.
answerATarget: Ular belgilangan joylarga mustahkam o‘rnatilgan bo‘lishi kerak
answerBTarget: Ular har doim oson o‘qiladigan bo‘lishi kerak
answerCTarget: Orqa davlat raqami qorong‘ida yoritilishi kerak

questionTextSource: What is required when your vehicle is no longer covered by motor liability insurance?
explanationSource: Without a valid liability insurance, a car is not ready to drive and therefore may not participate in public transport. The liability insurance serves to regulate damage that you may be able to inflict on other vehicles. Irrespective of the financial circumstances of the injuring party, compensation for the injured party is thus guaranteed. If there is no liability insurance, the holder must deregister the car at the admission office. Failure to comply with this rule will result in a penalty.
answerASource: - may no longer be used in road traffic
answerBSource: - must be de-registered at the registration centre
answerCSource: - must be submitted to the registration centre
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangizda fuqarolik javobgarligi sug‘urtasi endi amal qilmasa, nima talab qilinadi?
explanationTarget: Amal qiluvchi javobgarlik sug‘urtasisiz transport vositasi yo‘lga yaroqli hisoblanmaydi va jamoat yo‘l harakatida qatnasha olmaydi. Egasi transport vositasini ro‘yxatdan chiqarishi kerak. Bu qoidaga rioya qilinmasa, jazo qo‘llanadi.
answerBTarget: - ro‘yxatdan o‘tkazish markazida ro‘yxatdan chiqarilishi kerak
answerCTarget: - ro‘yxatdan o‘tkazish markaziga taqdim etilishi kerak

questionTextSource: What are you allowed to change on the official registration plate?
explanationSource: A license number is an official document, which may not be altered in any way. Therefore, do not attach any foils or stickers to your license plate.
answerASource: Nothing
answerBSource: Attach a protective foil for the lettering
answerCSource: Attach coloured stickers
questionTextTarget: Rasmiy davlat raqamida nimani o‘zgartirishga ruxsat beriladi?
explanationTarget: Davlat raqami rasmiy hujjat hisoblanadi va uni hech qanday tarzda o‘zgartirish mumkin emas. Shuning uchun raqamga plyonka yoki stiker yopishtirmang.
answerBTarget: Yozuvni himoya qilish uchun himoya plyonka yopishtirish

questionTextSource: As a cyclist, what must you check before commencing your journey?
explanationSource: Before starting your trip, make sure that your lights and tires are in good condition and work properly.
answerASource: Condition of tyres
answerBSource: Lighting
answerCSource: First-aid material
questionTextTarget: Velosipedchi sifatida safarni boshlashdan oldin nimani tekshirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Safarni boshlashdan oldin chiroqlar va shinalar yaxshi holatda ekaniga hamda to‘g‘ri ishlashiga ishonch hosil qiling.

questionTextSource: What do we mean by the term "blind spot"?
explanationSource: In blind spots you can not see other road users. Areas around the vehicle that can not be seen even with the vehicle mirrors, count as such. The other two answers are wrong.
answerASource: Areas around the vehicle not visible even with the vehicle's mirrors
answerBSource: Areas in inner cities not accessible to vehicles due to the restrictions on visibility
answerCSource: Areas of the roadway which cannot be driven over due to the wide turning circle of my vehicle
questionTextTarget: “Ko‘r nuqta” atamasi nimani anglatadi?
explanationTarget: Ko‘r nuqtada boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarini ko‘ra olmaysiz. Hatto transport vositasi ko‘zgulari bilan ham ko‘rinmaydigan atrofdagi hududlar shunday hisoblanadi.
answerATarget: Transport vositasi ko‘zgulari bilan ham ko‘rinmaydigan atrofdagi hududlar
answerBTarget: Ko‘rinish cheklovi sabab transport vositalari kira olmaydigan shahar hududlari
answerCTarget: Transport vositamning keng burilish radiusi sabab bosib o‘tib bo‘lmaydigan qatnov qismi hududlari

questionTextSource: While you are driving a car you get a call on your mobile phone. What must you be aware of here, if you do not have a hands-free set?
explanationSource: You must keep the cellphone ringing. Taking or holding the phone is generally prohibited for motorists and can lead to high fines. If necessary, stop at the nearest convenient location. First turn off the engine. Only now you are allowed to take your phone into your hands.
answerASource: The journey must be interrupted in order to use the telephone
answerBSource: The engine must be switched off in order to use the telephone
answerCSource: A mobile phone may not be used for more than 15 seconds while driving
questionTextTarget: Avtomobil haydayotganda mobil telefoningizga qo‘ng‘iroq keldi. Hands-free qurilmangiz bo‘lmasa, nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Telefonni qo‘lga olish yoki ushlab turish haydovchilar uchun taqiqlangan. Zarur bo‘lsa, yaqin mos joyda to‘xtang va avval dvigatelni o‘chiring. Faqat shundan keyin telefonni qo‘lga olishingiz mumkin.
answerATarget: Telefondan foydalanish uchun safarni to‘xtatish kerak
answerBTarget: Telefondan foydalanish uchun dvigatel o‘chirilgan bo‘lishi kerak
answerCTarget: Haydash vaqtida mobil telefondan 15 soniyadan ortiq foydalanish mumkin emas

questionTextSource: What can be the consequence of your passenger (pillion passenger) on the motorbike not wearing conspicuous clothing?
explanationSource: If your passenger does not wear highly visible clothes (conspicuous clothes), it will make you less visible for people driving behind you
answerASource: - more difficult to recognise for the following traffic
answerBSource: - more difficult to recognise for the traffic ahead
answerCSource: - more difficult to recognise for oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklda yo‘lovchingiz yorqin ko‘rinadigan kiyim kiymasa, oqibati qanday bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lovchi ko‘zga tashlanadigan kiyim kiymasa, siz ortdan kelayotgan transport uchun yomonroq ko‘rinasiz.
answerATarget: - ortdan kelayotgan transport uchun ko‘rish qiyinlashadi

questionTextSource: Why can motorcycles be overseen despite having their dipped headlights switched on?
explanationSource: Motorcycles are easy to miss because they are small and even more so if they are fast and wear clothes that are hard to see
answerASource: Because they are narrower than cars
answerBSource: Because if highly accelerated, motorcycles can approach extremely quickly
answerCSource: Because the persons onboard sometimes drive wearing inconspicuous clothing
questionTextTarget: Nega mototsikllar qisqa faralari yoqilgan bo‘lsa ham ko‘zdan qochirilishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Mototsikllar avtomobillarga qaraganda torroq bo‘lgani uchun ko‘zdan qochishi oson. Ular yuqori tezlanish bilan juda tez yaqinlashishi mumkin. Haydovchi yoki yo‘lovchi ko‘zga tashlanmaydigan kiyim kiysa, ko‘rinuvchanlik yanada yomonlashadi.
answerBTarget: Chunki kuchli tezlanganda mototsikllar juda tez yaqinlashishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Chunki undagi odamlar ba’zan ko‘zga tashlanmaydigan kiyimda yuradi

questionTextSource: What may be expected if you do not wear conspicuous protective motorcycle clothing when riding a motorbike?
explanationSource: If you do not wear highly visible clothes (conspicuous clothes), you will be less visible to other drivers, people on the road and will thus have a higher risk of accidents
answerASource: I am more difficult to see
answerBSource: I have an increased risk of having an accident
answerCSource: I may anticipate no negative effects
questionTextTarget: Mototsikl haydaganda ko‘zga tashlanadigan himoya kiyimi kiymasangiz, nimani kutishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Ko‘zga tashlanadigan kiyim kiymasangiz, boshqa haydovchilar va yo‘l ishtirokchilari sizni yomonroq ko‘radi. Shu sabab avariya xavfi ortadi.

questionTextSource: Why is it extremely advisable to wear protective motorcycle clothing during the journey?
explanationSource: Protective motorcycle clothes will protect you against injuries in case of an accident. It does not reduce aquaplaning nor protect the motorcycle.
answerASource: Injuries may be reduced in the event of a fall
answerBSource: Aquaplaning can be prevented during rainy conditions
answerCSource: In the event of accidents, the motorbike will be protected from damage
questionTextTarget: Nega safar vaqtida mototsikl himoya kiyimini kiyish juda tavsiya etiladi?
explanationTarget: Mototsikl himoya kiyimi avariya paytida jarohatlarni kamaytirishi mumkin. U akvaplaningni oldini olmaydi va mototsiklni himoya qilmaydi.

questionTextSource: What statements apply to the term "blind spot"?
explanationSource: In the blind spot you can not see by means of mirrors. Especially for bikers, this is particularly dangerous. The navigability of the Tropic has nothing to do with it and is wrong.
answerASource: - is particularly dangerous for cyclists
answerBSource: - is not visible even with mirrors
answerCSource: - cannot be driven over due to the turning circle
questionTextTarget: “Ko‘r nuqta” atamasi bo‘yicha qaysi bayonotlar to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Ko‘r nuqta ko‘zgular orqali ham ko‘rinmaydigan hududdir. Bu ayniqsa velosipedchilar uchun xavfli. Burilish radiusi bilan bog‘liq emas.
answerCTarget: - burilish radiusi sabab bosib o‘tib bo‘lmaydi

questionTextSource: What lighting is permissible so that you can be seen as early as possible in road traffic during day-light?
explanationSource: During the day in order to be visible you are permitted to use dipped headlights and daytime running lights
answerASource: Dipped headlights
answerBSource: Daytime running lights
answerCSource: Parking light
questionTextTarget: Kunduz kuni yo‘l harakatida imkon qadar erta ko‘rinishingiz uchun qaysi yoritishdan foydalanishga ruxsat beriladi?
explanationTarget: Kunduz kuni ko‘rinishingizni oshirish uchun qisqa faralar va kunduzgi harakat chiroqlaridan foydalanishga ruxsat beriladi.

questionTextSource: You want to exit a parking space and drive onto the road. What must you watch out for in particular?
explanationSource: You should also check on the vehicle especially to children playing. To the possible swiveling out of your vehicle and on the flow of traffic. All three are correct.
answerASource: For children playing around the vehicle
answerBSource: For moving traffic
answerCSource: For my vehicle swinging out sharply
questionTextTarget: Avtomobilni ishga tushirishdan oldin qanday tekshiruvlar kerak?
explanationTarget: Safarni boshlashdan oldin transport vositasining yo‘lga yaroqliligi, shinalar, yoritish, ko‘zgular va tormozlar kabi muhim qismlarini tekshirish kerak.

questionTextSource: Why is it risky to ride without protective motorcycle clothing?
explanationSource: Wearing protective motorcycle clothing will decrease the risk of injury in case of accident and will also protect you against the weather. In case of an accident insurance cover will be reduce if you do not wear protective clothing
answerASource: - an increased risk of injury
answerBSource: - less protection from weather conditions
answerCSource: - less insurance cover available should a damage event occur
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangizda qaysi hujjatlar bo‘lishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Haydovchi odatda haydovchilik guvohnomasi va ro‘yxatdan o‘tkazish guvohnomasi I-qismini yonida olib yurishi kerak.

questionTextSource: Why should you wear protective motorcycle clothing with a high-visibility colouring?
explanationSource: Wearing highly visible colours will make you easier to see and will thus reduce the risk of accidents
answerASource: Because it means others can see me better
answerBSource: Because it reduces the risk of an accident
answerCSource: Because it means I can still drive home if my lights fail
questionTextTarget: Avtomobilingizning texnik holati bo‘yicha nimaga javobgarsiz?
explanationTarget: Haydovchi transport vositasi yo‘lga yaroqli va xavfsiz holatda ekaniga javobgar. Nosozliklar bo‘lsa, safar boshlanmasligi yoki darhol ustaxonaga murojaat qilinishi kerak.

questionTextSource: As a motorcyclist what should you do to make yourself more visible to others during the daytime?
explanationSource: In order to be more visible and reduce the risk of accidents during the daytime, you should wear highly visible protective clothes and use either the dipped headlights or daytime running lights
answerASource: By wearing high-visibility protective motorcycle clothing
answerBSource: By driving with dipped headlight or daytime running lights switched on
answerCSource: By driving with the main beam light on
questionTextTarget: Shinalarda nimani tekshirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Shinalar yetarli protektor chuqurligiga, to‘g‘ri havo bosimiga va ko‘rinadigan shikastlanishlar yo‘qligiga tekshirilishi kerak.

questionTextSource: You want to make a right turn within a built-up area. What risks could arise here?
explanationSource: 3 answers are correct. There is both a danger straight run cyclist to miss, as well as pedestrians and compromising by too wide arc oncoming traffic.
answerASource: - fail to see cyclists travelling straight ahead
answerBSource: - fail to see pedestrians
answerCSource: - endangering oncoming traffic by following an excessively wide turning circle
questionTextTarget: Yoritish moslamalarida nimani tekshirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Barcha chiroqlar ishlayotganini va toza ekanini tekshirish kerak. Bu boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari sizni vaqtida ko‘rishi uchun muhim.

questionTextSource: As the vehicle owner, what change must you report to the relevant licensing authority?
explanationSource: If you change your name or place of residence, you must notify the vehicle licensing authority. However, you do not have to report the change in your liability insurance.
answerASource: - my home address
answerBSource: - my name
answerCSource: - my third-party insurance
questionTextTarget: Nega oynalar va ko‘zgular toza bo‘lishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Toza oynalar va ko‘zgular yetarli ko‘rinish hamda yo‘l harakatini to‘g‘ri kuzatishni ta’minlaydi.

questionTextSource: You are the new owner of a licensed vehicle. What do you have to do?
explanationSource: When replacing the owner, you do not need to carry out a general inspection. You must inform the vehicle licensing authority that the owner changed and provide them with a third-party liability insurance.
answerASource: - notify the licensing authority of the change in ownership
answerBSource: - present the licensing authority with proof of the existence of liability insurance for the vehicle
answerCSource: - generally arrange for a vehicle roadworthiness test to be performed at the time of the change of ownership
questionTextTarget: Qachon transport vositasini boshqarishdan voz kechishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar transport vositasining yo‘l xavfsizligiga ta’sir qiladigan jiddiy nosozliklari bo‘lsa, uni boshqarmaslik kerak.

questionTextSource: You should regularly check your helmet visor. Why should you replace it if it is scratched?
explanationSource: A badly scratched helmet visor will diminish your vision and will make light more intensely seen with the risk of dazzling
answerASource: Because I will otherwise be dazzled during hours of darkness
answerBSource: Because my vision will otherwise be restricted
answerCSource: Because my face should always be identifiable
questionTextTarget: Shinalar havo bosimi noto‘g‘ri bo‘lsa, qanday oqibat bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Noto‘g‘ri shina bosimi boshqaruvni yomonlashtiradi, shinalar yeyilishini oshiradi va yoqilg‘i sarfini ko‘paytirishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What should you anticipate if you fail to wear suitable protective motorbike clothing when riding a motorbike?
explanationSource: Wearing protective motorcycle clothing will decrease the risk of injury in case of accident and will also protect you against the weather. In case of accident insurance cover will be reduced if you do not wear protective clothing
answerASource: I am at greater risk of injury in the event of falling off the bike
answerBSource: I am not as well protected from the effects of weather conditions
answerCSource: I should anticipate that my insurance payments will be reduced in the event of an accident
questionTextTarget: Sovutish suyuqligi yoki moy darajasi past bo‘lsa, nima qilish kerak?
explanationTarget: Suyuqliklar darajasi yetarli bo‘lmasa, ishlab chiqaruvchi ko‘rsatmalariga muvofiq to‘ldirish yoki ustaxonaga murojaat qilish kerak.

questionTextSource: You want to use a navigation device mounted on your motorcycle. What should you observe?
explanationSource: In order to be able to concentrate fully on the journey, you should use your navigation system attached to the motorbike in a stationary position (enter destination), do not operate the device while driving if possible and use the voice output via a headset if available.
answerASource: - enter the destination while the motorcycle is stationary
answerBSource: - if possible, I should avoid operating the device while driving
answerCSource: - use the voice output function integrated into the headset
questionTextTarget: Yomg‘irli ob-havoda yaxshi ko‘rish uchun nimani tekshirish kerak?
explanationTarget: Yomg‘irda xavfsiz ko‘rish uchun oyna tozalagichlar ishlashi va yuvish suyuqligi yetarli bo‘lishi kerak.

questionTextSource: What should be included as suitable protective clothing for a motorcyclist?
explanationSource: The motorbike protective clothing consists of shoes, gloves, jacket, trousers and helmet.
answerASource: A closely fitting motorcycle jacket
answerBSource: Back protector
answerCSource: Low shoes
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklchi uchun mos himoya kiyimiga nimalar kirishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Mototsikl himoya kiyimiga poyabzal, qo‘lqop, kurtka, shim va dubulg‘a kiradi.

questionTextSource: Why should you wear suitable motorcycle boots when riding a motorcycle?
explanationSource: Foot may be injured if tipped over. Vehicle operation may be limited in poor weather conditions. Insurance may refuse to pay in the event of an accident.
answerASource: - serious foot injuries can occur if the motorcycle tips over while stationary
answerBSource: - any accident insurance claims may be reduced
answerCSource: - the operation of the vehicle can be restricted by weather conditions
questionTextTarget: Nega mototsikl haydaganda mos mototsikl etiklarini kiyish kerak?
explanationTarget: Mototsikl turgan joyida ag‘darilsa ham oyoq jarohatlanishi mumkin. Yomon ob-havo sharoitida transport vositasini boshqarish cheklanishi mumkin. Avariya holatida sug‘urta to‘lovlari kamaytirilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: - mototsikl turgan joyida ag‘darilsa ham jiddiy oyoq jarohatlari yuz berishi mumkin
answerBTarget: - avariya sug‘urtasi bo‘yicha talablar kamaytirilishi mumkin
answerCTarget: - ob-havo sharoiti transport vositasini boshqarishni cheklashi mumkin

questionTextSource: Why should you replace a scratched helmet visor?
explanationSource: You are strongly dazzled by other light and visibility is also limited.
answerASource: - restrict vision
answerBSource: - increase glare
answerCSource: - will cause the visor to become more misted up
questionTextTarget: Nega tirnalgan dubulg‘a vizorini almashtirish kerak?
explanationTarget: Tirnalgan vizor yorug‘likda kuchli ko‘zni qamashtiradi va ko‘rinishni cheklaydi.

questionTextSource: What must you do to protect yourself against head injuries?
explanationSource: The motorbike helmet protects you from head injuries, after an accident you must replace the helmet.
answerASource: - an appropriate, good fitting motorcycle helmet
answerBSource: - a well maintained motorcycle cap
answerCSource: - an officially inspected work safety helmet
questionTextTarget: O‘zingizni bosh jarohatlaridan himoya qilish uchun nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Mototsikl dubulg‘asi bosh jarohatlaridan himoya qiladi. Avariyadan keyin dubulg‘ani almashtirish kerak.
answerATarget: - mos va yaxshi o‘tiradigan mototsikl dubulg‘asi
answerCTarget: - rasmiy tekshiruvdan o‘tgan ish xavfsizligi dubulg‘asi

questionTextSource: How is it ensured that the rear-view mirror on the bike is working properly?
explanationSource: The rear-view mirror on the two-wheeler must be properly adjusted to the rider - so that he or she can observe all essential traffic. A damaged rearview mirror is not considered to be in proper working order. The rear-view mirror on a motorbike may protrude sideways over the end of the handlebars to provide better coverage of the necessary areas.
answerASource: - must be correctly adjusted
answerBSource: - may not be damaged
answerCSource: - may not extend laterally beyond the handlebars
questionTextTarget: Ikki g‘ildirakli transport vositasidagi orqa ko‘zgu to‘g‘ri ishlashini qanday ta’minlash mumkin?
explanationTarget: Orqa ko‘zgu haydovchiga moslab to‘g‘ri sozlangan bo‘lishi kerak, shunda u muhim harakatni kuzata oladi. Shikastlangan ko‘zgu yaroqli hisoblanmaydi. Mototsikl ko‘zgusi zarur hududlarni yaxshiroq ko‘rish uchun rul chetidan yon tomonga chiqib turishi mumkin.
answerCTarget: - ruldan yon tomonga chiqib turmasligi kerak

questionTextSource: When driving, what can cause you to miss warning signals?
explanationSource:
Noise that is too loud, such as listening to music that is too loud, can drown out the warning signal and cause you to react to it too late.
Distractions caused by talking on the phone can also mean that you hear warning signals too late or not at all.
answerASource: Listening to loud music
answerBSource: Becoming distracting during a telephone call
answerCSource: Driving at a low engine speed
questionTextTarget: Haydash paytida ogohlantiruvchi signallarni eshitmay qolishingizga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Juda baland musiqa kabi shovqinlar ogohlantiruvchi signallarni bosib ketishi va kech javob berishingizga olib kelishi mumkin. Telefonda gaplashish sabab chalg‘ish ham ogohlantiruvchi signallarni kech yoki umuman eshitmaslikka olib kelishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What is the benefit of wearing an integral helmet when riding a motorcycle?
explanationSource: A full-face helmet offers more protection than other helmet models, as full-face helmets are completely closed. The chin forms a whole with the helmet and cannot be pushed up, which means you are well protected against injuries. The complete face protection keeps wind, rain and insects away from your eyes. Your eyes are protected against wind and weather by the visor and your vision is not restricted by the weather.
answerASource: - injuries
answerBSource: - insects
answerCSource: - becoming wet
questionTextTarget: Mototsikl haydaganda integral dubulg‘a kiyishning foydasi nima?
explanationTarget: Integral dubulg‘a boshqa dubulg‘alarga qaraganda ko‘proq himoya beradi, chunki u butunlay yopiq bo‘ladi. U jarohatlardan, shamol, yomg‘ir va hasharotlardan himoya qiladi.

questionTextSource: What should you check on your two-wheeler before moving off?
explanationSource: You should check that the lights on your two-wheeler are working properly every time before you set off. It is also essential to check that the brakes are working before you set off.
answerASource: The proper functioning of the lights
answerBSource: The proper functioning of the brakes
answerCSource: The ignition timing setting
questionTextTarget: Ikki g‘ildirakli transport vositangizda yo‘lga chiqishdan oldin nimani tekshirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Har safar yo‘lga chiqishdan oldin chiroqlar va tormozlar to‘g‘ri ishlashini tekshirishingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: When riding a motorbike, what makes you more visible to other road users?
explanationSource: If you wear eye-catching clothing, for example a motorbike jacket in bright colours or a jacket that reflects light, you will be more visible to other road users.
answerASource: By wearing high-visibility clothing
answerBSource: By wearing clothing with retro-reflective details during hours of darkness
answerCSource: By driving with the main beam light on
questionTextTarget: Mototsikl haydaganda boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari sizni yaxshiroq ko‘rishi uchun nima yordam beradi?
explanationTarget: Yorqin rangli yoki yorug‘likni qaytaruvchi detallari bo‘lgan mototsikl kiyimi boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilari uchun ko‘rinuvchanlikni oshiradi.
answerBTarget: Qorong‘ida retroreflektorli detallari bo‘lgan kiyim kiyish

questionTextSource: What criterion do motorbike boots have to fulfil?
explanationSource:
Pay attention to the exact fit, the boots should fit snugly and reach over your ankles without restricting your freedom of movement.
You should also make sure that the boots have non-slip soles, which provide good grip on the footrests.
answerASource: - have an anti-slip sole
answerBSource: - extend over the ankle
answerCSource: - are loose-fitting
questionTextTarget: Mototsikl etiklari qanday mezonlarga javob berishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Etiklar oyoqqa yaxshi mos bo‘lishi, to‘piqdan yuqoriga chiqishi va harakat erkinligini cheklamasligi kerak. Sirpanmaydigan taglik oyoq tayanchlarida yaxshi ushlanish beradi.

questionTextSource: What criterion do motorbike gloves have to fulfil?
explanationSource:
The motorbike gloves should fit snugly but not be too tight. Your fingers should be slightly bent without the fabric stretching.
The gloves should give you a good grip so that you can operate the brake and clutch levers without any problems.
Choose motorbike gloves made of abrasion-resistant materials such as leather or special textiles in order to be better protected against abrasions and burns in the event of a fall or accident.
answerASource: - are close-fitting
answerBSource: - provide a good grip
answerCSource: - are made from abrasion-resistant material
questionTextTarget: Mototsikl qo‘lqoplari qanday mezonlarga javob berishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Mototsikl qo‘lqoplari jips, lekin juda siqmaydigan bo‘lishi kerak. Ular yaxshi ushlashni ta’minlashi va yiqilishda ishqalanish jarohatlaridan himoya qiladigan chidamli materialdan bo‘lishi kerak.

questionTextSource: You are riding a moped with a maximum design speed of 25 km/h. How do you need to protect yourself from head injuries?
explanationSource: Since the moped can travel over 20 km/h, you must wear a suitable motorcycle helmet to adequately protect your head at this speed in traffic.
answerASource: - must protect my head with a suitable and well-fitting motorcycle helmet
answerBSource: - must protect my head with a suitable and well-fitting bicycle helmet
answerCSource: - dot not have to protect my head when I’m travelling at walking speed
questionTextTarget: Konstruktiv maksimal tezligi 25 km/soat bo‘lgan moped haydayapsiz. Bosh jarohatlaridan qanday himoyalanishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Moped 20 km/soatdan tez yura olgani uchun yo‘l harakatida boshni yetarli himoya qilish uchun mos mototsikl dubulg‘asi kiyishingiz kerak.
answerATarget: - boshimni mos va yaxshi o‘tiradigan mototsikl dubulg‘asi bilan himoya qilishim kerak
answerBTarget: - boshimni mos va yaxshi o‘tiradigan velosiped dubulg‘asi bilan himoya qilishim kerak
answerCTarget: - piyoda tezligida yursam, boshimni himoya qilishim shart emas

questionTextSource: What should you bear in mind when buying a motorbike jacket and motorbike trousers?
explanationSource:
When purchasing motorcycle jackets and motorcycle pants, you should always pay attention to the safety standard markings so that you are adequately protected.
You should also make sure that the protectors sit exactly in the places they are intended for in order to protect you ideally in the event of a fall.
answerASource: The protectors must be in the right places
answerBSource: I pay attention to safety standard labelling
answerCSource: Protection class A offers the highest level of protection
questionTextTarget: Mototsikl kurtkasi va shimini sotib olayotganda nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Mototsikl kurtkasi va shimini sotib olayotganda yetarli himoya uchun xavfsizlik standarti belgilariga e’tibor bering. Himoyachilar kerakli joylarda aniq joylashishi kerak.
answerCTarget: A himoya klassi eng yuqori himoya darajasini beradi

questionTextSource: What must be remembered with regard to vehicles with canvass covers?
explanationSource: For vehicles with tarpaulin you must take care that the view to the back is not impaired. Especially with unloaded trailers with high tarpaulins there is a risk of crosswind.
answerASource: The canvass covers must not obstruct the driver's rear view through the outside mirrors
answerBSource: Unloaded trailers with high canvass cover superstructure are particularly sensitive to side wind
answerCSource: When vehicles have canvass covers, a load must not be specially secured
questionTextTarget: Brezent qoplamali transport vositalari bo‘yicha nimani yodda tutish kerak?
explanationTarget: Brezentli transport vositalarida orqa tomonni ko‘rish tashqi ko‘zgular orqali cheklanmasligi kerak. Ayniqsa baland brezentli bo‘sh tirkamalar yon shamolga sezgir bo‘ladi. Brezent yukni alohida mahkamlashni bekor qilmaydi.
answerATarget: Brezent qoplama haydovchining tashqi ko‘zgular orqali orqa ko‘rinishini to‘smasligi kerak
answerBTarget: Baland brezentli bo‘sh tirkamalar yon shamolga ayniqsa sezgir
answerCTarget: Brezent qoplama bo‘lsa, yukni alohida mahkamlash shart emas

questionTextSource: What must you adjust when driving a vehicle which is not your own?
explanationSource: In order to drive safely with a vehicle that's not your own, you must adjust the driver-specific equipment such as seat, seatbelt, headrest and mirror according to your requirements. You can reset the trip meter, but you do not have to.
answerASource: Seat, head rest, safety belt
answerBSource: Inside mirror, outside mirrors
answerCSource: Daily trip counter
questionTextTarget: O‘zingizniki bo‘lmagan transport vositasini haydaganda nimani sozlashingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Begona transport vositasini xavfsiz boshqarish uchun haydovchiga mos jihozlarni, masalan o‘rindiq, kamar, bosh suyanchig‘i va ko‘zgularni o‘zingizga moslab sozlashingiz kerak.

questionTextSource: How do you secure a car with a manual gearbox against rolling away on a downhill slope?
explanationSource: You can prevent a car with a manual transmission from rolling away by engaging a small gear, such as first gear or reverse gear. Use the parking brake and do not place the gearstick in the neutral position.
answerASource: Apply the parking brake
answerBSource: Engage first gear or reverse gear
answerCSource: Put the gear lever in neutral position
questionTextTarget: Mexanik uzatmali avtomobilni pastga qiyalikda dumalab ketishdan qanday xavfsizlaysiz?
explanationTarget: Mexanik uzatmali avtomobilni dumalab ketishdan himoya qilish uchun birinchi uzatma yoki orqa uzatmani ulang va parkovka tormozini torting. Uzatmani neytral holatga qo‘ymang.
answerBTarget: Birinchi uzatma yoki orqa uzatmani ulash

questionTextSource: How do you secure a car with automatic transmission against rolling away on a downhill slope?
explanationSource: You can secure a car with automatic transmission against rolling away by activating the parking brake and additionally bringing the selector lever into the parking position 'P'. You may not select the position 'N', as this is the same as idling in a vehicle with manual transmission.
answerASource: Apply the parking brake
answerBSource: Put the selector lever in the "P" position
answerCSource: Put the selector lever in the "N" position
questionTextTarget: Avtomatik uzatmali avtomobilni pastga qiyalikda dumalab ketishdan qanday xavfsizlaysiz?
explanationTarget: Avtomatik uzatmali avtomobilni dumalab ketishdan himoya qilish uchun parkovka tormozini torting va selektorni “P” parkovka holatiga qo‘ying. “N” holatini tanlamang.

questionTextSource: What must you do when reversing?
explanationSource: As a car driver, you are only allowed to drive backwards very slowly and with the utmost caution. When driving, look mainly to the back and in all other directions. You do not need to turn on the hazard warning light when reversing.
answerASource: Mainly look to the back; also check the traffic situation at the front and at the side
answerBSource: Drive with particular attention and slowly
answerCSource: Never drive without switching on the hazard warning lights
questionTextTarget: Orqaga yurayotganda nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Orqaga faqat juda sekin va eng yuqori ehtiyotkorlik bilan yurish mumkin. Asosan orqaga qarang, lekin old va yon tomondagi harakatni ham tekshiring. Orqaga yurishda avariya chiroqlarini yoqish shart emas.
answerATarget: Asosan orqaga qarash; old va yon tomondagi harakatni ham tekshirish
answerBTarget: Alohida e’tibor bilan va sekin yurish
answerCTarget: Avariya chiroqlarini yoqmasdan hech qachon yurmaslik

questionTextSource: What can interfere with your view?
explanationSource: Your vision may be impaired if the windowpane becomes dirty, if streaks form due to worn windscreen wipers, or if cargo obstructs your view.
answerASource: The load
answerBSource: Worn wiper blades (formation of streaks)
answerCSource: Smeared windows
questionTextTarget: Ko‘rinishingizga nima xalaqit berishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Ko‘rinish iflos oynalar, yeyilgan oyna tozalagichlar sabab chiziqlar paydo bo‘lishi yoki yuk ko‘rinishni to‘sishi orqali yomonlashishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Yeyilgan oyna tozalagichlar, chiziqlar paydo bo‘lishi

questionTextSource: A single axle caravan with overrun brake is parked on a downhill slope. How do you have to secure it to prevent it from rolling away?
explanationSource: In order to protect your caravan from rolling away, you must place the wheel chocks in front of the wheels and additionally secure the trailer with the parking brake.
answerASource: Apply the parking brake
answerBSource: Put wheel chocks in front of the wheels
answerCSource: Put one wheel chock in front and one behind the same wheel
questionTextTarget: Inersiya tormozli bir o‘qli karavan pastga qiyalikda turibdi. Uni dumalab ketishdan qanday xavfsizlashingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Karavanni dumalab ketishdan himoya qilish uchun g‘ildiraklar oldiga tagliklar qo‘yish va qo‘shimcha ravishda tirkamani parkovka tormozi bilan mahkamlash kerak.
answerCTarget: Bitta g‘ildirakning oldiga va orqasiga bittadan taglik qo‘yish

questionTextSource: You want to reverse. What must you ensure?
explanationSource: In order not to endanger others, you should be aware and let instruct you, if necessary, to the rear projecting load. Only the reversing camera is not enough.
answerASource: I must allow myself to be directed by someone if necessary
answerBSource: I have to be aware of the load projecting to the rear
answerCSource: It is enough for me to use a rear-view reversing camera
questionTextTarget: Orqaga yurmoqchisiz. Nimani ta’minlashingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Boshqalarga xavf tug‘dirmaslik uchun zarur bo‘lsa, kimdir sizni yo‘naltirsin va orqaga chiqib turgan yukni hisobga oling. Faqat orqa ko‘rish kamerasi yetarli emas.
answerATarget: Zarur bo‘lsa, kimdir meni yo‘naltirishi kerak
answerBTarget: Orqaga chiqib turgan yukni hisobga olishim kerak
answerCTarget: Faqat orqa ko‘rish kamerasidan foydalanishim yetarli

questionTextSource: You have attached equipment to your tractor. What do you have to do if you want to drive on public roads?
explanationSource: You have to inform to the working implement mounting your tractor through the respective requirements for the transport position and dangerous parts effectively disguise so you do not endanger others. Warning light not one of them.
answerASource: - familiarise myself with the relevant instructions on the transport position of the equipment
answerBSource: - effectively cover dangerous parts
answerCSource: - drive with my hazard lights switched on
questionTextTarget: Traktoringizga jihoz biriktirdingiz. Jamoat yo‘llarida yurmoqchi bo‘lsangiz, nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Jihozning transport holati bo‘yicha tegishli ko‘rsatmalar bilan tanishing va xavfli qismlarni samarali yoping. Avariya chiroqlarini yoqib yurish buning o‘rnini bosmaydi.
answerATarget: - jihozning transport holati bo‘yicha tegishli ko‘rsatmalar bilan tanishish

questionTextSource: You want to reverse your truck from a property lot onto a road. What must you do?
explanationSource: You have to when reverse erfoderlichenfalls instruct allow to rule out a risk to other road users. Pre Coming participants on the sidewalk also included.
answerASource: - have to allow myself to be directed by someone if necessary
answerBSource: - have to watch out for approaching road users on the footpath
answerCSource: - do not have to indicate
questionTextTarget: Yuk mashinangizni mulk hududidan yo‘lga orqaga yurib chiqarmoqchisiz. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga xavfni istisno qilish uchun zarur bo‘lsa, kimdir sizni yo‘naltirsin. Piyodalar yo‘lagida yaqinlashayotgan yo‘l ishtirokchilariga ham e’tibor bering.
answerATarget: - zarur bo‘lsa, kimdir meni yo‘naltirishi kerak
answerBTarget: - piyodalar yo‘lagida yaqinlashayotgan yo‘l ishtirokchilariga e’tibor berishim kerak

questionTextSource: Your vehicle is snowed under. What do you have to do before you drive off?
explanationSource: Before you drive, you must remove the ice from your vehicle, so as not to endanger other road users. Check all windows and mirrors as well as the roof.
answerASource: - remove ice and snow from the windows
answerBSource: - remove ice and snow from the mirrors
answerCSource: - remove ice and snow from the roof of the vehicle
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz qor bilan qoplangan. Yo‘lga chiqishdan oldin nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga xavf tug‘dirmaslik uchun transport vositasidan muz va qorni olib tashlashingiz kerak. Barcha oynalar, ko‘zgular va tomni tekshiring.
answerATarget: - oynalardan muz va qorni olib tashlash
answerBTarget: - ko‘zgulardan muz va qorni olib tashlash
answerCTarget: - transport vositasi tomidan muz va qorni olib tashlash

questionTextSource: Your vehicle is snowed under. What do you have to do before you drive off?
explanationSource: As a car driver, you must make sure before every journey that a risk to other road users is excluded. Therefore, you must also clear all windows and mirrors as well as the roof of ice and snow during the day. The engine must not be used to warm the car up.
answerASource: - remove ice and snow from the windows and mirrors
answerBSource: - remove ice and snow from the lighting systems including during daytime
answerCSource: - allow the engine to warm up
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz qor bilan qoplangan. Yo‘lga chiqishdan oldin nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Har safardan oldin boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga xavf tug‘dirmaslikka ishonch hosil qilishingiz kerak. Shuning uchun kunduz kuni ham barcha oynalar, ko‘zgular va yoritish tizimlarini muz va qordan tozalang. Dvigatelni avtomobilni isitish uchun ishlatib qo‘yish mumkin emas.
answerATarget: - oynalar va ko‘zgulardan muz va qorni olib tashlash
answerBTarget: - kunduz kuni ham yoritish tizimlaridan muz va qorni olib tashlash

questionTextSource: What should be observed when positioning the head rests in your car?
explanationSource: With correctly adjusted headrests the car driver reduces the force on the cervical spine in case of sudden vehicle movements. This makes headrests a direct protection device for the protection of the vehicle occupants in accidents. The headrests that can be adjusted electrically or manually in height and inclination should be adjusted so that the crown height of the head coincides with the top edge of the headrest. In order for their protective function to be fully effective, you should tilt the headrest so that your back of the head is no more than a few centimeters away from it.
answerASource: The top of the head should be level with the upper edge of the head rest
answerBSource: The spacing between the rear of the head and the head rests should be as small as possible
answerCSource: The upper edge of the head rest should conjoin with the upper neck vertebra
questionTextTarget: Avtomobildagi bosh suyanchiqlarini joylashtirishda nimaga e’tibor berish kerak?
explanationTarget: To‘g‘ri sozlangan bosh suyanchiqlari keskin harakatlarda bo‘yin umurtqasiga tushadigan kuchni kamaytiradi. Boshning tepasi bosh suyanchig‘ining yuqori cheti bilan bir balandlikda bo‘lishi va bosh orqasi bilan suyanchiq orasidagi masofa imkon qadar kichik bo‘lishi kerak.
answerATarget: Bosh tepasi bosh suyanchig‘ining yuqori cheti bilan bir balandlikda bo‘lishi kerak
answerBTarget: Bosh orqasi va bosh suyanchig‘i orasidagi masofa imkon qadar kichik bo‘lishi kerak
answerCTarget: Bosh suyanchig‘ining yuqori cheti yuqori bo‘yin umurtqasi bilan tutashishi kerak

questionTextSource: When should you refrain from using the telephone even if you have a hands-free device?
explanationSource: Despite the availability of a hands-free system, you are likely to become nervous and anxious during difficult conversations. You will pay more attention to the person you are talking to and concentrate less on the road. Distraction can cause you to miss something in traffic and not be able to react quickly enough. You should also avoid using your phone in difficult traffic situations.
answerASource: When the telephone conversations are stressful
answerBSource: In complicated traffic conditions
answerCSource: If this would distract me
questionTextTarget: Hands-free qurilmangiz bo‘lsa ham, qachon telefondan foydalanishdan voz kechishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Hands-free bo‘lsa ham, stressli suhbatlar yoki murakkab harakat sharoitlari diqqatni chalg‘itishi mumkin. Agar telefon sizni chalg‘itsa, undan foydalanmang.

questionTextSource: You want to use a smartphone mounted on your motor vehicle as a navigation device. What should you observe?
explanationSource: To protect yourself, you should enter your destination in the stationary vehicle and, if possible, not operate the device while driving. Use the device's voice output. So you are not distracted and can concentrate on the traffic.
answerASource: - enter the destination while the vehicle is stationary
answerBSource: - if possible, I should avoid operating the device while driving
answerCSource: - use the device's voice output function
questionTextTarget: Yuk ortilganda nimani moslashtirish kerak?
explanationTarget: Yuk ortilganda shinalar, fara sozlamasi va oyna tozalagichlar ishlashi kabi muhim narsalarni tekshirish kerak.

questionTextSource: You receive a telephone call while driving. What must you be aware of?
explanationSource: Phone use is prohibited if it distracts you too much from the traffic. This inevitably happens when picking up and looking at the display.
answerASource: - the telephone in not held in my hand for this purpose
answerBSource: - using the telephone only requires a momentary glance
answerCSource: - the telephone is not used for longer than 7 seconds here
questionTextTarget: Haydash vaqtida telefon qo‘ng‘irog‘i oldingiz. Nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Telefon sizni yo‘l harakatidan juda chalg‘itsa, undan foydalanish taqiqlanadi. Telefonni qo‘lga olish va displeyga qarash chalg‘itadi. Telefon qo‘lda ushlanmasligi kerak.
answerATarget: - telefon bu maqsadda qo‘lda ushlanmasligi kerak

questionTextSource: You are planning a long journey with your motor vehicle. Before commencing the journey, what should you check on the vehicle to avoid endangering yourself and others?
explanationSource:
You should check your tyres at regular intervals, because wear, damage or incorrectly adjusted air pressure as well as insufficient tread depth represent a major safety risk.
A minimum tread depth of 1.6 mm applies. 
The headlights should also be checked for defects and their correct setting. For example, headlights that are set too high can dazzle oncoming traffic. 
A clear view should be ensured on every journey. This includes not only ensuring that the windscreen is free of dirt, but also that there is still sufficient windscreen washer fluid.
answerASource: The tyres
answerBSource: The headlamp setting
answerCSource: That the windscreen wipers are working properly

questionTextSource: Your car is snowed in. What do you need to do before you start your journey?
explanationSource:
Before you drive off, you must remove the snow from the entire vehicle as it could fall while driving and endanger other road users. In addition, the snow could slide onto your windshield when you brake, blocking your visibility and making you completely unable to act.  Also remove the snow from the lighting equipment so that other road users can see you in good time and you have adequate visibility even in dark lighting conditions. 
Also make sure that no snow covers your license plates. If the license plates are illegible, you risk an administrative offense and a fine.
answerASource: - remove snow from number plate
answerBSource: - remove snow from the vehicle’s roof
answerCSource: - remove snow from the lighting equipment

questionTextSource: You come to a stop unexpectedly on a pedestrian crossing. What do you do?
explanationSource: To avoid danger for pedestrians, pedestrian crossings must be kept clear. Therefore, you need to clear the crossing as soon as possible. Drive forwards or backwards as far as the traffic conditions allow. Pay attention to other road users. Do not drive on the sidewalk. This is intended exclusively for pedestrians.

questionTextSource: How should you behave when you leave a construction site with your vehicle?
explanationSource: When leaving a construction site, it is important to clean the lighting equipment to ensure that you are clearly visible to other road users and that road safety is not compromised. Removing stones trapped between the twin tires prevents them from being thrown out while driving, causing damage to other vehicles or causing accidents. In addition, loaded bulk material must be adequately covered to prevent material from falling onto the road while driving and thus posing a danger to following traffic. These measures serve to protect all road users and help prevent pollution and hazards in road traffic.
answerASource: - clean the lighting equipment
answerBSource: - remove stones stuck between the twin tyres
answerCSource: - ensure that loaded bulk material is adequately covered

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: It can be seen that the accident scene has already been adequately secured. For this reason, you should not brake sharply as this is unnecessary in this situation. A strong deceleration would only increase the risk of further accidents (especially rear-end collisions), since subsequent motorists do not expect a braking maneuver. While driving, photographing the accident is prohibited.
answerASource: I continue driving as before
answerBSource: I brake hard immediately
answerCSource: I take a photograph of the scene of the accident
questionTextTarget: Bu vaziyatda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Avariya joyi allaqachon yetarlicha xavfsizlangan. Shuning uchun keskin tormoz berish kerak emas va bu ortdan urilish xavfini oshiradi. Haydash vaqtida avariya joyini suratga olish taqiqlanadi.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: On the right lane there was an accident and you drive towards the still unsecured accident site. Since the situation is not completely clear to you, you must reduce your speed. Drive as far to the left as possible to keep enough distance to the right-hand vehicles.
answerASource: I reduce my speed
answerBSource: I continue driving as far to the left as possible
answerCSource: I continue driving as before
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: O‘ng yo‘lakda avariya bo‘lgan va avariya joyi hali to‘liq xavfsizlanmagan. Vaziyat aniq bo‘lmagani uchun tezlikni kamaytiring va o‘ngdagi transport vositalaridan yetarli masofa saqlash uchun imkon qadar chaproqdan yuring.
answerBTarget: Imkon qadar chap tomondan yurishda davom etaman

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: In the event of an accident, you should always play it safe and increase the safe distance as well as reduce your speed in case someone runs into the lane.
answerASource: I reduce my speed further
answerBSource: I drive as far to the left as possible
answerCSource: I continue driving just as before
questionTextTarget: Hozir to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Avariya joyi yonidan o‘tayotganda ehtiyot chorasi sifatida tezlikni yanada kamaytiring va imkon qadar chaproqdan yuring, chunki kimdir yo‘lakka chiqib qolishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: Your vehicle has collided with a wild animal. What is the right course of action here?
explanationSource: After a deer accident, you should switch on the hazard warning lights, put on a high-visibility waistcoat and set up a warning triangle to secure the accident site. You should notify the police, describe your accident and give your exact location.
answerASource: I secure the scene of the accident
answerBSource: I notify the police
answerCSource: I load the animal into my vehicle
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz yovvoyi hayvon bilan to‘qnashdi. Bu yerda to‘g‘ri harakat qanday?

questionTextSource: Why should you always carry the European accident report form with you on your journey?
explanationSource: The European Accident Report should be carried at all times, because it makes it easier to record accidents with people involved in the accident who speak other languages, and it enables the accident to be recorded independently.
answerASource: - makes it easier to document the accident with foreign-speaking parties involved in the accident
answerBSource: - enables the parties involved to independently document the accident
answerCSource: - unambiguously clarifies the issue of liability at the scene of the accident
questionTextTarget: Nega safarda doimo Yevropa avariya bayonnomasi blankasini olib yurish kerak?
