explanationTarget: Velosiped himoya chizig‘ida doimiy yurish mumkin emas. Zarurat bo‘lsa, masalan qarama-qarshi transportdan qochish uchun, avtomobil u chiziqqa chiqishi mumkin. Biroq velosipedchilarga xavf tug‘dirmaslik shart.
answerATarget: - yo‘l vaziyatini diqqat bilan kuzatib, velosipedchilarga xavf yo‘qligiga ishonch hosil qilgach, velosiped himoya chizig‘ida yurishim mumkin
answerBTarget: - faqat yuk mashinasidan o‘tib olgunimcha velosiped himoya chizig‘ida yurishim mumkin
answerCTarget: - velosiped himoya chizig‘ida yurishim mumkin emas

questionTextSource: Which document allows you to park here?
explanationSource: You are allowed to park in the parking lot with this sign if you yourself have an EU parking permit for severely disabled people or if you are transporting a person with an EU parking permit for severely disabled people.
answerASource: My EU parking card for people with severe disabilities
answerBSource: The EU parking card of a severely disabled person whom I am transporting
answerCSource: My residential parking permit
questionTextTarget: Bu yerda qaysi hujjat parkovka qilishga ruxsat beradi?
explanationTarget: Bu belgi bor parkovka joyida o‘zingizda og‘ir nogironlar uchun Yevropa parkovka kartasi bo‘lsa yoki shunday kartaga ega og‘ir nogiron shaxsni tashiyotgan bo‘lsangiz, parkovka qilishingiz mumkin.
answerATarget: Og‘ir nogironlar uchun mening Yevropa parkovka kartam
answerBTarget: Men tashiyotgan og‘ir nogiron shaxsning Yevropa parkovka kartasi

questionTextSource: You need assistance on the autobahn. Which information does the arrow on the roadside marker give you?
explanationSource: Arrows on the reflector posts on the edge of a freeway point towards the nearest emergency services pillar. If you need help, follow the arrows to reach an emergency pillar as quickly as possible.
answerASource: Nearest emergency call telephone in the direction of the arrow
answerBSource: Nearest car park in the direction of the arrow
answerCSource: Next exit in the direction of the arrow
questionTextTarget: Avtomagistralda yordam kerak. Yo‘l cheti ustunchasidagi strelka sizga qanday ma’lumot beradi?
explanationTarget: Avtomagistral chetidagi reflektor ustunchalaridagi strelkalar eng yaqin favqulodda aloqa ustuni yo‘nalishini ko‘rsatadi.
answerATarget: Strelka yo‘nalishidagi eng yaqin favqulodda qo‘ng‘iroq telefoni
answerBTarget: Strelka yo‘nalishidagi eng yaqin parkovka joyi

questionTextSource: What can you do to avoid unnecessary noise?
explanationSource: To avoid unnececessary noise, avoid making high revolutions with your engine and do not modify either the intake/exhaust system. Removing fairings do not impact noise.
answerASource: Avoid high engine revolutions
answerBSource: Do not modify intake and exhaust systems
answerCSource: Remove the fairings
questionTextTarget: Keraksiz shovqindan qochish uchun nima qila olasiz?
explanationTarget: Keraksiz shovqindan qochish uchun dvigatelni yuqori aylanishlarda ishlatishdan saqlaning va kirish/chiqindi tizimini o‘zgartirmang.

questionTextSource: What can you do to avoid noise pollution?
explanationSource: To avoid above normal level of noise called noise pollution, do all of the above.
answerASource: Don't drive off with spinning wheels
answerBSource: Avoid "power sound" through loudspeakers
answerCSource: Push the vehicle on residential premises, if possible
questionTextTarget: Shovqin ifloslanishidan qanday qochish mumkin?
explanationTarget: G‘ildiraklarni aylantirib joyidan qo‘zg‘almang, karnay orqali “kuchli ovoz”dan saqlaning va turar joy hududlarida imkon bo‘lsa transport vositasini itaring.
answerCTarget: Turar joy hududlarida imkon bo‘lsa transport vositasini itarish

questionTextSource: How can you save fuel?
explanationSource: You as a car driver can save fuel when you are traveling with your vehicle at low speeds. You should shift as early as possible into a higher gear and switch back as late as possible to keep the engine speeds low.
answerASource: Change to a higher gear earlier
answerBSource: Change to a lower gear later
answerCSource: By driving frequently at high revolutions
questionTextTarget: Yoqilg‘ini qanday tejash mumkin?
explanationTarget: Past aylanishlarda yurish yoqilg‘ini tejaydi. Imkon qadar erta yuqori uzatmaga o‘ting va past uzatmaga imkon qadar kechroq qayting.

questionTextSource: How can noise be avoided?
explanationSource: Noise is generally generated by the running engine of a car. Driving at high speeds and strong acceleration contributes to increased noise. Stop the engine if you wait or park your vehicle somewhere for a longer amount of time.
answerASource: If possible, avoid strong acceleration
answerBSource: By switching off the engine if you have to wait or stop for a longer period
answerCSource: By driving at high revolutions
questionTextTarget: Shovqindan qanday qochish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Kuchli tezlanish va yuqori aylanishlarda haydash ko‘proq shovqin keltiradi. Uzoqroq kutish yoki to‘xtash kerak bo‘lsa, dvigatelni o‘chiring.
answerBTarget: Uzoqroq kutish yoki to‘xtash kerak bo‘lsa, dvigatelni o‘chirish

questionTextSource: How is avoidable noise caused?
explanationSource: Avoidable noise can be caused by driving with a defective exhaust system or by "playing" with the gas while standing. If a car driver honks because of a dangerous situation, this does not count as avoidable noise, but serves to avert danger.
answerASource: By driving with a defective exhaust
answerBSource: By "playing" with the accelerator when standing still
answerCSource: By sounding your horn when in danger
questionTextTarget: Qochish mumkin bo‘lgan shovqin qanday yuzaga keladi?
explanationTarget: Nosoz chiqindi tizimi bilan haydash yoki turgan joyda gaz pedalini o‘ynash qochish mumkin bo‘lgan shovqinga sabab bo‘ladi. Xavf holatida signal chalish esa xavfni oldini olish uchun xizmat qiladi.
answerATarget: Nosoz chiqindi tizimi bilan haydash orqali

questionTextSource: Why should you avoid driving off at a rapid pace?
explanationSource: Making a racing start is an additional noise pollution for other road users. You as a car driver damage your vehicle as well as the tires due to high wear and abrasion with a racing start. The environment is additionally burdened. On the other hand, the rear-wheel brake is no longer and not any less loaded when starting.
answerASource: Because the noise you cause annoys others
answerBSource: Because of heavier tyre wear
answerCSource: Because this is a great strain on the rear brake
questionTextTarget: Nega juda tez joyidan qo‘zg‘alishdan qochish kerak?
explanationTarget: Keskin start boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarini shovqin bilan bezovta qiladi, shinalarning tez yeyilishiga sabab bo‘ladi va atrof-muhitga qo‘shimcha yuk bo‘ladi. Orqa tormozga katta yuk tushishi asosiy sabab emas.
answerATarget: Chunki yuzaga keltirgan shovqiningiz boshqalarni bezovta qiladi
answerCTarget: Bu orqa tormozga katta yuk bo‘lgani uchun

questionTextSource: How can you avoid pollution of the environment and benefit your engine after a cold start?
explanationSource: If possible, do not allow your vehicle to warm up while you are stationary as this will damage the engine and the environment. If warming up is done at low engine speeds, you will help to protect both. The engine is only fully resilient after reaching the operating temperature (green area).
answerASource: Set off at low revolutions per minute without running the engine until it warms up
answerBSource: Do not accelerate, let the engine warm up while the vehicle is stationary
answerCSource: Accelerate several times when stationary so that a favourable operation temperature is quickly reached
questionTextTarget: Sovuq dvigatelni ishga tushirgandan keyin atrof-muhit ifloslanishini kamaytirish va dvigatelga foyda qilish uchun nima qilish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Transport vositasini turgan joyda isitib qo‘ymang. Past aylanishlarda yo‘lga chiqing. Dvigatel faqat ish haroratiga yetgandan keyin to‘liq yuklanishga tayyor bo‘ladi.
answerATarget: Dvigatelni isitib qo‘ymay, past aylanishlarda yo‘lga chiqish
answerBTarget: Tezlashmasdan, transport vositasi turgan joyda dvigatelni isitish
answerCTarget: Qulay ish haroratiga tez yetish uchun turgan joyda bir necha marta gaz berish

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are allowed to enter this environmental zone?
explanationSource: Motor vehicle drivers are only allowed to drive their vehicles into an environmental zone if the vehicle has a valid sticker visibly attached to it, which at least corresponds to the qualifying plate (red, yellow, green). Motorcycles and vehicles with special rights are excluded from this regulation.
answerASource: A car with a red emissions sticker
answerBSource: A motorcycle
answerCSource: A car which meets the requirements for a green sticker even if it does not have an emissions sticker
questionTextTarget: Bu ekologik hududga qaysi transport vositalari kirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Ekologik hududga faqat ko‘rinadigan joyga yopishtirilgan amal qiluvchi tegishli ekologik stikeri bo‘lgan transport vositalari kirishi mumkin. Mototsikllar va maxsus huquqli transport vositalari bundan mustasno.
answerCTarget: Yashil stiker talablariga javob beradigan, lekin stikeri yo‘q avtomobil

questionTextSource: What is caused by driving with winter tyres during the summer months?
explanationSource: Every car driver should know that winter tires are designed for use in cold and snowy streets. By using them in summer months, the driving stability decreases. Greater rubber abrasion and tire wear lead to increased fuel consumption.
answerASource: - the fuel consumption
answerBSource: - tyre wear
answerCSource: - driving stability
questionTextTarget: Yoz oylarida qishki shinalar bilan haydash nimaga olib keladi?
explanationTarget: Qishki shinalar sovuq va qorli yo‘llar uchun mo‘ljallangan. Yozda ulardan foydalanish haydash barqarorligini kamaytiradi, rezina yeyilishini va yoqilg‘i sarfini oshiradi.

questionTextSource: What motor vehicles may enter an environment zone that has this sign?
explanationSource: The additional sign shows which motor vehicles with which sticker may enter. Motorbikes may enter in any case.
answerASource: Motor vehicles with a green particulate emissions sticker
answerBSource: Motorcycles
answerCSource: Motor vehicles that meet the requirements for a green particulate emissions sticker, even if no such sticker is attached
questionTextTarget: Bu belgi bor ekologik hududga qaysi motorli transport vositalari kirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Qo‘shimcha belgi qaysi stikerga ega transport vositalari kirishi mumkinligini ko‘rsatadi. Mototsikllar har qanday holatda kirishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Yashil mayda zarracha chiqindi stikeri bo‘lgan motorli transport vositalari
answerCTarget: Yashil stiker talablariga javob beradigan, lekin bunday stiker yopishtirilmagan motorli transport vositalari

questionTextSource: You want to wash your car. Where should you do this in the interests of environmental protection?
explanationSource: You should always wash your vehicle in a car wash. There, the wastewater is disposed of by the operators in an environmentally friendly manner. On the other hand, if you wash your vehicle on the road or in a parking lot, the water gets into the ground untreated.
answerASource: At a carwash
answerBSource: In a carpark
answerCSource: On an open road
questionTextTarget: Avtomobilingizni yuvmoqchisiz. Atrof-muhitni himoya qilish nuqtayi nazaridan buni qayerda qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Avtomobilni avtoyuvishda yuvish kerak. U yerda oqava suv ekologik tarzda utilizatsiya qilinadi. Yo‘lda yoki parkovkada yuvilsa, suv tozalanmasdan yerga singadi.

questionTextSource: What increases the fuel consumption of your vehicle considerably?
explanationSource: Turning on the seat heating or air conditioning of your vehicle consumes a lot of energy and increases the fuel consumption of your car significantly. Navigation devices require relatively little power compared to these devices.
answerASource: - heated seats
answerBSource: - the air-conditioning
answerCSource: - the navigation device
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangizning yoqilg‘i sarfini nima sezilarli oshiradi?
explanationTarget: O‘rindiq isitilishi va konditsioner ko‘p energiya sarflaydi va yoqilg‘i sarfini oshiradi. Navigatsiya qurilmasi ularga nisbatan kam quvvat talab qiladi.

questionTextSource: What can reduce the fuel consumption of a commercial vehicle?
explanationSource: A reduction can cause all three answers. The use of louvers on the vehicle, the driver & predictive operation, even the use of special tires.
answerASource: Fitting air cowls to the vehicle
answerBSource: The farsighted driving style of the driver
answerCSource: The use of special tyres
questionTextTarget: Tijorat transport vositasining yoqilg‘i sarfini nima kamaytirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Aerodinamik qoplamalar, haydovchining oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydashi va maxsus shinalardan foydalanish yoqilg‘i sarfini kamaytirishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Transport vositasiga havo yo‘naltiruvchi qoplamalar o‘rnatish
answerBTarget: Haydovchining oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydash uslubi

questionTextSource: What are the effects of driving at high speed in motor vehicles with combustion engines?
explanationSource: Be aware that fast, high-speed driving results in high fuel consumption and high exhaust emissions. This also leads to more noise and to a not lower noise level.
answerASource: Fuel consumption increases
answerBSource: The emission of harmful substances increases
answerCSource: The noise level is reduced
questionTextTarget: Ichki yonuv dvigatelli motorli transport vositalarida yuqori tezlikda haydash qanday ta’sir qiladi?
explanationTarget: Yuqori tezlikda haydash yoqilg‘i sarfini, zararli moddalar chiqishini va shovqinni oshiradi.

questionTextSource: When riding a motorcycle, what can you do to avoid unnecessary noise?
explanationSource:
Improper exhaust systems lead to higher noise pollution. 
Uneven driving, such as frequent braking and then accelerating hard again, leads to unnecessary noise.
High-speed starting leads to unnecessary noise.
answerASource: By only using permissible exhaust systems
answerBSource: By driving off at high speed
answerCSource: By adopting an uneven driving style
questionTextTarget: Mototsikl haydaganda keraksiz shovqindan qochish uchun nima qila olasiz?
explanationTarget: Faqat ruxsat etilgan chiqindi tizimlaridan foydalaning. Keskin start va notekis, tez-tez tormozlab-yana kuchli tezlanadigan haydash uslubi keraksiz shovqin keltiradi.
answerATarget: Faqat ruxsat etilgan chiqindi tizimlaridan foydalanish orqali

questionTextSource: Why is an environmentally considerate driving style also beneficial for road safety?
explanationSource: Alternative fuels can also be used to drive fast. However, you will be driving in an environmentally friendly way if you avoid high speeds, if you drive with foresight and thus avoid, for example, braking hard and starting again.
answerASource: - driving in a far-sighted manner
answerBSource: - avoiding high speeds
answerCSource: - that with alternative fuels it is only possible to drive slowly
questionTextTarget: Nega ekologik haydash uslubi yo‘l xavfsizligi uchun ham foydali?
explanationTarget: Ekologik haydash yuqori tezliklardan saqlanish va oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydashni anglatadi. Bu keskin tormozlash va qayta tezlanishni kamaytiradi hamda xavfsizlikni oshiradi.
answerCTarget: - muqobil yoqilg‘ilar bilan faqat sekin haydash mumkinligi

questionTextSource: What must you know about catalytic converters?
explanationSource: Vehicles with a catalytic converter should not be towed away. As a result, unburned fuel can flow into the catalytic converter and lead to damage or destruction of the catalyst. If the engine of the vehicle does not start even after several start attempts, the same consequences can occur.
answerASource: A catalytic converter can be damaged or destroyed when the car is towed to start
answerBSource: A catalytic converter can be damaged when the engine starts after many unsuccessful attempts
answerCSource: Unburned fuel in the catalytic converter cannot cause any damage when the engine starts
questionTextTarget: Katalizatorlar haqida nimani bilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Katalizatorli avtomobilni tortib yurgizish zarar yetkazishi mumkin, chunki yonmagan yoqilg‘i katalizatorga kirib, uni shikastlashi yoki yo‘q qilishi mumkin. Ko‘p muvaffaqiyatsiz ishga tushirish urinishlaridan keyin ham shunday bo‘lishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Avtomobilni tortib ishga tushirganda katalizator shikastlanishi yoki ishdan chiqishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Ko‘p muvaffaqiyatsiz urinishlardan keyin dvigatel ishga tushsa, katalizator shikastlanishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Dvigatel ishga tushganda katalizatordagi yonmagan yoqilg‘i hech qanday zarar yetkazmaydi

questionTextSource: Tyre wear is a burden to the environment. What can extend tyre life?
explanationSource: The wear of tires is the lowest when the tires are used as intended. Winter tires that are used in summer wear faster due to their material properties (rubber compound). Even with too little air pressure tires wear faster. Starting with high-speed and squealing tires wears tires due to increased abrasion.
answerASource: Avoiding high speeds
answerBSource: Observing the tyre pressure indicated in the owner's manual
answerCSource: Using winter tyres (M+S) in the summer
questionTextTarget: Shina yeyilishi atrof-muhitga yuk bo‘ladi. Shina xizmat muddatini nima uzaytirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Shinalar maqsadga muvofiq ishlatilsa, kamroq yeyiladi. Yozda qishki shinalar tezroq yeyiladi. Havo bosimi juda past bo‘lsa ham shina tezroq yeyiladi. Yuqori tezlikda va shinalarni chiyillatib start qilish yeyilishni oshiradi.
answerBTarget: Foydalanish qo‘llanmasida ko‘rsatilgan shina bosimiga rioya qilish

questionTextSource: How can you save fuel when driving a motor vehicle with automatic transmission?
explanationSource: Avoid the kick-down. The high-speed acceleration gear causes increased fuel consumption. For overtaking or merging on the freeway, however, it can be useful. With P, Parking, a vehicle with automatic transmission cannot be driven. Changing gears early to a higher gear also saves fuel.
answerASource: By not using the "kick down" facility, if possible
answerBSource: When driving in town traffic, always keep the selector lever in the lowest gear
answerCSource: By driving in gear "P", if possible
questionTextTarget: Avtomatik uzatmali motorli transport vositasida haydaganda yoqilg‘ini qanday tejash mumkin?
explanationTarget: Imkon qadar kick-down funksiyasidan foydalanmang, chunki u yoqilg‘i sarfini oshiradi. Past uzatmada shahar ichida doimiy yurish yoki “P” holatida yurish mumkin emas.
answerBTarget: Shahar harakatida selektorni doimo eng past uzatmada saqlash orqali

questionTextSource: How can you keep the burden on the environment low?
explanationSource: In order to relieve the environment, you should form carpools with others as a car driver. The environment is particularly burdened by the number of moving vehicles. In addition, you should avoid a concentrated accumulation of several vehicles such as traffic jams.
answerASource: By forming car pools
answerBSource: By avoiding peak traffic periods
answerCSource: By avoiding roads with frequent traffic jams
questionTextTarget: Atrof-muhitga yukni qanday kamaytirish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Atrof-muhitni yengillashtirish uchun birgalikda avtomobilda yurish guruhlarini tashkil qiling, tig‘iz vaqtlar va tez-tez tirband bo‘ladigan yo‘llardan qoching.
answerATarget: Avtomobilni birga ishlatish guruhlarini tuzish orqali
answerCTarget: Tez-tez tirband bo‘ladigan yo‘llardan qochish orqali

questionTextSource: What results in increased fuel consumption of your car?
explanationSource: Increased fuel consumption can be expected if, for example, you install roof or ski racks or if you load your vehicle with unnecessary objects. Increased tire pressure, on the other hand, does not matter for fuel consumption, even if it should be avoided altogether.
answerASource: A roof rack or ski rack
answerBSource: Transporting unnecessary objects
answerCSource: Excessive tyre pressure
questionTextTarget: Avtomobilingizda yoqilg‘i sarfi oshishiga nima olib keladi?
explanationTarget: Tom yoki chang‘i tashuvchi moslamalar hamda keraksiz buyumlarni tashish yoqilg‘i sarfini oshiradi. Ortiqcha shina bosimi ham tavsiya etilmaydi, lekin bu yerda sarfni oshiruvchi asosiy omil emas.

questionTextSource: How can you save fuel?
explanationSource: Additional load and additional attachments such as roof racks or ski holders increase fuel consumption: when not in use, remove them. You save fuel when driving low-speed: shift up the gear early. Turning off the air conditioning system saves fuel, as does maintaining tire pressure according to the manufacturer's specifications. Because too little tire pressure increases the rolling resistance.
answerASource: By observing at least the tyre pressure indicated in the owner's manual
answerBSource: By removing roof racks or ski racks
answerCSource: Avoid driving in top gear
questionTextTarget: Yoqilg‘ini qanday tejash mumkin?
explanationTarget: Qo‘shimcha yuk va tom tashuvchi moslamalar yoqilg‘i sarfini oshiradi; kerak bo‘lmasa olib tashlang. Yuqori uzatmaga erta o‘tish, konditsionerni o‘chirish va ishlab chiqaruvchi ko‘rsatgan shina bosimini saqlash ham yoqilg‘ini tejaydi.
answerATarget: Foydalanish qo‘llanmasida ko‘rsatilgan shina bosimiga kamida rioya qilish orqali
answerBTarget: Tom yoki chang‘i tashuvchi moslamalarni olib tashlash orqali

questionTextSource: What should you avoid for reasons of environmental protection?
explanationSource: After starting the engine, you as a car driver should start immediately in a low-speed driving style. Warming up the engine while stationary is not permitted. Driving at high speeds, extending gears and switching late, wastes fuel. Unnecessary driving causes avoidable exhaust emissions.
answerASource: Letting the engine warm up when the vehicle is stationary
answerBSource: Unnecessary trips
answerCSource: Loud music with windows opened
questionTextTarget: Atrof-muhitni himoya qilish sababli nimadan qochishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Dvigatelni ishga tushirgandan keyin darhol past aylanishlarda yo‘lga chiqing. Turgan joyda dvigatelni isitish taqiqlangan. Yuqori tezlik va keraksiz safarlar yoqilg‘i va chiqindilarni oshiradi.
answerATarget: Transport vositasi turgan joyda dvigatelni isitish

questionTextSource: Which conduct shows awareness of the environment?
explanationSource: Avoid driving around aimlessly. Private transport pollutes the environment. Make carpools as often as you can. If possible, use public transport. If you are stuck in a traffic jam, do not run the engine unnecessarily, turn it off.
answerASource: Changing to public transport at collective parking areas ("P + R")
answerBSource: The formation of car pools
answerCSource: Switching off the engine in a traffic jam
questionTextTarget: Qaysi xatti-harakat ekologik ongni ko‘rsatadi?
explanationTarget: Maqsadsiz haydashdan qoching, imkon bo‘lsa jamoat transportidan foydalaning, avtomobilni birga ishlating va tirbandlikda dvigatelni keraksiz ishlatib qo‘ymang.
answerATarget: Jamoaviy parkovka joylarida jamoat transportiga o‘tish (“P + R”)

questionTextSource: How can you reduce noise?
explanationSource: Driving in the high-speed range causes more noise than a low-speed driving style. In built-up areas you should drive in the highest possible gear, so that the engine causes the least possible noise. Avoid a high-speed start with squeaky tires.
answerASource: By driving in 4th or 5th gear in built-up areas
answerBSource: By driving at high engine revolutions
answerCSource: By driving at high speed
questionTextTarget: Shovqinni qanday kamaytirish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yuqori aylanishlarda haydash past aylanishdagi haydashga qaraganda ko‘proq shovqin keltiradi. Aholi yashash hududlarida imkon qadar yuqori uzatmada yuring, shunda dvigatel eng kam shovqin chiqaradi. Shinalarni chiyillatib, keskin start qilishdan saqlaning.
answerATarget: Aholi yashash hududlarida 4- yoki 5-uzatmada yurish orqali

questionTextSource: What does "power sound" in the car result in?
explanationSource: "Power sound" in the car causes over-stimulation. This over-stimulation may distract the car driver so that he/she may miss important other signals. Bear in mind that other road users are also bothered by the noise.
answerASource: Signals from other traffic - in particular sirens - are not heard
answerBSource: There is noise pollution for others even when the windows are closed
answerCSource: Driving errors due to the driver being diverted
questionTextTarget: Avtomobildagi “power sound” nimaga olib keladi?
explanationTarget: Avtomobildagi baland “power sound” ortiqcha qo‘zg‘alish va chalg‘ishga sabab bo‘ladi. Natijada haydovchi muhim signallarni eshitmay qolishi va haydash xatolari qilishi mumkin. Shovqin boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarini ham bezovta qiladi.
answerATarget: Boshqa transport signallari, ayniqsa sirenalar eshitilmaydi
answerBTarget: Oynalar yopiq bo‘lsa ham boshqalarga shovqinli bezovtalik bo‘ladi
answerCTarget: Haydovchi chalg‘igani sabab haydash xatolari yuz beradi

questionTextSource: By which percentage does the fuel consumption (l/100 km) of a middle-class car driving at 160 km/h in general increase compared to driving at the recommended speed of 130 km/h?
explanationSource: Compared to driving at the advisory speed limit of 130 km/h, the fuel consumption at a speed of 160 km/h usually increases very much. For example, the consumption of a mid-range car can rise by up to 35%.
answerASource: By up to 35 %
answerBSource: By up to 5 %
answerCSource: By up to 10 %
questionTextTarget: O‘rta sinf avtomobil 160 km/soat tezlikda yurganda, 130 km/soat tavsiya etilgan tezlikka nisbatan yoqilg‘i sarfi odatda necha foizga oshadi?
explanationTarget: 130 km/soat tavsiya etilgan tezlikka nisbatan 160 km/soatda yoqilg‘i sarfi sezilarli oshadi. O‘rta sinf avtomobilda sarf 35 % gacha ko‘payishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: When are you allowed to enter an environmental zone?
explanationSource: You may only drive into an environmental zone as a car driver if a valid badge is visibly attached to your vehicle that at least corresponds to the qualifying plate (red, yellow, green). Excluded from this rule are exclusively vehicles with special rights, for example historic motor vehicles.
answerASource: When your vehicle has a corresponding emissions sticker
answerBSource: When your vehicle enjoys special rights
answerCSource: When you have a low-emission vehicle
questionTextTarget: Ekologik hududga qachon kirishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Ekologik hududga faqat transport vositasida talab qilingan rangga mos amal qiluvchi ekologik stiker ko‘rinadigan joyda yopishtirilgan bo‘lsa kirish mumkin. Maxsus huquqli transport vositalari bundan mustasno.
answerATarget: Transport vositamda tegishli chiqindi stikeri bo‘lsa
answerBTarget: Transport vositam maxsus huquqlarga ega bo‘lsa

questionTextSource: Where do you have to place the emissions sticker for identifying lowemission vehicles?
explanationSource: As a car driver, you must ensure that the carbon emission sticker is affixed to the inside of the windshield of your vehicle so that it clearly identifies your low-emission vehicle.
answerASource: Clearly visible on the inside of the windscreen
answerBSource: Clearly visible on the outside of the windscreen
answerCSource: Clearly visible on the inside of the rear window
questionTextTarget: Kam chiqindili transport vositalarini belgilovchi ekologik stikerni qayerga yopishtirish kerak?
explanationTarget: Ekologik stiker old oynaning ichki tomoniga aniq ko‘rinadigan qilib yopishtirilishi kerak.
answerATarget: Old oynaning ichki tomoniga aniq ko‘rinadigan qilib
answerBTarget: Old oynaning tashqi tomoniga aniq ko‘rinadigan qilib
answerCTarget: Orqa oynaning ichki tomoniga aniq ko‘rinadigan qilib

questionTextSource: If your car has a petrol engine but does not have an emissions sticker, are you allowed to enter an environmental zone which is sign-posted as follows?
explanationSource: Without visibly attached carbon emission sticker, motor vehicle drivers are not allowed to drive into an environmental zone with a gasoline engine. The badge on the vehicle must be valid and correspond at least to the qualifying plate (red, yellow, green).
answerASource: No, because my car does not have an emissions sticker
answerBSource: Yes, because I am driving a car with catalytic converter with lambda control
answerCSource: Yes, because this prohibition only applies to diesel vehicles
questionTextTarget: Avtomobilingiz benzin dvigatelli, lekin ekologik stikeri yo‘q. Quyidagicha belgilangan ekologik hududga kirishingiz mumkinmi?
explanationTarget: Ko‘rinadigan joyga yopishtirilgan amal qiluvchi ekologik stikeri bo‘lmasa, benzin dvigatelli avtomobil bilan ham ekologik hududga kirish mumkin emas.
answerATarget: Yo‘q, chunki avtomobilimda ekologik stiker yo‘q
answerBTarget: Ha, chunki lambda boshqaruvli katalizatorli avtomobilni boshqaryapman
answerCTarget: Ha, chunki bu taqiq faqat dizel transport vositalariga taalluqli

questionTextSource: Where can you stow your baggage so that you do not increase your fuel consumption unnecessarily?
explanationSource: If possible, you should only store the luggage in the trunk of your vehicle. The use of a roof rack to carry luggage results in greatly increased aerodynamic drag, often resulting in a significant increase in fuel consumption.
answerASource: In the boot
answerBSource: Behind the front seats
answerCSource: On the roof-rack
questionTextTarget: Yoqilg‘i sarfini keraksiz oshirmaslik uchun bagajni qayerga joylashtirish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Bagajni imkon qadar avtomobil bagajxonasida joylashtirish kerak. Tom tashuvchi moslamadan foydalanish havo qarshiligini sezilarli oshiradi va yoqilg‘i sarfini ko‘paytiradi.

questionTextSource: Tyre wear negatively impacts the environment. How can you reduce this impact?
explanationSource: To reduce tyre wear (i.e. the wear on the tyres), you can drive with foresight and significantly minimise the load by regularly checking the tyre pressure in accordance with the manufacturer's specifications. Less wear = less load.
answerASource: By employing an anticipatory driving style
answerBSource: By regularly checking the tyre inflation pressure in accordance with the manufacturer's guidelines
answerCSource: By using winter tyres in summer
questionTextTarget: Shina yeyilishi atrof-muhitga salbiy ta’sir qiladi. Bu ta’sirni qanday kamaytirish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydash va ishlab chiqaruvchi ko‘rsatmalariga muvofiq shina bosimini muntazam tekshirish shina yeyilishini kamaytiradi.
answerATarget: Oldindan ko‘ra bilib haydash uslubi orqali
answerBTarget: Ishlab chiqaruvchi ko‘rsatmasiga muvofiq shina bosimini muntazam tekshirish orqali

questionTextSource: What can contribute to environmentally-friendly driving?
explanationSource: If possible, carpool to reduce the number of vehicles on the road. Training can help you to adopt a fuel-efficient driving style. Electric vehicles do not emit any pollutants, so they are particularly environmentally friendly when driving.
answerASource: Attending a practical driving training session for a fuel-efficient driving style
answerBSource: Using vehicles with an electric drive
answerCSource: Forming car pools
questionTextTarget: Ekologik haydashga nima hissa qo‘shishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Birga avtomobilda yurish yo‘ldagi transport vositalari sonini kamaytiradi. Amaliy trening yoqilg‘i tejamkor haydashni o‘rgatadi. Elektr yuritmali transport vositalari haydash paytida zararli chiqindi chiqarmaydi.
answerATarget: Yoqilg‘i tejamkor haydash bo‘yicha amaliy treningda qatnashish

questionTextSource: How can you save fuel if you drive a car with an automatic gearbox?
explanationSource: Unnecessary acceleration leads to high fuel consumption. Drive in eco mode if available. The car adapts its acceleration behaviour to reduce fuel consumption.
answerASource: Do not press down hard on the accelerator when moving off
answerBSource: Use the eco mode when driving
answerCSource: Switch off the engine when driving down a gradient
questionTextTarget: Avtomatik uzatmali avtomobil haydasangiz, yoqilg‘ini qanday tejashingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Keraksiz kuchli tezlanish yoqilg‘i sarfini oshiradi. Eco rejim mavjud bo‘lsa, undan foydalaning: avtomobil tezlanish xatti-harakatini sarfni kamaytirishga moslashtiradi.
answerATarget: Joyidan qo‘zg‘alayotganda gaz pedalini qattiq bosmaslik

questionTextSource: What cars that are driven within designated environmental zones must display a particulate matter sticker?
explanationSource: In principle, all cars in a designated environmental zone are subject to the obligation to display a fine dust sticker. Work machines, ambulances, etc. are exempt.
answerASource: - petrol engines
answerBSource: - diesel engines
answerCSource: - electric motors
questionTextTarget: Belgilangan ekologik hududlarda harakatlanadigan qaysi avtomobillarda mayda zarracha stikeri bo‘lishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Asosan belgilangan ekologik hududlarda barcha avtomobillar ekologik stikerga ega bo‘lishi kerak. Ayrim ish mashinalari yoki tez yordam transportlari bundan mustasno bo‘lishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What can result from listening to very loud music while driving a car?
explanationSource:
Too loud music can cause warning signals and the like of other road users to be overheard. Too loud music can also annoy, disturb and thus endanger other road users.
The driver's ability to react deteriorates due to the loud music and the resulting reduced ability to concentrate.
answerASource: The driver fails to detect signals from other traffic
answerBSource: It causes a nuisance to other road users
answerCSource: The driver’s responsiveness is enhanced
questionTextTarget: Avtomobil haydayotganda juda baland musiqa tinglash nimaga olib kelishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Juda baland musiqa ogohlantiruvchi signallarni eshitmay qolishga olib keladi, boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilarini bezovta qiladi va haydovchining diqqatini hamda reaksiyasini yomonlashtiradi.
answerATarget: Haydovchi boshqa transport signallarini payqamay qoladi

questionTextSource: Air resistance affects the fuel consumption of a vehicle. What affects air resistance the most?
explanationSource:
The faster you drive, the greater the air resistance acting on your vehicle. Doubling your speed results in 4 times the air resistance. 
The tread depth of the tyres has a major effect on the rolling resistance of the tyres.
The number of passengers does not directly affect the air resistance.
answerASource: The speed travelled
answerBSource: The number of passengers
answerCSource: The profile depth of the tyres
questionTextTarget: Havo qarshiligi transport vositasining yoqilg‘i sarfiga ta’sir qiladi. Havo qarshiligiga eng ko‘p nima ta’sir qiladi?
explanationTarget: Tezlik oshgani sari transport vositasiga ta’sir qiladigan havo qarshiligi ham oshadi. Tezlik ikki baravar oshsa, havo qarshiligi to‘rt baravar oshadi.

questionTextSource: You have to wait because a rail-crossing barrier is lowered. How can you now help protect the environment at this point?
explanationSource: By using the automatic start-stop system, the vehicle can be switched off while waiting and immediately switched on again with little effort. This minimises the emission of pollutants. Applying the handbrake has no effect on the vehicle's pollutant emissions.
answerASource: By using the automatic start-stop system
answerBSource: By putting the vehicle in first gear
answerCSource: By activating the parking brake
questionTextTarget: Temir yo‘l kesishmasi shlagbaumi tushgani uchun kutishingiz kerak. Bu yerda atrof-muhitni qanday himoya qilishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Avtomatik start-stop tizimidan foydalanish kutish paytida dvigatelni o‘chiradi va zararli chiqindilarni kamaytiradi. Parkovka tormozini tortish chiqindilarga ta’sir qilmaydi.
answerBTarget: Transport vositasini birinchi uzatmaga qo‘yish orqali

questionTextSource: What increases the range of an electric vehicle?
explanationSource: If you only brake slightly, the electric motor brakes and the kinetic energy is recovered. If you brake harder, you will be mechanically braked and the kinetic energy will not be recovered. Due to a high recuperation level, an electric car behaves like a combustion engine, so you may have to brake less strongly, i.e. mechanically. The heating in the electric car is fed directly from the battery and thus consumes energy that could also be used for driving.
answerASource: Using a high energy recovery (recuperation) level
answerBSource: Reducing the heater temperature
answerCSource: Short, sharp acceleration
questionTextTarget: Elektr transport vositasining yurish masofasini nima oshiradi?
explanationTarget: Yuqori rekuperatsiya darajasi tormozlash paytida energiyani batareyaga qaytaradi. Isitgich haroratini pasaytirish ham batareya energiyasini tejaydi.

questionTextSource: What is the benefit of recuperation in an electric vehicle?
explanationSource: Recuperation means "recovery". Just as electrical energy was converted into kinetic energy, braking converts the kinetic energy back into electrical energy, which is then fed back into the battery. This increases the range of the electric vehicle.
answerASource: - increases range
answerBSource: - conserves the service brake system
answerCSource: - means that energy can be recovered from the braking operation
questionTextTarget: Elektr transport vositasida rekuperatsiyaning foydasi nima?
explanationTarget: Rekuperatsiya tormozlash paytida kinetik energiyani elektr energiyasiga aylantirib, batareyaga qaytaradi. Bu yurish masofasini oshiradi va xizmat tormoz tizimini asraydi.

questionTextSource: Your car is equipped with an automatic start-stop system. What is the environmental protection benefit from using this vehicle system?
explanationSource:
The automatic start-stop system automatically switches off the engine when you come to a standstill and restarts it as soon as you press one of the pedals. 
By switching off the engine, for example at traffic lights, the automatic start-stop system can reduce noise pollution and also save up to 15% fuel.
answerASource: - fuel consumption
answerBSource: - noise pollution
answerCSource: - tyre wear
questionTextTarget: Avtomobilingiz avtomatik start-stop tizimi bilan jihozlangan. Bu tizimdan foydalanishning ekologik foydasi nima?
explanationTarget: Avtomatik start-stop tizimi to‘xtaganda dvigatelni o‘chiradi va pedal bosilganda qayta ishga tushiradi. Bu, masalan svetoforda, yoqilg‘i sarfi va shovqinni kamaytiradi.

questionTextSource: You are driving a car with a plug-in hybrid drive system. How can you optimise fuel consumption?
explanationSource:
By driving proactively - with gentle acceleration and timely braking - you can reduce your vehicle's fuel consumption. The electric motor is often used in this driving style. 
You can also reduce fuel consumption by regularly charging the battery of your plug-in hybrid on the power grid or minimize it by driving purely electrically.
answerASource: I regularly charge the battery using the mains supply
answerBSource: I use the electric drive through my driving style
answerCSource: I only use the recuperation to charge the battery
questionTextTarget: Plug-in hybrid yuritmali avtomobil haydayapsiz. Yoqilg‘i sarfini qanday optimallashtirish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Batareyani tarmoqdan muntazam zaryadlang va haydash uslubingiz orqali elektr yuritmadan ko‘proq foydalaning. Faqat rekuperatsiya batareyani yetarli darajada zaryadlash uchun yetarli emas.
answerBTarget: Haydash uslubim orqali elektr yuritmadan foydalanaman
answerCTarget: Batareyani zaryadlash uchun faqat rekuperatsiyadan foydalanaman

questionTextSource: How can you avoid unnecessary noise?
explanationSource: Unnecessary noise you avoid by properly storing or use of the tension chains and by the renewing of knocked-out tailgate hinges or closures as they can rattle loudly.
answerASource: By replacing worn sideboard hinges or fastenings
answerBSource: Through correct stowing or use of chains
answerCSource: By greatly increasing the tyre pressure of an empty vehicle
questionTextTarget: Keraksiz shovqindan qanday qochish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Tortish zanjirlarini to‘g‘ri joylashtirish yoki ulardan to‘g‘ri foydalanish va yeyilgan bort ilgaklari yoki qulflarini almashtirish keraksiz shovqinni kamaytiradi.
answerATarget: Yeyilgan bort ilgaklari yoki mahkamlagichlarini almashtirish orqali
answerBTarget: Zanjirlarni to‘g‘ri joylashtirish yoki ulardan to‘g‘ri foydalanish orqali
answerCTarget: Bo‘sh transport vositasining shina bosimini juda oshirish orqali

questionTextSource: What can cause noise pollution?
explanationSource: 3 answers are correct. Loose or worn out tailgate hinges and unsecured load, but also loose tension chains.
answerASource: Loose chains
answerBSource: Loose or worn sideboard hinges
answerCSource: Unsecured load
questionTextTarget: Shovqin ifloslanishiga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Bo‘sh zanjirlar, bo‘sh yoki yeyilgan bort ilgaklari va mahkamlanmagan yuk shovqin ifloslanishiga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: How can you avoid noise in built-up areas, in particular with empty vehicles?
explanationSource: In town you can avoid particularly poor road with your empty vehicle noise by inappropriate speed.
answerASource: By adapting your speed, particularly on a bad road surface
answerBSource: By driving at high speed in a low gear
answerCSource: By changing gear frequently with double-clutching
questionTextTarget: Aholi yashash hududlarida, ayniqsa bo‘sh transport vositalari bilan, shovqindan qanday qochish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yomon yo‘l qoplamasida tezlikni moslashtirish orqali bo‘sh transport vositasining shovqinini kamaytirish mumkin.
answerATarget: Tezlikni, ayniqsa yomon yo‘l qoplamasida, moslashtirish orqali
answerBTarget: Past uzatmada yuqori tezlikda haydash orqali
answerCTarget: Ikki marta ilashma bilan tez-tez uzatma almashtirish orqali

questionTextSource: Which motor vehicles are allowed to use a road with this sign?
explanationSource: This road leads in an environmental zone. All buses with a corresponding emissions sticker and all trucks with a corresponding sticker are allowed to drive here. Not all cars have this plaque, so are "all car" wrong.
answerASource: Any lorry with a corresponding emissions sticker
answerBSource: Any bus with a corresponding emissions sticker
answerCSource: Any car
questionTextTarget: Bu belgi bor yo‘ldan qaysi motorli transport vositalari foydalanishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Bu yo‘l ekologik hududga olib boradi. Tegishli ekologik stikeri bo‘lgan avtobuslar va yuk mashinalari kirishi mumkin. Har qanday avtomobil deyish noto‘g‘ri, chunki hamma avtomobilda kerakli stiker bo‘lmaydi.
answerATarget: Tegishli chiqindi stikeri bo‘lgan har qanday yuk mashinasi
answerBTarget: Tegishli chiqindi stikeri bo‘lgan har qanday avtobus

questionTextSource: How can you avoid creating noise?
explanationSource: Noise you can prevent this by you as possible befüllst empty compressed air tanks from a stationary plant and if you exchange worn out lift closures.
answerASource: - filling empty compressed air tanks from a stationary facility, if possible
answerBSource: - replacing worn-out side latches
answerCSource: - allowing the engine to idle during longer waiting times
questionTextTarget: Shovqin paydo bo‘lishidan qanday qochish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Bo‘sh siqilgan havo baklarini imkon bo‘lsa statsionar qurilmadan to‘ldiring va yeyilgan yon qulflarni almashtiring. Uzoq kutishda dvigatelni bekor ishlatish shovqinni kamaytirmaydi.
answerATarget: - bo‘sh siqilgan havo baklarini imkon bo‘lsa statsionar qurilmadan to‘ldirish
answerCTarget: - uzoq kutish vaqtida dvigatelni bekor ishlatish

questionTextSource: When planning your journeys, how can you make them environmentally-friendlier?
explanationSource: For the sake of the environment, motorists should refrain from all trips that are not absolutely necessary. Therefore, plan your trips well and make carpools as often as possible to avoid unnecessary trips. Another positive contribution to active environmental protection is the use of public transport.
answerASource: - combining several destinations into one single trip
answerBSource: - forming car pools with other vehicle users
answerCSource: - planning to use public transport instead of my own vehicle
questionTextTarget: Safarlaringizni rejalashtirganda ularni qanday ekologikroq qilish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Keraksiz safarlardan qoching, bir nechta manzilni bitta safarga birlashtiring, avtomobilni boshqalar bilan birga ishlating va imkon bo‘lsa jamoat transportidan foydalaning.
answerATarget: - bir nechta manzilni bitta safarga birlashtirish
answerBTarget: - boshqa transport vositasi foydalanuvchilari bilan avtomobilni birga ishlatish
answerCTarget: - o‘z transport vositam o‘rniga jamoat transportidan foydalanishni rejalashtirish

questionTextSource: How do you drive down a descending gradient safely?
explanationSource: On a down grade, use the engine brake by shifting down to a lower gear. This relieves the service brakes. Under no circumstances change to idle! Because idling puts the engine brake out of action, thus the service brakes could overheat. In addition, the brake booster cannot work when the ignition is switched off. This considerably lengthens the braking distance.
answerASource: - select a gear in which I am not required to brake a great deal
answerBSource: - drive in neutral
answerCSource: - switch the ignition off
questionTextTarget: Pastga qiyalikdan qanday xavfsiz tushasiz?
explanationTarget: Pastga qiyalikda dvigatel tormozidan foydalanish uchun mos uzatmani tanlang. Neytralda yurish yoki o‘t oldirishni o‘chirish xavfli, chunki tormoz kuchaytirgichi ishlamasligi va tormozlar qizib ketishi mumkin.
answerATarget: - ko‘p tormozlash talab qilmaydigan uzatmani tanlash

questionTextSource: What motor vehicles are permitted to enter an environment zone without a fine-particle badge?
explanationSource: All two- and three-wheeled motor vehicles and agricultural and forestry tractors may enter an environmental zone without the carbon emission sticker. They are exempt from the restrictions of the environmental zone. The installation of a catalytic converter does not exempt you as a car driver from the obligation to obtain an environmental badge.
answerASource: All two and three-wheeled motor vehicles
answerBSource: All agricultural and forestry tractors
answerCSource: All motor vehicles with a catalytic converter
questionTextTarget: Qaysi motorli transport vositalari ekologik hududga mayda zarracha stikeri bo‘lmasdan kirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Barcha ikki va uch g‘ildirakli motorli transport vositalari hamda qishloq va o‘rmon xo‘jaligi traktorlari ekologik stikersiz ekologik hududga kirishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Barcha ikki va uch g‘ildirakli motorli transport vositalari
answerBTarget: Barcha qishloq va o‘rmon xo‘jaligi traktorlari
answerCTarget: Katalizatori bor barcha motorli transport vositalari

questionTextSource: What manufacturer specifications will allow you to know if your motor vehicle is environmentally-friendly?
explanationSource: The emission class provides information about the emission of pollutants. The emission classes defined by the standard and/or the law subdivide products that emit exhaust emissions or interference signals. In the automotive sector, moreover, the following applies: The lower the fuel consumption, the higher the efficiency class and thus the environmental friendliness of the vehicle.
answerASource: - about the fuel consumption
answerBSource: - about the efficiency category
answerCSource: - about the emissions class
questionTextTarget: Motorli transport vositangiz ekologik ekanini qaysi ishlab chiqaruvchi ma’lumotlaridan bilishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yoqilg‘i sarfi, samaradorlik toifasi va chiqindi sinfi transport vositasining ekologikligi haqida ma’lumot beradi.

questionTextSource: Why are short journeys performed with a cold engine especially damaging to the environment?
explanationSource: Short trips with a cold engine usually consume more fuel than driving with a motor in operating temperature. That's why they are particularly harmful to the environment. In addition, the friction is greater in short-distance driving with a cold engine. This leads to a higher material wear.
answerASource: - more fuel is consumed
answerBSource: - the level of material wear is higher
answerCSource: - the vehicle's battery will be over-charged
questionTextTarget: Nega sovuq dvigatel bilan qisqa safarlar atrof-muhitga ayniqsa zararli?
explanationTarget: Sovuq dvigatel bilan qisqa masofada yoqilg‘i sarfi ko‘proq bo‘ladi. Bundan tashqari, ishqalanish yuqori bo‘lib, materiallar ko‘proq yeyiladi.

questionTextSource: What causes avoidable noise?
explanationSource: All noise disturbances arising during normal operation of a vehicle are considered unavoidable. As a car driver, you should avoid any excess noise, for example, honking as a greeting or closing the doors very loudly. A roof rack will not cause you any avoidable noise.
answerASource: By sounding the horn as a greeting
answerBSource: By firmly slamming doors shut
answerCSource: By driving with a roof-rack
questionTextTarget: Qochish mumkin bo‘lgan shovqinga nima sabab bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: Xavf bo‘lmasa signalni salomlashish uchun chalish yoki eshiklarni qattiq yopish qochish mumkin bo‘lgan shovqindir. Tom tashuvchi moslama bunday shovqinga sabab bo‘lmaydi.

questionTextSource: How does the eco-roll mode in commercial vehicles contribute to the reduction of fuel consumption?
explanationSource: Because the kinetic energy of the vehicle is maximally utilized in eco-roll mode is the right answer. This has to do with the automatic neutral position of the transmission. The rolling phase will not be shortened and the engine braking effect is not increased.
answerASource: - vehicle's kinetic energy is utilised to its maximum
answerBSource: - engine braking effect is increased
answerCSource: - vehicle's roll phase is reduced
questionTextTarget: Tijorat transport vositalarida eco-roll rejimi yoqilg‘i sarfini kamaytirishga qanday hissa qo‘shadi?
explanationTarget: Eco-roll rejimida transport vositasining kinetik energiyasi maksimal darajada ishlatiladi. Bu uzatmaning avtomatik neytral holatiga bog‘liq. Dvigatel tormozi oshmaydi va dumalash fazasi qisqarmaydi.
answerATarget: - transport vositasining kinetik energiyasi maksimal darajada ishlatiladi

questionTextSource: When must motorcycles be submitted for official inspection (Hauptuntersuchung)?
explanationSource: Similarly to cars, motorcycles should be inspected every two years
answerASource: Every two years
answerBSource: Every three years
answerCSource: Every time they are re-registered
questionTextTarget: Mototsikllar qachon rasmiy texnik ko‘rikka (Hauptuntersuchung) taqdim etilishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Avtomobillar kabi mototsikllar ham har ikki yilda texnik ko‘rikdan o‘tishi kerak.

questionTextSource: How can you tell when you need to bring your vehicle in for its next vehicle roadworthiness test?
explanationSource: The date for the next main inspection of your vehicle can be found in the certificate of registration part 1. In addition, the appointment is clearly visible on the inspection plate printed on your license plate.
answerASource: By looking at the inspection tag on the rear license plate

questionTextSource: A technical modification to your vehicle means that the operating licence is extinguished. What consequences should you anticipate if you nevertheless use the vehicle on public roads?
explanationSource: If you use your vehicle on public roads despite the expired operating license, you will lose your insurance cover because the vehicle is no longer the one that was originally insured. Since there is an obligation to have insurance in Germany, driving without insurance is a misdemeanor. In the event of a police check, a fine will be imposed and you must expect an entry in the register of fitness to drive.

answerBSource: An entry into the Central Register of Road Traffic Offenders
answerCSource: The loss of my insurance cover

questionTextSource: What technical modifications to a two-wheeler could result in the withdrawal of the vehicle’s type approval?
explanationSource:
The operating licence expires if modifications are made to the vehicle that change the vehicle type, could cause a hazard or worsen the exhaust or noise values.
The operating licence of your two-wheeler may lose its validity if, for example, you install special handlebars or use a wheel/tyre combination that is not explicitly approved for your two-wheeler. Two-wheeler is approved.

questionTextSource: You are holding a driving permit class B. Your car has the following specifications: - empty mass 1900 kg - permissible total mass 2400 kg - permissible towed load 1500 kg Which trailer are you allowed to tow?

questionTextSource: You are driving a lorry in commercial freight transport. What do you have to be able to prove on request?
explanationSource:
As a truck driver in commercial freight transport, you must have the following documents with you:
        1. Documentation for transport: According to Section 7 Paragraph 1 No. 3 of the Road Haulage Act (GüKG), a transport document must be carried that contains information about the goods being transported, the sender and the recipient.
        2. Valid professional driver qualification: According to the Professional Driver Qualification Act (BKrFQG), you must provide evidence of appropriate qualifications, for example by entering the key number “95” on your driving license.
        3. Valid liability insurance for damage to goods: According to Section 7a GüKG, proof of liability insurance for damage to goods is required to cover liability for transported goods.

Carrying these documents is required by law and serves to ensure orderly and safe road transport.
answerASource: The documentation for transport
answerBSource: A valid professional driver qualification
answerCSource: A valid cargo liability insurance policy

The brake brake is only activated when the trailer on the towing vehicle. If you drive uphill, this may not be the case when braking, depending on how strong you brake.

questionTextSource: What can affect the driving stability of a towed trailer?
explanationSource:
The load of a trailer should be distributed so that the center of gravity is as close as possible to the axle of the trailer. This ensures optimal driving stability and controllability of the trailer.
A load center of gravity that is far back can have a serious impact on the driving stability of your trailer. This can cause the trailer to sway more easily during sudden steering movements or at higher speeds, increasing the risk of an accident.
If the tire pressure on your trailer is too low, it can affect the driving stability of your trailer. On the one hand, low tire pressure leads to poorer road grip, which makes your trailer more uncontrollable when cornering. On the other hand, low tire pressure leads to increased tire wear, which increases the risk of tire damage while driving.
A shock absorber that is already leaking can also have a negative impact on the driving stability of your trailer. The leaking shock absorber on your trailer loses its damping properties, which can lead to unstable driving behavior and dangerous situations that are difficult to control.
answerASource: A centre of gravity that is far back in the trailer
answerBSource: Insufficient tyre pressure in the trailer tyres
answerCSource: A leaking shock absorber

questionTextSource: A single-axle trailer has an actual gross weight of 600 kg. What is the minimum possible vertical load?
explanationSource: The bearing load is the mass that rests on the coupling device of the towing vehicle. To determine it, the car driver can place a piece of wood or a pipe underneath the coupling point of the trailer and place a bathroom scale underneath. The bearing load is displayed. The minimum load to be carried by the towing vehicle shall not be less than 4% of the trailer's total weight for trailers with a gross vehicle weight of not more than 3.5 tons. However, a minimum load of 25 kg is sufficient. In this example, the minimum support load is 24 kg. When loading the trailer, you, as a car driver, must be careful not to undercut or exceed the minimum and maximum permitted load. By shifting the load, you can influence the bearing load.
questionTextTarget: Bir o‘qli tirkamaning haqiqiy umumiy og‘irligi 600 kg. Eng kam vertikal yuklama qancha bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Eng kam vertikal yuklama tirkama umumiy og‘irligining 4 % ini tashkil qiladi, ammo kamida 25 kg yetarli bo‘lishi mumkin. 600 kg ning 4 % i 24 kg.

Time spent by the driver in the passenger seat is also a break from driving.

questionTextSource: What applies to the operation of vehicles with regard to the height of the vehicle, including the height of the load?

You must find out about your exact vehicle height in the registration restriction part 1, the so-called vehicle registration document. In this way, you prevent dangerous situations on road sections with limited height and violations of the permissible overall height. 
If the load extends beyond the outline of the vehicle, you will need to determine the actual height of your vehicle with the load in question. This way you can ensure that the permitted total height is not exceeded.

explanationSource:
You calculate the total permissible towed mass using the following data:
Maximum authorised mass of the towing vehicle plus the maximum authorised mass of the trailer minus the drawbar load of the trailer, if this is greater than the maximum authorised drawbar load of the towing vehicle.

answerBSource: Writing a text message

questionTextSource: Your motorcycle is fully loaded. How do you drive down a long mountain pass road?
explanationSource: When driving down over a long period of time, your brakes are at risk to overheat. To avoid this, try to use the braking effect of the engine on a low gear and limit the acceleration/deceleration in between turns.
answerASource: Utilize the braking effect of the engine by changing to a lower gear
answerBSource: Do not drive too fast between bends in order to avoid overheating the brakes
answerCSource: Use the front wheel brake only
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklingiz to‘liq yuklangan. Uzoq tog‘ dovoni yo‘lidan pastga qanday tushasiz?
explanationTarget: Uzoq pastlikda tormozlar qizib ketishi mumkin. Buning oldini olish uchun past uzatmada dvigatel tormozidan foydalaning va burilishlar orasida ortiqcha tezlashmang.
answerATarget: Past uzatmaga o‘tib, dvigatel tormozidan foydalanish
answerBTarget: Tormozlar qizib ketmasligi uchun burilishlar orasida juda tez yurmaslik

questionTextSource: When is there a danger of the motorcycle's front wheel lifting off the road?
explanationSource: Fast and sudden accelerations could lead to the front wheel lifting off the road. This could happen when accelerating on low gear or releasing the clutch suddenly when starting to drive
answerASource: On rapid acceleration in low gear
answerBSource: If the clutch is suddenly released on starting off
answerCSource: When the handbrake is pulled on hard
questionTextTarget: Qachon mototsiklning old g‘ildiragi yo‘ldan ko‘tarilishi xavfi bor?
explanationTarget: Past uzatmada keskin tezlashish yoki joyidan qo‘zg‘alishda muftani birdan qo‘yib yuborish old g‘ildirakning ko‘tarilishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Joyidan qo‘zg‘alishda mufta birdan qo‘yib yuborilganda

questionTextSource: You have changed the motorcycle. For the first time, you are driving a motorcycle with fairings. What is different?
explanationSource: Fairings do not decrease the danger of falling. However, it increases the sensitivity to the side wind but diminishes the front wind which creates a tendency to drive faster
answerASource: As the wind pressure is reduced, there is a tendency to drive faster
answerBSource: Sensitivity to side wind increases
answerCSource: The danger of falling has decreased
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklni o‘zgartirdingiz. Birinchi marta qoplamali mototsikl haydayapsiz. Nima o‘zgaradi?
explanationTarget: Qoplama yiqilish xavfini kamaytirmaydi. U old shamol bosimini kamaytirgani uchun tezroq haydashga moyillik paydo bo‘lishi mumkin, lekin yon shamolga sezgirlik ortadi.
answerATarget: Shamol bosimi kamaygani uchun tezroq haydashga moyillik paydo bo‘ladi

questionTextSource: What must you particularly remember when carrying side-mounted cases or bags?
explanationSource: Adding luggage to your motorcycle will impact its behavior on the road. Make sure you do not exceed the maximum speed recommended by your manufacturer for driving with luggage and that you distribute weight evenly (on the right and left) to keep your motorcycle stable
answerASource: To avoid an uneven distribution of weight
answerBSource: Not to exceed the top speed recommended by the manufacturer of the motorcycle
answerCSource: With a full load, apply the rear brakes only
questionTextTarget: Yon tomonga o‘rnatilgan koffr yoki sumkalar bilan yurganda nimani ayniqsa yodda tutish kerak?
explanationTarget: Mototsiklda bagaj haydash xususiyatlariga ta’sir qiladi. Og‘irlikni o‘ng va chap tomonga teng taqsimlang va ishlab chiqaruvchi tavsiya qilgan maksimal tezlikdan oshmang.
answerBTarget: Mototsikl ishlab chiqaruvchisi tavsiya qilgan maksimal tezlikdan oshmaslik
answerCTarget: To‘liq yuk bilan faqat orqa tormozdan foydalanish

questionTextSource: What happens if you engage too low a gear and quickly release the clutch when driving at high speed?
explanationSource: If you engage a gear that is too low and release the clutch, your motorcycle will brutally decelerate and could cause you to fall or slip sideways
answerASource: The rear wheel locks and can slip sideways
answerBSource: A fall is often unavoidable
answerCSource: The front wheel lifts off the ground
questionTextTarget: Yuqori tezlikda ketayotganda juda past uzatmaga o‘tib, muftani tez qo‘yib yuborsangiz nima bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: Juda past uzatmaga o‘tganda dvigatel keskin tormozlaydi. Orqa g‘ildirak bloklanishi va yon tomonga sirpanishi, yiqilish xavfi yuzaga kelishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Orqa g‘ildirak bloklanadi va yon tomonga sirpanishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What must you check on your motorcycle before you set off?
explanationSource: Before starting to drive, make sure that the rearview mirrors are correctly installed, adjusted and work properly (not broken, blind) and that the breaks work properly
answerASource: The adjustment of the rear-view mirrors
answerBSource: Brake fluid level, lever travel
answerCSource: Setting of the camshaft
questionTextTarget: Yo‘lga chiqishdan oldin mototsiklingizda nimani tekshirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lga chiqishdan oldin orqa ko‘zgular to‘g‘ri o‘rnatilgan va sozlanganini, shuningdek tormozlar to‘g‘ri ishlashini tekshiring.

questionTextSource: When do you have to increase tyre pressure?
explanationSource: Tire pressure need to be increased if driving with more weight (additional passenger, heavy luggage) or when driving for long distances especially at high speed
answerASource: When you have a passenger
answerBSource: When driving on autobahns for longer periods of time at high speed
answerCSource: When driving with heavy luggage
questionTextTarget: Qachon shina bosimini oshirish kerak?
explanationTarget: Qo‘shimcha yo‘lovchi, og‘ir bagaj yoki uzoq vaqt yuqori tezlikda avtomagistralda yurish kabi yuklama oshganda shina bosimini oshirish kerak.
answerBTarget: Avtomagistralda uzoq vaqt yuqori tezlikda yurganda

questionTextSource: What must you remember when taking a passenger?
explanationSource: A passenger increases the weight on your motorcycle. This makes accelerating and thus overtaking longer. It increases the centrifugal force when turning and increases the braking distance.
answerASource: Driving characteristics change on bends, particularly when entering and leaving the bend
answerBSource: Under the same conditions, overtaking requires a longer distance
answerCSource: Under the same conditions, the braking distance is reduced
questionTextTarget: Yo‘lovchi olib ketganda nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lovchi mototsikl og‘irligini oshiradi. Bu burilishlardagi xatti-harakatni o‘zgartiradi, quvib o‘tish masofasini uzaytiradi va tormoz masofasini kamaytirmaydi.
answerATarget: Burilishlarda, ayniqsa burilishga kirish va chiqishda haydash xususiyatlari o‘zgaradi
answerBTarget: Bir xil sharoitda quvib o‘tish uchun uzoqroq masofa kerak bo‘ladi
answerCTarget: Bir xil sharoitda tormoz masofasi qisqaradi

questionTextSource: What must you do to be ready to brake?
explanationSource: By placing your hand on the handbrakes and foot over the brake pedal you improve your reaction time to break
answerASource: Place your hand on the handbrake lever
answerBSource: Position your foot over the brake pedal
answerCSource: Change to a higher gear
questionTextTarget: Tormozlashga tayyor bo‘lish uchun nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Qo‘lni tormoz richagiga va oyoqni tormoz pedaliga yaqin tutish tormozlash reaksiyasini tezlashtiradi.

questionTextSource: Why does the rear wheel of a motorcycle tend to lock when braking rather than the front wheel?
explanationSource: When breaking, more weight is applied on the front wheel and less on the back wheel which can lock the back wheel
answerASource: - the load on the rear wheel is reduced
answerBSource: - the rear wheel is still propelled
answerCSource: - the load on the rear wheel increases
questionTextTarget: Nega mototsikl tormozlaganda old g‘ildirakka qaraganda orqa g‘ildirak ko‘proq bloklanishga moyil?
explanationTarget: Tormozlashda og‘irlik old g‘ildirakka ko‘chadi, orqa g‘ildirakdagi yuk kamayadi. Shuning uchun orqa g‘ildirak tezroq bloklanishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: - orqa g‘ildirak hali ham tortuvchi kuch oladi

questionTextSource: What is correct when driving round bends on downhill slopes?
explanationSource: When going downhill you need to break more than on bends on flat areas. You should therefore break enough before the bend, you should also keep your distance from the demarcation line from the oncoming traffic in case you need to tilt your motorcycle more
answerASource: Brake adequately before the bend so that no additional braking is needed on the bend
answerBSource: Start taking the bend so that you do not get into the area of oncoming traffic even when you are leaning far over
answerCSource: When you do not see any oncoming traffic, follow the ideal line and use the whole width of the roadway
questionTextTarget: Pastlikdagi burilishlarda haydaganda nima to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Pastlikda burilishdan oldin yetarlicha tormozlang. Qarama-qarshi harakat chizig‘iga yaqinlashmaslik uchun burilishni shunday boshlangki, mototsikl ko‘proq egilganda ham qarshi yo‘lakka chiqib ketmang.
answerATarget: Burilishdan oldin yetarlicha tormozlash, shunda burilishda qo‘shimcha tormozlash kerak bo‘lmaydi
answerBTarget: Mototsikl kuchli egilganda ham qarama-qarshi harakat hududiga chiqmaydigan qilib burilishni boshlash
answerCTarget: Qarama-qarshi transport ko‘rinmasa, ideal chiziq bo‘ylab yurib, qatnov qismining butun kengligidan foydalanish

questionTextSource: You are driving round a bend at a brisk pace which is tighter than you first thought. What do you do?
explanationSource: In this situation, making a sharp steering movement will be dangerous and could lead to a fall. You should decelerate gradually and lean further to turn more. If you brake sharply while turning, a torque force would tilt you from leaning to one side to a more upward position which will increase the radius of your turn
answerASource: Throttle back, lean further over
answerBSource: Do not brake sharply
answerCSource: Make an immediate sharp steering movement
questionTextTarget: Tezroq ketayotganingizda burilish kutilgandan torroq chiqdi. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Keskin rul harakati xavfli va yiqilishga olib kelishi mumkin. Sekin-asta tezlikni kamaytiring va ko‘proq egiling. Burilishda keskin tormozlash mototsiklni tiklab, burilish radiusini kattalashtiradi.

questionTextSource: What must you particularly remember when raising motorcycles onto their stands (centre stands)?
explanationSource: To avoid the motorcycle to tip over or fall, you must ensure that the ground is firm, even and not too steep on a downward slope
answerASource: - must be hard and even
answerBSource: - should not slope steeply downwards
answerCSource: - must not slope upwards
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklni markaziy tayanchga qo‘yganda nimani ayniqsa yodda tutish kerak?
explanationTarget: Mototsikl ag‘darilmasligi uchun yer qattiq, tekis va pastga juda tik qiya bo‘lmasligi kerak.

questionTextSource: Why is the rule of having to adapt your driving to your visibility particularly important in bends?
explanationSource: In a bend, there is limited visibility due to the curvature of the road. You should reduce your speed as unforeseen risk factors such as dirt on the road, obstacles or tighter bends could appear
answerASource: Because bends can be tighter than expected
answerBSource: Because dangerously soiled roadways may be recognized too late
answerCSource: Because otherwise you lose too much momentum
questionTextTarget: Nega burilishlarda ko‘rinishga moslab haydash qoidasi ayniqsa muhim?
explanationTarget: Burilishda yo‘l egriligi sabab ko‘rinish cheklangan bo‘ladi. Yo‘l iflosligi, to‘siqlar yoki kutilgandan torroq burilishlar kech ko‘rinishi mumkin, shuning uchun tezlikni kamaytirish kerak.
answerBTarget: Xavfli ifloslangan qatnov qismi kech aniqlanishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Aks holda juda ko‘p impuls yo‘qotasiz

questionTextSource: How can you counteract centrifugal force?
explanationSource: The centrifugal force can be either reduced by driving at a slower speed or be counteracted by leaning over more. Accelerating will do the opposite and increase the centrifugal force
answerASource: By leaning over
answerBSource: By reducing speed
answerCSource: By accelerating rapidly
questionTextTarget: Markazdan qochma kuchga qanday qarshi ta’sir qilish mumkin?
explanationTarget: Markazdan qochma kuchni tezlikni kamaytirish orqali pasaytirish yoki ko‘proq egilish orqali unga qarshi turish mumkin. Keskin tezlashish bu kuchni oshiradi.

questionTextSource: What can happen if a motorcycle is accelerated rapidly?
explanationSource: Accelerating while turning will increase the centrifugal force which will increase the radius of your turn. This could result in being directed in incoming traffic or on the pavement. In a straight line accelerating rapidly decrease stability
answerASource: If turning left, the motorcycle could leave the roadway and endanger pedestrians on the pavement
answerBSource: If turning right, the motorcycle can veer into the path of oncoming traffic
answerCSource: If driving straight ahead, driving stability is increased in any case
questionTextTarget: Mototsikl keskin tezlashtirilsa, nima bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Burilishda tezlashish markazdan qochma kuchni oshiradi va burilish radiusini kattalashtiradi. Bu yo‘ldan chiqish yoki qarama-qarshi transportga chiqib ketish xavfini tug‘diradi.
answerATarget: Chapga burilganda mototsikl yo‘ldan chiqib, piyodalar yo‘lagidagi piyodalarga xavf tug‘dirishi mumkin
answerBTarget: O‘ngga burilganda mototsikl qarama-qarshi transport yo‘liga chiqib ketishi mumkin
answerCTarget: To‘g‘ri yurishda haydash barqarorligi har doim oshadi

questionTextSource: What must be changed before driving with a heavy load?
explanationSource: When driving with heavy loads, make sure to increase the tire pressure and adjust the pre-tension in the suspension springs
answerASource: Pre-tensioning of the springs
answerBSource: Tyre pressure
answerCSource: Chain tension
questionTextTarget: Og‘ir yuk bilan haydashdan oldin nimani o‘zgartirish kerak?
explanationTarget: Og‘ir yuk bilan haydashda shina bosimini oshirish va osma prujinalarining oldindan tarangligini moslashtirish kerak.

questionTextSource: Which checks are particularly important before setting off?
explanationSource: All three are important to check before starting to drive. Make sure your visor is in good condition and not damaged or scratched. If you carry weight, make sure it is evenly distributed to not impact your center of gravity and do not impact your stability. Also ensure that the rear tire is in good condition.
answerASource: Profile of the rear tyre
answerBSource: Even load (front/rear, right/left)
answerCSource: Condition of your visor
questionTextTarget: Yo‘lga chiqishdan oldin qaysi tekshiruvlar ayniqsa muhim?
explanationTarget: Vizor holati, yukning old-orqa va o‘ng-chap bo‘yicha teng taqsimlanganligi hamda orqa shina protektori tekshirilishi kerak.

questionTextSource: In which cases should you apply the brakes only very carefully?
explanationSource: You should break carefully on slippery surfaces such as wet roads, tram tracks, sewer covers, lane markings but also dirt roads, roads with sand, stones as well as when driving with new tires
answerASource: On roadways with loose chippings or sand
answerBSource: On tram tracks, sewer covers and lane markings
answerCSource: When driving for the first time with new tyres
questionTextTarget: Qaysi holatlarda faqat juda ehtiyotkorlik bilan tormozlash kerak?
explanationTarget: Sirpanchiq yuzalarda, tramvay relslari, kanalizatsiya qopqoqlari, yo‘l chiziqlari, qum yoki mayda shag‘alli yo‘llarda hamda yangi shinalar bilan birinchi yurishda ehtiyotkor tormozlash kerak.
answerBTarget: Tramvay relslari, kanalizatsiya qopqoqlari va yo‘l chiziqlarida
answerCTarget: Yangi shinalar bilan birinchi marta haydaganda

questionTextSource: What is the normal braking procedure for motorcycles?
explanationSource: You should apply both brakes which will result in a shorter stopping distance than only applying one of the breaks
answerASource: Applying both brakes
answerBSource: Applying the rear brake only
answerCSource: Applying the front brake only
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklda odatiy tormozlash tartibi qanday?
explanationTarget: Ikkala tormozdan foydalanish faqat bitta tormozdan foydalanishga qaraganda qisqaroq to‘xtash masofasini beradi.

questionTextSource: Why must both brakes on a motorcycle always be in perfect working order?
explanationSource: Both brakes are required to function in case one of them suddenly fail, the other one can take over. Additionally using both brakes diminish the stopping distance compared to breaking with just one break
answerASource: To achieve the shortest possible braking distance
answerBSource: To be able to brake if one of the brakes fails
answerCSource: To safely park the motorcycle on a downhill slope
questionTextTarget: Nega mototsikldagi ikkala tormoz ham doimo mukammal ishlashi kerak?
explanationTarget: Ikkala tormoz eng qisqa tormoz masofasiga erishish uchun kerak. Agar biri ishlamay qolsa, boshqasi bilan tormozlash mumkin.
answerATarget: Eng qisqa tormoz masofasiga erishish uchun
answerBTarget: Tormozlardan biri ishdan chiqsa ham tormozlay olish uchun
answerCTarget: Mototsiklni pastlikda xavfsiz parkovka qilish uchun

questionTextSource: Is there a difference in the tendency of the wheels to lock?
explanationSource: When breaking, more weight is applied on the front wheel and less on the back wheel. For this reason, the back wheel tends to lock first
answerASource: Yes, as a rule, the rear wheel locks first
answerBSource: Yes, as a rule, the front wheel locks first
answerCSource: No, as a rule, both wheels lock at the same time
questionTextTarget: G‘ildiraklarning bloklanishga moyilligida farq bormi?
explanationTarget: Tormozlashda og‘irlik old g‘ildirakka ko‘chadi, orqa g‘ildirak yengillashadi. Shuning uchun odatda orqa g‘ildirak birinchi bloklanadi.
answerATarget: Ha, odatda orqa g‘ildirak birinchi bloklanadi
answerBTarget: Ha, odatda old g‘ildirak birinchi bloklanadi
answerCTarget: Yo‘q, odatda ikkala g‘ildirak bir vaqtda bloklanadi

questionTextSource: Is there a difference in the braking action?
explanationSource: When breaking, more weight is applied on the front wheel and less on the back wheel thus the front brake provides more braking power
answerASource: Yes, as a rule the front wheel brake has greater braking action
answerBSource: Yes, as a rule the rear wheel brake has greater braking action
answerCSource: No, as a rule, both brakes have the same braking action
questionTextTarget: Tormoz ta’sirida farq bormi?
explanationTarget: Tormozlashda og‘irlik old g‘ildirakka ko‘chadi, shuning uchun odatda old g‘ildirak tormozi kuchliroq tormoz ta’siriga ega.
answerATarget: Ha, odatda old g‘ildirak tormozi kuchliroq tormoz ta’siriga ega
answerBTarget: Ha, odatda orqa g‘ildirak tormozi kuchliroq tormoz ta’siriga ega
answerCTarget: Yo‘q, odatda ikkala tormoz bir xil tormoz ta’siriga ega

questionTextSource: You come unexpectedly upon a stretch of road with loose chippings. What do you do?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: Reduce speed cautiously
answerBSource: Avoid braking hard and leaning over
answerCSource: Apply the front brake only
questionTextTarget: Kutilmaganda mayda shag‘alli yo‘l qismiga duch keldingiz. Nima qilasiz?
explanationTarget: Mayda shag‘alda ilashish yomonlashadi. Tezlikni ehtiyotkor kamaytiring, keskin tormozlash va kuchli egilishdan saqlaning.
answerBTarget: Keskin tormozlash va kuchli egilishdan saqlanish

questionTextSource: Your vehicle was parked for a long time in the open in moist weather. What must you reckon with when applying the brakes for the first time?
explanationSource: When wet, brakes are less effective and the wheels will have a tendency to lock more. It has however no impact on braking of the engine on a lower gear.
answerASource: The wheels have a dangerous tendency to lock
answerBSource: Reduced braking action
answerCSource: Reduced braking action of the engine
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz nam ob-havoda uzoq vaqt ochiq joyda turgan. Birinchi tormozlashda nimani kutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Namlik sabab tormoz ta’siri kamayishi va g‘ildiraklarning bloklanishga moyilligi oshishi mumkin.
answerATarget: G‘ildiraklar xavfli tarzda bloklanishga moyil bo‘ladi

questionTextSource: What can be the reason for a motorized bicycle skidding on bends?
explanationSource: Skidding risk is increases because of slippery surfaces such as wet road, ice, sand, dirt, leaves, cobblestones, manholes. It can also be created due to heavy braking.
answerASource: Heavy braking
answerBSource: Wet or icy road surface
answerCSource: Sand or loose chippings
questionTextTarget: Motorli velosipedning burilishlarda sirpanishiga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Sirpanchiq yuzalar, nam yoki muzli yo‘l, qum, mayda shag‘al, barglar, kanalizatsiya qopqoqlari va kuchli tormozlash sirpanishga sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: When does the braking distance increase?
explanationSource: The heavier the vehicle, the longer will be the braking distance. Downward slopes as well as slippery surfaces also increase the braking distance
answerASource: When driving down slopes
answerBSource: When carrying heavy luggage
answerCSource: When there is headwind
