questionTextTarget: Tormoz masofasi qachon uzayadi?
explanationTarget: Pastlikda haydash va og‘ir bagaj transport vositasi massasini/yuklamasini oshirib, tormoz masofasini uzaytiradi. Qarshi shamol odatda bunga sabab emas.

questionTextSource: What particular characteristics of disc brakes must you remember when driving on a wet road surface?
explanationSource: As a car driver you have to take into account that when the street is wet the effect of the disc brakes usually takes effect much later than on a dry road.
answerASource: As a rule, the effect of disc brakes starts later than on a dry road surface
answerBSource: As a rule, the effect of disc brakes starts earlier than on a dry road surface
questionTextTarget: Ho‘l yo‘l yuzasida haydaganda disk tormozlarning qaysi xususiyatlarini yodda tutish kerak?
explanationTarget: Ho‘l yo‘lda disk tormozlar ta’siri quruq yo‘lga qaraganda odatda kechroq boshlanadi.
answerATarget: Odatda disk tormozlar ta’siri quruq yo‘lga qaraganda kechroq boshlanadi
answerBTarget: Odatda disk tormozlar ta’siri quruq yo‘lga qaraganda ertaroq boshlanadi

questionTextSource: What increases the danger of "flying out" of a bend when driving at high speed?
explanationSource: Decelerating or accelerating your car will result in less steering effort. As a result, there is an increased danger of "flying out" of the curve at high speed. Uncouple to get more steering power.
answerASource: Braking
answerBSource: Accelerating
answerCSource: Disengaging the clutch
questionTextTarget: Yuqori tezlikda burilishdan “uchib chiqish” xavfini nima oshiradi?
explanationTarget: Burilishda tormozlash, tezlashish yoki muftani ajratish yo‘l bilan ilashish va boshqaruvga salbiy ta’sir qilib, burilishdan chiqib ketish xavfini oshirishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What must you take into consideration when checking tyre pressure?
explanationSource: When checking tire pressure, you must also take into account the temperature and load of the vehicle. These can influence the tire pressure. By contrast, the material of the wheel rim doesn't matter.
answerASource: Load/Number of passengers in the car
answerBSource: Tyre temperature
answerCSource: Material of the wheels (steel/aluminium)
questionTextTarget: Shina bosimini tekshirayotganda nimani hisobga olishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Shina bosimi transport vositasi yuki/yo‘lovchilar soni va shina haroratiga bog‘liq. Disk materiali ahamiyatli emas.

questionTextSource: You drive round a bend once at 30 km/h and again at 60 km/h. How does the centrifugal force change?
explanationSource: The centrifugal force quadruples when the speed is doubled, that is, when you take the curve at 60 km/h the second time.
answerASource: - is four times as high
answerBSource: - is twice as high
answerCSource: - is the same
questionTextTarget: Siz burilishdan bir marta 30 km/soat, keyin 60 km/soat tezlikda o‘tyapsiz. Markazdan qochma kuch qanday o‘zgaradi?
explanationTarget: Tezlik ikki baravar oshsa, markazdan qochma kuch to‘rt baravar oshadi.

questionTextSource: What increases the effect of centrifugal force on the vehicle when driving round bends?
explanationSource: The speed has an immediate effect on the level of centrifugal force. Your braking distance quadruples when you drive at twice the speed. The centrifugal force increases the smaller the curve radius. The tire pressure has no effect on the centrifugal force.
answerASource: Higher speed
answerBSource: Smaller radius of a bend
answerCSource: Higher tyre pressure
questionTextTarget: Burilishlarda transport vositasiga ta’sir qiladigan markazdan qochma kuchni nima oshiradi?
explanationTarget: Tezlik yuqori bo‘lsa va burilish radiusi kichik bo‘lsa, markazdan qochma kuch oshadi. Shina bosimi markazdan qochma kuchni oshirmaydi.

questionTextSource: You are driving a motorcycle with sidecar on the right. Which driving technique must you use on bends?
explanationSource: Driving with a sidecar increase your weight, you thus need to go slower when turning
answerASource: Moderate throttle on right-hand bends
answerBSource: Release throttle and brake lightly on left-hand bends
answerCSource: Always disengage the clutch on all bends
questionTextTarget: O‘ng tomonda yon aravachasi bor mototsikl boshqaryapsiz. Burilishlarda qanday haydash texnikasidan foydalanish kerak?
explanationTarget: Yon aravachali mototsikl og‘irroq va boshqacha boshqariladi. O‘ng burilishda mo‘tadil gaz, chap burilishda gazni kamaytirib yengil tormozlash kerak bo‘lishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Chap burilishlarda gazni bo‘shatish va yengil tormozlash

questionTextSource: Where should a passenger on a motorcycle with sidecar sit to reduce the risk of tipping over on bends?
explanationSource: In order to keep a motorcycle with a sidecar stable, the weight should be equaly distributed on each side of the center of gravity. The second passenger therefore should sit in the sidecar
answerASource: In the sidecar
answerBSource: On the motorcycle
answerCSource: The position of the occupants has no significance
questionTextTarget: Burilishlarda ag‘darilish xavfini kamaytirish uchun yon aravachali mototsikldagi yo‘lovchi qayerda o‘tirishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Yon aravachali mototsikl barqarorligi uchun og‘irlik teng taqsimlanishi kerak. Shuning uchun yo‘lovchi yon aravachada o‘tirgani ma’qul.

questionTextSource: What can you do if the sidecar lifts off the ground on a right-hand bend when you are driving a motorcycle and sidecar (sidecar on the right)?
explanationSource: When turning right, a torque force will push the sidecar up. To reduce this torque you can slow down, shift your body weight to the right and make a wider turn.
answerASource: Release throttle, brake, shift your body weight to the right
answerBSource: Reduce steering lock angle, trace a wider arc within the lane you are travelling
answerCSource: Increase steering lock angle, accelerate
questionTextTarget: O‘ng tomonda yon aravachali mototsiklda o‘ng burilishda yon aravacha yerdan ko‘tarilsa, nima qilishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: O‘ng burilishda yon aravacha ko‘tarilsa, gazni bo‘shating, tormozlang, tana og‘irligini o‘ngga siljiting va yo‘lak ichida kengroq yoy bo‘ylab harakat qiling.
answerATarget: Gazni bo‘shatish, tormozlash, tana og‘irligini o‘ngga siljitish
answerBTarget: Rul burish burchagini kamaytirib, o‘z yo‘lagida kengroq yoy bo‘ylab yurish

questionTextSource: What can happen to a motorcycle with a sidecar attached on the right when driving too fast round a right-hand bend?
explanationSource: When turning right, a torque force will push the sidecar up. At high speed the sidecar could be lifted-up, loose contact with the ground and tip over.
answerASource: The sidecar lifts off the ground and the combination tips over
answerBSource: The motorcycle lifts off the ground and the combination tips over to the right
questionTextTarget: O‘ng tomonda yon aravachali mototsikl o‘ng burilishda juda tez yursa, nima bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: O‘ng burilishda yon aravacha yerdan ko‘tarilib, transport birikmasi ag‘darilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Yon aravacha yerdan ko‘tariladi va birikma ag‘dariladi
answerBTarget: Mototsikl yerdan ko‘tariladi va birikma o‘ngga ag‘dariladi

questionTextSource: So far, you have only driven solo motorcycles. You now change over to a combination (sidecar on the right, unbraked). How does driving differ?
explanationSource: As the sidecar is attached to your right, you cannot lean right and need to steer instead. When accelerating the sidecar tends to be pulled to the right. When breaking the sidecar will be pulled to the left
answerASource: When accelerating, the combination pulls to the right
answerBSource: When driving on bends, you must steer instead of leaning over
answerCSource: When braking, the combination pulls to the right
questionTextTarget: Hozirgacha faqat yakka mototsikl haydagansiz. Endi o‘ng tomonda tormozsiz yon aravachali mototsiklga o‘tdingiz. Haydash qanday farq qiladi?
explanationTarget: Yon aravachali mototsiklda egilish emas, rul bilan burilish kerak. Tezlashganda birikma o‘ngga tortadi, tormozlaganda esa chapga tortishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Burilishlarda egilish o‘rniga rul bilan boshqarish kerak

questionTextSource: So far, you have only driven solo motorcycles. You now change over to a combination (sidecar on the right, unbraked). What is different?
explanationSource: As the sidecar is attached to your right, you cannot lean right and need to steer instead. When turning right, a torque force will push your sidecar up. At high speed the sidecar could be lifted-up, loose contact with the ground and tip over. When accelerating the sidecar tends to be pulled to the right. When breaking the sidecar will be pulled to the left
answerASource: When braking, the combination pulls to the left
answerBSource: The sidecar may lift off the ground on right-hand bends
answerCSource: You must not drive with dipped headlights during daytime
questionTextTarget: Hozirgacha faqat yakka mototsikl haydagansiz. Endi o‘ng tomonda tormozsiz yon aravachali mototsiklga o‘tdingiz. Nima boshqacha?
explanationTarget: Tormozlaganda birikma chapga tortishi mumkin. O‘ng burilishlarda yon aravacha yerdan ko‘tarilishi mumkin. Kunduzi qisqa faradan foydalanish taqiqlanmagan.
answerBTarget: O‘ng burilishlarda yon aravacha yerdan ko‘tarilishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Kunduzi qisqa faralar bilan yurish mumkin emas

questionTextSource: What should you know about using the emergency operation of bus doors?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: - should enable anyone on the bus to open the doors following accidents and breakdowns
answerBSource: - if misused, can lead to the doors being opened when the bus is moving
answerCSource: - can only be released by the driver
questionTextTarget: Avtobus eshiklarining favqulodda ochish tizimidan foydalanish haqida nimani bilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Favqulodda ochish tizimi avariya yoki nosozlikdan keyin avtobusdagi har qanday odamga eshiklarni ochish imkonini berishi kerak. Noto‘g‘ri foydalanilsa, harakat paytida eshiklar ochilishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
answerATarget: - avariya va nosozliklardan keyin avtobusdagi har kim eshiklarni ochishi uchun xizmat qiladi
answerBTarget: - noto‘g‘ri foydalanilsa, avtobus harakatlanayotgan paytda eshiklar ochilishiga olib kelishi mumkin
answerCTarget: - faqat haydovchi tomonidan ishga tushirilishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What can happen if you accelerate very rapidly when moving off on your motorbike?
explanationSource: Fast and sudden accelerations could lead to the front wheel lifting off the road, passenger falling and losing control overt the motorcycle as there is less or no steering due to less or no contact between the front wheel and the road
answerASource: The passenger can fall off
answerBSource: The front lift can lift up from the road surface
answerCSource: I can lose control over the motorbike
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklda joyidan qo‘zg‘alayotganda juda tez tezlashsangiz nima bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Keskin tezlashish old g‘ildirak ko‘tarilishiga, yo‘lovchining yiqilishiga va mototsikl nazoratini yo‘qotishga olib kelishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Old g‘ildirak yo‘l yuzasidan ko‘tarilishi mumkin

questionTextSource: You are driving a local transport bus and want to drive away from a bus stop. What must you look out for?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: - all doors are properly closed
answerBSource: - no persons are directly in front of the bus
answerCSource: - flowing traffic is not endangered
questionTextTarget: Mahalliy qatnov avtobusini boshqaryapsiz va bekatdan chiqmoqchisiz. Nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lga chiqishdan oldin barcha eshiklar to‘g‘ri yopilganiga, avtobus oldida odamlar yo‘qligiga va oqimdagi transport xavf ostida qolmasligiga ishonch hosil qiling.

questionTextSource: You are driving in the wet in a car with trailer on a narrow rural road and are approaching a clearly visible but tight left-hand bend. What should you do?
explanationSource: Decrease your speed before the turn. Take the weather conditions into account. Keep in mind that the centrifugal force grows twice as fast as the speed. You should only accelerate again in the curve vertex.
answerASource: I reduce my speed before the bend
answerBSource: I remain in the centre of the lane and only accelerate again once I am back on the straight
answerCSource: I only brake once I have reached the apex of the bend
questionTextTarget: Ho‘l yo‘lda, tor qishloq yo‘lida tirkamali avtomobilda ketyapsiz va aniq ko‘rinadigan, lekin tor chap burilishga yaqinlashyapsiz. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Burilishdan oldin tezlikni kamaytiring va ob-havo sharoitini hisobga oling. Burilish cho‘qqisidan keyin va yo‘l to‘g‘rilangachgina yana tezlashish xavfsizroq.
answerBTarget: Yo‘lak markazida qolaman va faqat yana to‘g‘ri yo‘lga chiqqach tezlashaman

questionTextSource: What do you have to pay attention to, when jacking up a motorbike on its centre stand?
explanationSource: Setting a motorcycle on its centre stand requires more effort and can be difficult when on a steep slope. It is also sensitive to tipping over when tilted on the side
answerASource: - can tip over even when just slightly tilted
answerBSource: - can be difficult to jack up when on a steep gradient
answerCSource: - is best jacked up from a seated position
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklni markaziy tayanchga ko‘tarishda nimaga e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Markaziy tayanchga ko‘tarishda mototsikl ozgina qiyshayganda ham ag‘darilishi mumkin. Tik qiyalikda ko‘tarish qiyin bo‘ladi.
answerBTarget: - tik qiyalikda ko‘tarish qiyin bo‘lishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What should you do if your motorbike starts to wobble?
explanationSource: If your motorcycle starts to wobble, decelerate, disengage the clutch and brake. Do not accelerate as it might increase the wobble and lead to an accident. Also do not try to compensate it as it is dangerous and could also lead to an accident
answerASource: - throttle back, disengage the clutch and brake carefully
answerBSource: - change down gears and accelerate as quickly as possible
answerCSource: - compensate wobbling by quickly counter-steering
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklingiz tebrana boshlasa, nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Gazni bo‘shating, muftani ajrating va ehtiyotkorlik bilan tormozlang. Tezlashmang va keskin qarshi rul bilan tebranishni tuzatishga urinmang.
answerATarget: - gazni bo‘shatish, muftani ajratish va ehtiyotkor tormozlash
answerBTarget: - past uzatmaga o‘tib, imkon qadar tez tezlashish
answerCTarget: - tebranishni tez qarshi rul bilan kompensatsiya qilish

questionTextSource: You are driving a motorbike equipped with an anti-lock braking system (ABS). How do you perform an emergency braking manoeuvre?
explanationSource: Breaking both foot and hand brake will result in the shortest stopping distance. ABS improves the stopping distance by un-blocking the wheels during strong brakes
answerASource: Effect the best-possible deceleration using hand and foot brake
answerBSource: Do not press the foot brake lever, because the ABS only functions at the front
answerCSource: Operate the hand and foot brake lever intermittently ("intermittent braking")
questionTextTarget: ABS bilan jihozlangan mototsikl haydayapsiz. Favqulodda tormozlashni qanday bajarasiz?
explanationTarget: Eng yaxshi sekinlashuvga erishish uchun qo‘l va oyoq tormozidan foydalaning. ABS kuchli tormozlashda g‘ildiraklar bloklanishining oldini oladi.
answerATarget: Qo‘l va oyoq tormozi bilan eng yaxshi sekinlashuvga erishish
answerBTarget: Oyoq tormozini bosmaslik, chunki ABS faqat oldda ishlaydi
answerCTarget: Qo‘l va oyoq tormozini uzib-uzib bosish

questionTextSource: How can driver assistance systems be helpful?
explanationSource: Driver assistance systems assist the car driver and increase traffic safety when the navigation device is programmed before driving. However, driver assistance systems can not compensate for an unfitness to drive.
answerASource: In increasing road safety
answerBSource: In assisting the driver
answerCSource: To compensate for unfitness to drive
questionTextTarget: Haydovchiga yordam tizimlari qanday foydali bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Haydovchiga yordam tizimlari haydovchini qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi va yo‘l xavfsizligini oshirishi mumkin. Lekin ular haydashga yaroqsizlikni qoplay olmaydi.

questionTextSource: What must you be aware of, if you have to brake sharply while in a bend?
explanationSource: If you have to brake sharply in a curve, make sure that your motorcycle straightens up (inertia force). You have to turn harder to maintain the curve line.
answerASource: My motorcycle will become upright
answerBSource: I have to steer more strongly in order to maintain my cornering line
answerCSource: My cornering line decreases
questionTextTarget: Burilishda keskin tormozlashga majbur bo‘lsangiz, nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Burilishda keskin tormozlaganda mototsikl tiklanishga intiladi. Burilish chizig‘ini saqlash uchun kuchliroq rul boshqaruvi kerak bo‘lishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Burilish chizig‘imni saqlash uchun kuchliroq rul boshqarishim kerak

questionTextSource: What must you be aware of when driving a quad?
explanationSource: Reduce speed when turning, as quads tend to tip over due to their high centre of gravity.
answerASource: Wearing a suitable crash helmet is mandatory
answerBSource: Quads are prone to tipping over when driving through tight bends
answerCSource: The handling characteristics are similar to those of a car
questionTextTarget: Quad haydaganda nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Quadlar yuqori og‘irlik markazi sabab tor burilishlarda ag‘darilishga moyil. Mos himoya dubulg‘asi kiyish majburiy.

questionTextSource: What should be observed when driving a quad?
explanationSource: The quad has no steering assistance, so steering may be more difficult than driving a car.
answerASource: Protective motorcycle clothing should be worn
answerBSource: A warning triangle must be carried on the quad
answerCSource: The necessary steering force can be significantly greater than with a car
questionTextTarget: Quad haydaganda nimaga rioya qilish kerak?
explanationTarget: Quad haydashda mototsikl himoya kiyimi tavsiya etiladi. Quadlarda rul yordami bo‘lmagani uchun rul kuchi avtomobilga qaraganda ancha katta bo‘lishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Quadlarda ogohlantirish uchburchagi olib yurilishi kerak
answerCTarget: Kerakli rul kuchi avtomobilga qaraganda ancha katta bo‘lishi mumkin

questionTextSource: You are driving a motorbike with a manual gearbox. What do you have to do in order to be ready to brake?
explanationSource: Put your foot and hand already over the brake levers to initiate the braking process more quickly.
answerASource: I place my hand on the handbrake lever
answerBSource: I place my foot over the brake pedal
answerCSource: I change up to a higher gear
questionTextTarget: Qo‘lda uzatmali mototsikl haydayapsiz. Tormozlashga tayyor bo‘lish uchun nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Tormozlashni tezroq boshlash uchun qo‘lni qo‘l tormozi richagiga, oyoqni tormoz pedaliga tayyor holatda tuting.

questionTextSource: You want to use a carrying case or pannier affixed to the side of your motorcycle. What must you be especially aware of?
explanationSource: Make sure that the weight is evenly distributed to stabilise the driving behaviour. Stow heavy luggage as far down as possible to keep the centre of gravity as low as possible.
answerASource: An unequal distribution of weight should be avoided
answerBSource: Heavier pieces of luggage should be stowed as close to the bottom as possible
answerCSource: The gross vehicle weight rating of the motorcycle may not be exceeded
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklingizning yon tomoniga koffr yoki sumka o‘rnatmoqchisiz. Nimaga ayniqsa e’tibor berishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Og‘irlik teng taqsimlanishi kerak. Og‘ir bagajni iloji boricha pastroqqa joylashtiring va mototsiklning ruxsat etilgan umumiy massasidan oshmang.
answerBTarget: Og‘irroq bagaj iloji boricha pastroqqa joylashtirilishi kerak
answerCTarget: Mototsiklning ruxsat etilgan umumiy massasi oshmasligi kerak

questionTextSource: Your motorbike is equipped with a traction control system (TCS). What is the system designed to do?
explanationSource: Slippage" is the sudden increase in the speed of a drive wheel when it loses grip because you have accelerated too much. This triggers the anti-slip control, which prevents the wheel from spinning by braking.
answerASource: - prevents the rear wheel spinning when moving off
answerBSource: - stabilises the motorbike during an emergency braking manoeuvre
answerCSource: - prevents the front wheel from locking during braking
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklingiz tortish nazorati tizimi (TCS) bilan jihozlangan. Bu tizim nima uchun mo‘ljallangan?
explanationTarget: TCS tezlashganda yetakchi g‘ildirak sirpanib aylanishining oldini oladi, ayniqsa joyidan qo‘zg‘alishda orqa g‘ildirakning aylanishini kamaytiradi.
answerATarget: - joyidan qo‘zg‘alishda orqa g‘ildirakning aylanishini oldini oladi
answerCTarget: - tormozlashda old g‘ildirak bloklanishini oldini oladi

questionTextSource: You are driving around a bend in the road, and the turning radius becomes smaller as the bend progresses. You had reckoned that the turning radius would be larger. How must you now react?
explanationSource:
If you have estimated the cornering radius to be larger, you should reduce your speed; by reducing your speed, you can drive a smaller cornering radius. 
You can also increase the lean angle in the bend so that you can take tighter bends.
answerASource: I increase my inclined position
answerBSource: I reduce my speed
answerCSource: I activate the emergency stop switch
questionTextTarget: Yo‘l burilishida ketyapsiz, burilish radiusi davomida kichrayib bormoqda. Siz radius kattaroq bo‘ladi deb o‘ylagandingiz. Endi qanday harakat qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Agar burilish radiusini kattaroq deb baholagan bo‘lsangiz, tezlikni kamaytirishingiz kerak. Tezlikni kamaytirish orqali kichikroq radiusli burilishdan o‘tish mumkin. Shuningdek, burilishda egilish burchagini oshirish mumkin.

questionTextSource: What should you take into account when you have to brake unexpectedly sharply while driving around a road bend?
explanationSource: When you brake in a bend, your motorbike is lifted up by the force of inertia. You have to counteract this by counter-steering with feeling. Otherwise you will continue straight ahead and not make the bend.
answerASource: My motorcycle tends to drive straight ahead
answerBSource: I should counter-steer gently
answerCSource: The driving line of my motorcycle remains unchanged
questionTextTarget: Yo‘l burilishida ketayotganda kutilmaganda keskin tormozlashga majbur bo‘lsangiz, nimani hisobga olishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Burilishda tormozlaganda mototsikl inertsiya kuchi sabab tiklanishga intiladi. Buni sezgir qarshi rul berish bilan bartaraf etish kerak. Aks holda mototsikl to‘g‘ri ketib, burilishni bajarmaydi.
answerATarget: Mototsiklim to‘g‘ri yo‘nalishda ketishga moyil bo‘ladi

questionTextSource: In bends with poor road conditions, what increases the risk of skidding?
explanationSource:
Ideally, all wheels should press on the road with the same force to ensure optimum grip and handling. If this is not the case, it can increase the risk of skidding in poor road conditions.
The suspension, for example, has the task of keeping all tyres on the road with the same force. If the suspension is damaged, it can no longer do this. The risk of skidding also increases if the tyre pressure is incorrect or if the vehicle is incorrectly or unevenly loaded.
This is because the tyres cannot apply the same force to the road and you lose grip more quickly.
answerASource: Having a damaged chassis
answerBSource: Having the wrong tyre inflation pressure
answerCSource: Having a wrongly loaded cargo
questionTextTarget: Yo‘l holati yomon bo‘lgan burilishlarda sirpanish xavfini nima oshiradi?
explanationTarget: Optimal ilashish uchun barcha g‘ildiraklar yo‘lga bir xil kuch bilan bosilishi kerak. Shassi shikastlangan bo‘lsa, shina bosimi noto‘g‘ri bo‘lsa yoki yuk noto‘g‘ri joylashtirilsa, sirpanish xavfi ortadi.

questionTextSource: You are travelling along a winding road with a steep gradient. Your motorbike is fully loaded. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource:
Avoid speeding up between bends, because speeding up would put even more strain on the brakes. Therefore, ride downhill without speeding up. 
Use the front and rear brakes evenly and try to use the braking effect of the motor to relieve the brakes. The higher the engine speed, the greater the braking effect.
answerASource: I drive in a low gear in order to use my engine’s braking action
answerBSource: I avoid accelerating to high speeds between bends in the road
answerCSource: I brake using the front-wheel brake only
questionTextTarget: Keskin pastlikdagi burilishli yo‘lda ketyapsiz. Mototsiklingiz to‘liq yuklangan. To‘g‘ri harakat qanday?
explanationTarget: Burilishlar orasida yuqori tezlikka tezlashishdan saqlaning, chunki bu tormozlarga yanada ko‘proq yuk tushiradi. Past uzatmada yuring va dvigatel tormozidan foydalaning. Old va orqa tormozlardan muvozanatli foydalaning.
answerATarget: Dvigatel tormozidan foydalanish uchun past uzatmada yuraman
answerBTarget: Burilishlar orasida yuqori tezlikka tezlashishdan saqlanaman
answerCTarget: Faqat old g‘ildirak tormozi bilan tormozlayman

questionTextSource: When is there a risk that the front wheel of the motorbike will lose contact with the carriageway?
explanationSource:
When speeding up, the weight shifts to the back. Extreme speeding in a low gear shifts the centre of gravity behind the rear axle and the front wheel lifts off.
A passenger also shifts the weight to the rear when speeding up. This weight shift relieves the front wheel and can cause it to lift off.
answerASource: - accelerate in a low gear
answerBSource: - accelerate while carrying a pillion passenger
answerCSource: - brake using the front-wheel brake
questionTextTarget: Qachon mototsiklning old g‘ildiragi yo‘l yuzasidan uzilib qolish xavfi bor?
explanationTarget: Tezlashganda og‘irlik orqaga siljiydi. Past uzatmada keskin tezlashish yoki orqada yo‘lovchi bilan tezlashish old g‘ildirakni yengillashtirib, ko‘tarilishiga olib kelishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What might happen if you shift to a low gear while travelling at a high speed?
explanationSource: The sudden, rapid increase in engine speed when engaging the clutch creates a braking effect. The engine braking force can cause your rear wheel to lock up or slip and lose grip on the road. You could lose control of your motorbike and crash.
answerASource: The rear wheel may lock
answerBSource: There is a high risk of crashing to the ground
answerCSource: The front wheel may lift up from the road surface
questionTextTarget: Yuqori tezlikda ketayotganda past uzatmaga o‘tsangiz, nima yuz berishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Past uzatmaga o‘tib muftani qo‘yib yuborganda dvigatel tezligi keskin oshadi va kuchli dvigatel tormozi paydo bo‘ladi. Bu orqa g‘ildirakning bloklanishi yoki sirpanishiga, nazoratni yo‘qotishga olib kelishi mumkin.
answerCTarget: Old g‘ildirak yo‘l yuzasidan ko‘tarilishi mumkin

questionTextSource: How should you respond if your motorbike begins to wobble?
explanationSource: By reducing the speed immediately, you can reduce swaying and increase driving stability. Swaying occurs at high speeds. So avoid driving very fast when continuing your journey.
answerASource: - immediately release the accelerator and slow down
answerBSource: - avoid high speeds as I continue my journey
answerCSource: - counter-steer right now
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklingiz tebrana boshlasa, qanday harakat qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Gazni darhol bo‘shating va tezlikni kamaytiring. Tebranish ko‘pincha yuqori tezlikda kuchayadi, shuning uchun safarni davom ettirganda yuqori tezliklardan saqlaning.
answerBTarget: - safarni davom ettirganda yuqori tezliklardan saqlanish

questionTextSource: What is the purpose of an emergency stop switch on a motorbike?
explanationSource: The emergency stop switch switches off the engine. You can use it to switch off the engine quickly in dangerous situations without having to turn the key.
answerASource: - turns off the engine
answerBSource: - turns off the lights
answerCSource: - triggers the eCall system
questionTextTarget: Mototsikldagi favqulodda o‘chirish tugmasining maqsadi nima?
explanationTarget: Favqulodda o‘chirish tugmasi dvigatelni o‘chiradi. Xavfli vaziyatda kalitni burmasdan dvigatelni tez o‘chirish mumkin.

questionTextSource: What applies to the effectiveness of the front and rear wheel brakes, especially at higher speeds?
explanationSource: When braking, the weight shifts forward, which puts greater strain on the front wheel. That's why the front wheel brake is usually designed for higher braking effects in order to make the greater load easier to control.
answerASource: - of the front brake is larger
answerBSource: - of the rear wheel brake is larger
answerCSource: - of the front and rear wheel brakes are equally powerful
questionTextTarget: Ayniqsa yuqori tezliklarda old va orqa g‘ildirak tormozlarining samaradorligi bo‘yicha nima amal qiladi?
explanationTarget: Tormozlaganda og‘irlik oldinga siljiydi va old g‘ildirakka ko‘proq yuk tushadi. Shu sabab old tormoz odatda kuchliroq tormoz ta’siriga ega.
answerCTarget: - old va orqa g‘ildirak tormozlari bir xil kuchli

questionTextSource: What can cause a motorcycle to oscillate at high speed?
explanationSource:
At high speeds on uneven roads or if the wheels are not balanced, your motorcycle tends to "sway" more quickly because the unevenness changes the road's position.
If you have a heavy load on the rear of your motorcycle, there will be less weight on the front wheel. At high speeds, your motorcycle may sway, making it harder for you to control your motorcycle.
answerASource: - with unbalanced wheels
answerBSource: - on uneven road surfaces
answerCSource: - with heavy luggage at the rear
questionTextTarget: Yuqori tezlikda mototsiklning tebranishiga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yuqori tezlikda notekis yo‘l, balanslanmagan g‘ildiraklar yoki orqa tomondagi og‘ir yuk mototsiklning tebranishiga olib kelishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What changes when a caravan trailer is towed?
explanationSource: If you drive with a caravan, not only does it increase the risk of skidding, the overtaking and braking distances will be longer as well. This is due to the additional load to be pulled and the pulling motion of the trailer.
answerASource: The distance for overtaking increases considerably
answerBSource: Hasty movements of the steering wheel increase the danger of skidding
answerCSource: The braking distance is reduced considerably
questionTextTarget: Karavan tirkamasi tortilganda nima o‘zgaradi?
explanationTarget: Karavan bilan haydashda sirpanish xavfi ortadi, quvib o‘tish masofasi va tormoz masofasi uzayadi. Bu qo‘shimcha tortiladigan yuk va tirkama harakati bilan bog‘liq.
answerBTarget: Rulni keskin harakatlantirish sirpanish xavfini oshiradi

questionTextSource: What changes in a car when towing a two-axle trailer?
explanationSource: The combination of car and trailer requires more space when driving on bends and when turning. Likewise, the mass changes the accelerating ability. It is decreasing significantly.
answerASource: More space is needed when turning and driving round bends
answerBSource: Acceleration capacity is reduced
answerCSource: Driving stability increases
questionTextTarget: Ikki o‘qli tirkama tortganda avtomobilda nima o‘zgaradi?
explanationTarget: Avtomobil va tirkama birikmasi burilishlarda va aylanishlarda ko‘proq joy talab qiladi. Qo‘shimcha massa sabab tezlanish qobiliyati sezilarli kamayadi.
answerATarget: Burilish va aylanishlarda ko‘proq joy kerak bo‘ladi

questionTextSource: You are in your car towing a trailer on a road with oncoming traffic and want to turn left. What must you particularly remember when you set off again?
explanationSource: With a trailer you have a lower accelerating ability, changed mass and a greater total length. This must be taken into consideration when you're starting your car again. Oncoming traffic must not be warned in this case by using the flash light.
answerASource: Think about the length of your car and trailer combination
answerBSource: Consider the reduced acceleration capacity
answerCSource: Warn oncoming traffic by flashing your lights
questionTextTarget: Avtomobilingizda tirkama bilan qarama-qarshi harakatli yo‘lda chapga burilmoqchisiz. Qayta harakatlanganda nimani ayniqsa yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Tirkama bilan tezlanish qobiliyati pasayadi, massa va umumiy uzunlik o‘zgaradi. Harakatni qayta boshlaganda avtomobil-tirkama birikmasi uzunligi va sekinroq tezlanishini hisobga oling.

questionTextSource: You are in your car towing a trailer which has no brakes and you approach a long steep downhill slope. What is correct?
explanationSource: Reduce your speed on time. Us a gear as low as possible. The thus activated engine brake supports the braking action of the pedal braking. By no means you should put your car in idling. This would make the vehicle faster.
answerASource: Reduce speed, if necessary, engage low gear in time, be ready to brake
answerBSource: Make allowance for the pushing effect of the trailer
answerCSource: Relieve the car brakes by disengaging the clutch at frequent intervals
questionTextTarget: Avtomobilingizda tormozsiz tirkama tortib, uzoq tik pastlikka yaqinlashyapsiz. Nima to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Vaqtida tezlikni kamaytiring, zarur bo‘lsa past uzatmaga o‘ting va tormozlashga tayyor bo‘ling. Tirkama itarish ta’sirini hisobga oling. Muftani ajratib yurish avtomobilni tezlashtirishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Tezlikni kamaytirish, zarur bo‘lsa vaqtida past uzatmaga o‘tish va tormozga tayyor turish
answerCTarget: Avtomobil tormozlarini yengillashtirish uchun vaqti-vaqti bilan muftani ajratish

questionTextSource: What must you check on a car with a caravan trailer before setting out on a journey?
explanationSource: Caravans restrict the view to the back. Therefore, you must check before the start of the journey, if the mirrors provide sufficient visibility to the back. You also need to make sure that the illuminating devices are working.
answerASource: Whether the lights of the trailer are working
answerBSource: Whether the view through the rear-view mirrors is adequate
answerCSource: Whether the passengers in the caravan trailer have put on their safety belts
questionTextTarget: Karavan tirkamali avtomobilda yo‘lga chiqishdan oldin nimani tekshirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Karavan orqa ko‘rinishni cheklaydi. Shuning uchun ko‘zgular orqali orqa ko‘rinish yetarli ekanini va tirkama chiroqlari ishlashini tekshiring.
answerBTarget: Orqa ko‘zgular orqali ko‘rinish yetarli ekanini
answerCTarget: Karavan tirkamasidagi yo‘lovchilar xavfsizlik kamarini taqqanini

questionTextSource: You are in your car towing a fully loaded trailer which has no brakes. What is correct?
explanationSource: Note that a fully loaded trailer without its own brake extends the braking distance and thus the stopping distance by the respective trailer load. The thinking distance does not change in this case.
answerASource: Braking distance increases
answerBSource: Reaction distance increases
answerCSource: Stopping distance reduces
questionTextTarget: To‘liq yuklangan tormozsiz tirkamali avtomobilni boshqaryapsiz. Nima to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Tormozsiz to‘liq yuklangan tirkama tormoz yo‘lini va shu bilan to‘xtash masofasini uzaytiradi. Reaksiya masofasi o‘zgarmaydi.

questionTextSource: You want to tow a singe-axle caravan trailer behind your car. What must you check?
explanationSource: The caravan reduces the view to the back. You as a car driver have to check whether the rear view through the existing mirrors is sufficient. You may need to attach extra mirrors to your car. Towing vehicle and trailer must always be coordinated.
answerASource: If the permissible trailer load or the permissible coupling of the car are exceeded
answerBSource: If additional rear-view mirrors must be mounted because of the width of the trailer
answerCSource: If the trailer is licensed to transport passengers
questionTextTarget: Avtomobilingiz ortida bir o‘qli karavan tirkamasini tortmoqchisiz. Nimani tekshirishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Karavan orqa ko‘rinishni kamaytiradi. Mavjud ko‘zgular yetarlimi yoki qo‘shimcha ko‘zgular kerakmi, shuningdek avtomobilning ruxsat etilgan tortiladigan yuki va ulagich yuklamasi oshmasligini tekshiring.
answerATarget: Avtomobilning ruxsat etilgan tirkama yuki yoki ruxsat etilgan ulagich yuklamasi oshib ketmaganini
answerBTarget: Tirkama kengligi sabab qo‘shimcha orqa ko‘zgular o‘rnatish kerakmi
answerCTarget: Tirkama yo‘lovchi tashish uchun ruxsat etilganmi

questionTextSource: You want to set off in an automatic car (hydraulic converter). What must you know?
explanationSource: If you give a "go" with an engaged gear as a car driver in a vehicle with automatic transmission it will try to start driving. This can only be prevented by operating the service brake. The selector lever can and may be operated with the engine stationary and running.
answerASource: When selecting a gear, the car must, as a rule, be held by the service brakes
answerBSource: The selector lever must only be moved when the engine has stopped
answerCSource: The engine revolutions must be raised considerably so that the engine does not stall
questionTextTarget: Avtomatik avtomobilda yo‘lga chiqmoqchisiz. Nimani bilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Avtomatik uzatmada uzatma tanlanganda avtomobil harakatlanishga urinadi. Shuning uchun odatda xizmat tormozi bilan ushlab turish kerak.
answerATarget: Uzatma tanlanganda avtomobil odatda xizmat tormozi bilan ushlab turilishi kerak
answerBTarget: Selektor richagi faqat dvigatel o‘chirilganda harakatlantirilishi kerak
answerCTarget: Dvigatel o‘chib qolmasligi uchun aylanishlar ancha oshirilishi kerak

questionTextSource: What must you remember with regard to tyre pressure?
explanationSource: By regularly checking the air pressure of the tires, tire damage can be avoided, but fuel can also be saved. If you put your vehicle under a greater burden, you need to adjust the tire pressure.
answerASource: To check the air pressure regularly, including that of the spare wheel
answerBSource: To increase the pressure to the level stated in the vehicle manual when the vehicle is heavily loaded
answerCSource: To reduce the air pressure before longer trips
questionTextTarget: Shina bosimi bo‘yicha nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Shina bosimini, zaxira g‘ildirakni ham, muntazam tekshiring. Transport vositasi og‘ir yuklangan bo‘lsa, bosimni foydalanish qo‘llanmasida ko‘rsatilgan darajaga oshiring.
answerATarget: Havo bosimini, shu jumladan zaxira g‘ildiraknikini, muntazam tekshirish
answerBTarget: Transport vositasi og‘ir yuklangan bo‘lsa, bosimni foydalanish qo‘llanmasida ko‘rsatilgan darajaga oshirish
answerCTarget: Uzoq safarlardan oldin havo bosimini kamaytirish

questionTextSource: You had a tyre failure and must mount the emergency wheel. What is prohibited when you continue to drive?
explanationSource: Emergency wheels have a different design than conventional wheels and are only allowed up to a speed of 80 km/h. They have worse operating characteristics. You should only drive with them as far as necessary. Taking other people with you is allowed.
answerASource: Driving faster than 80 km/h
answerBSource: Driving longer than necessary with the emergency wheel
answerCSource: Taking passengers
questionTextTarget: Shinangiz yorildi va favqulodda g‘ildirakni o‘rnatishingiz kerak. Safarni davom ettirganda nima taqiqlangan?
explanationTarget: Favqulodda g‘ildirak odatiy g‘ildirakdan farq qiladi va odatda 80 km/soatgacha ruxsat etiladi. U bilan faqat zarur masofani yuring. Yo‘lovchi olish taqiqlanmagan.
answerBTarget: Favqulodda g‘ildirak bilan zarurdan uzoqroq haydash

questionTextSource: When driving, you notice that the car constantly pulls to the left. What could be the cause of this?
explanationSource: If your vehicle pulls to the left so that countersteering is required, too little air pressure in the left tire could be the cause or a different wheel setting. A badly worn tire usually does not have this effect.
answerASource: Too little air in the front left tyre
answerBSource: Incorrect wheel adjustment at the front axle (track, wheel camber)
answerCSource: The left rear tyre is extensively worn
questionTextTarget: Haydash paytida avtomobil doim chapga tortayotganini sezdingiz. Bunga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Avtomobil chapga tortsa, chap old shinada havo bosimi past bo‘lishi yoki old o‘q g‘ildirak sozlamasi noto‘g‘ri bo‘lishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Chap old shinada havo juda kam
answerBTarget: Old o‘qda g‘ildirak sozlamasi noto‘g‘ri (iz, kamber)

questionTextSource: What does a front-wheel drive car tend to do if you accelerate too much on a bend?
explanationSource: As a car driver, you must always expect your vehicle with front-wheel drive to swing off in front if you over-accelerate on a turn. Your vehicle will more likely under than oversteer.
answerASource: The front end tends to turn out to the side
answerBSource: The vehicle tends to oversteer
answerCSource: The rear end tends to turn out to the side
questionTextTarget: Old yuritmali avtomobil burilishda haddan tashqari tezlashganda nimaga moyil bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: Old yuritmali avtomobil burilishda ortiqcha gaz berilganda old qismi tashqariga chiqishga moyil bo‘ladi. U odatda ortiqcha burilishdan ko‘ra kam burilishga moyil.
answerATarget: Old qismi yon tomonga tashqariga chiqishga moyil bo‘ladi
answerBTarget: Transport vositasi ortiqcha burilishga moyil bo‘ladi
answerCTarget: Orqa qismi yon tomonga tashqariga chiqishga moyil bo‘ladi

questionTextSource: What does a rear-wheel drive car tend to do if you accelerate too much on a bend?
explanationSource: You should always expect your vehicle with rear wheel drive to swing off to the back if you over-accelerate on a turn. It is more likely to oversteer than understeer.
answerASource: The rear end tends to turn out to the side
answerBSource: The front end tends to turn out to the side
answerCSource: The car tends to understeer
questionTextTarget: Orqa yuritmali avtomobil burilishda haddan tashqari tezlashganda nimaga moyil bo‘ladi?
explanationTarget: Orqa yuritmali avtomobil burilishda ortiqcha gaz berilganda orqa qismi tashqariga chiqishga moyil bo‘ladi. U odatda ortiqcha burilishga moyil.
answerATarget: Orqa qismi yon tomonga tashqariga chiqishga moyil bo‘ladi
answerBTarget: Old qismi yon tomonga tashqariga chiqishga moyil bo‘ladi

questionTextSource: What are the advantages of an anti-slip device (ASR)?
explanationSource: The traction control system (TCS) of a car prevents the wheels of the vehicle from spinning, especially when accelerating faster. Slipping away to the side when starting to drive on slippery roads is thereby largely prevented.
answerASource: No wheelspin when setting off
answerBSource: Reduced danger of sliding sideways when setting off on a slippery roadway
answerCSource: No locking of the wheels when braking
questionTextTarget: Sirpanishga qarshi tizimning (ASR) afzalliklari nimada?
explanationTarget: ASR tezlanishda g‘ildiraklarning aylanishini oldini oladi va sirpanchiq yo‘lda joyidan qo‘zg‘alganda yon tomonga sirpanish xavfini kamaytiradi.
answerBTarget: Sirpanchiq yo‘lda joyidan qo‘zg‘alganda yon tomonga sirpanish xavfi kamayadi

questionTextSource: You want to couple up a trailer with ball coupling. What is correct?
explanationSource: In a trailer with ball clutch, the clutch dog must firmly enclose the spherical head. The fuse must engage. Make sure the electrical connection works. The support wheel must not run while driving. It must be locked in high position.
answerASource: The claw of the coupling must fit securely around the ball. The locking device must engage
answerBSource: The electrics must be connected
answerCSource: The jack wheel must be set so that it can also run when driving
questionTextTarget: Sharikli ulagichli tirkamani ulashmoqchisiz. Nima to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Ulagich panjasi sharli boshni mahkam qamrab olishi va qulflash moslamasi ilashishi kerak. Elektr ulanishi bajarilishi kerak. Tayanch g‘ildiragi yurish vaqtida aylanmasligi uchun yuqori holatda qulflanishi kerak.
answerATarget: Ulagich panjasi sharni mahkam qamrab olishi kerak. Qulflash moslamasi ilashishi kerak
answerCTarget: Tayanch g‘ildiragi haydash vaqtida ham aylanishi uchun sozlanishi kerak

questionTextSource: What must you do after coupling up a single-axle trailer with overrun brakes?
explanationSource: The breakaway cable must be hung on the coupling device of the towing vehicle. With an overrun brake, the trailer brakes automatically when the connection to the towing vehicle breaks off. The function of the brake must be checked. The support wheel must not run while driving, so it should be brought to the upper position.
answerASource: Check that the brakes are working
answerBSource: Raise the jack wheel, if fitted, to the highest setting
answerCSource: Attach the brakeaway cable to the coupling of the motor vehicle
questionTextTarget: Inersiya tormozli bir o‘qli tirkamani ulagandan keyin nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Uzilish trosi tortuvchi transport vositasining ulagichiga ilinishi kerak. Tormoz ishlashini tekshiring va mavjud bo‘lsa, tayanch g‘ildiragini eng yuqori holatga ko‘taring.
answerBTarget: Mavjud bo‘lsa, tayanch g‘ildiragini eng yuqori holatga ko‘tarish
answerCTarget: Uzilish trosini motorli transport vositasi ulagichiga ilish

questionTextSource: What must you bear in mind when loading a single-axle trailer?
explanationSource: When loading a single-axle trailer, you must ensure to comply with the total mass and that your load does not exceed the permissible axial load and bearing load.
answerASource: - axle load
answerBSource: - load on the coupling
answerCSource: - total mass
questionTextTarget: Bir o‘qli tirkamani yuklaganda nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Bir o‘qli tirkamani yuklaganda umumiy massa, o‘q yuklamasi va ulagichdagi vertikal yuklama chegaralariga rioya qilish kerak.

questionTextSource: You want to park your single-axle trailer (overrun brakes, 1000 kg permissible total mass) on a slope. What must you do?
explanationSource: You must always secure your trailer against possibly rolling away. To do this, you must use the parking brake and place the wheel chocks in front of the wheels. Usually such trailers have no reverse lockout.
answerASource: Pull the parking brake
answerBSource: Place wheel chocks under the wheels
answerCSource: Engage the reverse lock
questionTextTarget: Inersiya tormozli, ruxsat etilgan umumiy massasi 1000 kg bo‘lgan bir o‘qli tirkamangizni qiyalikda parkovka qilmoqchisiz. Nima qilishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Tirkamani dumalab ketishdan doimo xavfsizlash kerak. Parkovka tormozini torting va g‘ildirak tagliklarini qo‘ying.

questionTextSource: Which dangerous defects can have occurred on a trailer with overrun brakes which has been parked for some time?
explanationSource: If you leave a trailer standing somewhere for a long time, the weather can cause damage: electrical connections can be damaged, rust can form on the brakes. Sun exposure does not increase the tire pressure too much, so that no dangerous defects occur.
answerASource: The brakes may not work because of rust
answerBSource: Cable connections can be defective
answerCSource: Tyre pressure may have increased greatly due to exposure to the sun
questionTextTarget: Bir muddat parkovka qilingan inersiya tormozli tirkamada qanday xavfli nuqsonlar paydo bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Uzoq vaqt turgan tirkamada ob-havo sabab elektr ulanishlari shikastlanishi va tormozlarda zang paydo bo‘lishi mumkin.
answerCTarget: Quyosh ta’sirida shina bosimi juda ko‘tarilib ketgan bo‘lishi mumkin

questionTextSource: What must you remember when loading a trailer?
explanationSource: Always pay attention to the proper securing of your cargo. In order not to endanger yourself and other road users, you must always have a clear view and full control over your vehicle. The cargo must be marked at the rear and may not protrude more than 50 cm at the front.
answerASource: - must be securely packed
answerBSource: - must not project more than 1 m beyond the rear reflectors, unless specially marked
answerCSource: - must not project more than 1 m beyond the front of the towing vehicle
questionTextTarget: Tirkamani yuklaganda nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yuk xavfsiz mahkamlangan bo‘lishi kerak. Orqa qaytargichlardan 1 m dan ortiq chiqsa, alohida belgilanishi kerak. Old tomonga 1 m dan ortiq chiqishi mumkin emas.
answerBTarget: - maxsus belgilanmasa, orqa reflektorlardan 1 m dan ortiq chiqmasligi kerak
answerCTarget: - tortuvchi transport vositasi oldidan 1 m dan ortiq chiqmasligi kerak

questionTextSource: Why should you not press the clutch and switch off the engine at the same time when driving down a long slope?
explanationSource: When the engine is off, the engine brake (brake booster) cannot work. Even power steering is not turned on then. To respond quickly and effectively to dangerous situations, you may need both.
answerASource: The steering of vehicles with servo-assisted steering immediately becomes unusually heavy
answerBSource: Full braking power cannot be reached in vehicles with brake booster system despite great force being applied to the pedal
answerCSource: The battery will be overcharged
questionTextTarget: Nega uzoq pastlikda haydaganda bir vaqtning o‘zida muftani bosib, dvigatelni o‘chirmaslik kerak?
explanationTarget: Dvigatel o‘chirilsa, tormoz kuchaytirgichi va servo rul ishlamasligi mumkin. Bu tormozlash kuchini kamaytiradi va rulni juda og‘ir qiladi.
answerATarget: Servo rulga ega transport vositalarida rul darhol odatdagidan juda og‘ir bo‘ladi
answerBTarget: Tormoz kuchaytirgichli transport vositalarida pedal kuchli bosilsa ham to‘liq tormoz kuchiga erishilmaydi

questionTextSource: Why should you not apply the clutch when driving on a long, steep downhill slope?
explanationSource: If you step down the clutch, the engine brake will not work and you will have to use the service brake more. As a result, overheating and increased brake wear can occur.
answerASource: Because the braking action of the engine will have no effect
answerBSource: Because this causes unnecessary wear of the brakes
answerCSource: Because in this case the brake servo unit will no longer function
questionTextTarget: Nega uzoq tik pastlikda haydaganda muftani bosmaslik kerak?
explanationTarget: Mufta bosilsa, dvigatel tormozi ishlamaydi va xizmat tormozidan ko‘proq foydalanishga to‘g‘ri keladi. Natijada tormozlar qizishi va ko‘proq yeyilishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Chunki bu tormozlarning keraksiz yeyilishiga olib keladi
answerCTarget: Chunki bu holatda tormoz kuchaytirgichi ishlamay qoladi

questionTextSource: What is correct when coupling a full trailer?
explanationSource: You should make sure that a suitable person in the viewing area is about you and instructor you and that this person obstacles and road users that you can not see, warns you of a Mehrachsanhängers when coupling.
answerASource: - should be positioned in the driver's line of vision and guide him
answerBSource: - warns of obstacles and road users not visible to the driver
answerCSource: - hold the drawbar until it has locked into the hitch
questionTextTarget: To‘liq tirkamani ulashda nima to‘g‘ri?
explanationTarget: Ko‘p o‘qli tirkamani ulashda mos shaxs haydovchining ko‘rish maydonida turib yo‘naltirishi va haydovchiga ko‘rinmaydigan to‘siqlar hamda yo‘l ishtirokchilari haqida ogohlantirishi kerak.
answerATarget: - haydovchining ko‘rish maydonida turib uni yo‘naltirishi kerak
answerBTarget: - haydovchiga ko‘rinmaydigan to‘siqlar va yo‘l ishtirokchilari haqida ogohlantiradi
answerCTarget: - tortish moslamasi ulagichga qulflanguncha uni ushlab turadi

questionTextSource: You are driving in a pair with a load. What should be noted when performing an emergency stop?
explanationSource: If you are driving with more weight, you should apply more braking force. Due to the additional weight, the rear wheel brakes will brake more as well
answerASource: - have to apply more braking force
answerBSource: - that the rear-wheel brakes may operate more powerfully
answerCSource: - have to apply less braking force
questionTextTarget: Yuk bilan ikki g‘ildirakli transport vositasida ketyapsiz. Favqulodda tormozlashda nimani yodda tutish kerak?
explanationTarget: Qo‘shimcha og‘irlik sabab ko‘proq tormoz kuchi kerak bo‘ladi. Orqa g‘ildirak tormozi ham kuchliroq ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: - orqa g‘ildirak tormozlari kuchliroq ishlashi mumkin

questionTextSource: You suddenly have to brake when cornering on a wet carriageway. What special aspects exist with a vehicle equipped with an anti-lock braking system (ABS)?
explanationSource: On wet roads, the antilocking system prevents the wheels from locking and shortens the braking distance. In addition, the vehicle remains more steerable when braking. On gravel or snow, the braking distance can certainly be much longer.
answerASource: The steering capability is retained for longer
answerBSource: The vehicle will always remain stable
answerCSource: It is not possible for the vehicle to skid out of the bend
questionTextTarget: Ho‘l qatnov qismida burilishda to‘satdan tormozlashingiz kerak. ABS bilan jihozlangan transport vositasida qanday maxsus jihatlar bor?
explanationTarget: Ho‘l yo‘lda ABS g‘ildiraklarning bloklanishini oldini oladi va rul boshqaruvchanligi uzoqroq saqlanadi. Biroq transport vositasi har doim barqaror qoladi yoki burilishdan sirpanib chiqmaydi, deb kafolatlanmaydi.
answerBTarget: Transport vositasi har doim barqaror qoladi
answerCTarget: Transport vositasining burilishdan sirpanib chiqishi mumkin emas

questionTextSource: What is the effect of the cornering characteristics of a combination vehicle (car towing a caravan) when taking a turn?
explanationSource: Despite careful driving, it is possible that the trailer cuts the curve or even swings out. The car driver must therefore proceed with caution in order to exclude hazards to others.
answerASource: - can jut out
answerBSource: - can cut the corner
answerCSource: - generally follows the track of the car
questionTextTarget: Karavan tortayotgan avtomobil birikmasining burilish xususiyati burilishda qanday ta’sir qiladi?
explanationTarget: Ehtiyotkor haydashga qaramay, tirkama burilish ichkarisini kesib o‘tishi yoki tashqariga chiqishi mumkin. Shuning uchun boshqalarga xavf tug‘dirmaslik uchun ehtiyotkor harakat qiling.

questionTextSource: You experience pendular movements on your motorbike. What could be the cause of these?
explanationSource: If your entire motorcycle swings to the front and back, this could be caused by heavy load or imbalance in the wheel
answerASource: The load
answerBSource: A wheel imbalance
answerCSource: Driving at low revs
questionTextTarget: Mototsiklingizda tebranish harakatlarini sezdingiz. Bunga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Mototsikl oldinga-orqaga tebransa, bunga yuk yoki g‘ildirak balansining buzilishi sabab bo‘lishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What can restrict the functionality of a lane departure warning system?
explanationSource: The function of the lane departure warning system may be limited if the system cannot properly pick up lane signals. This is, because the computer-controlled system works on the basis of different optical systems. There are no signals from the guardrails. Another name for the lane departure warning system is: Lane Keeping Assist (active lane departure warning system with steering assistance).
answerASource: A dirty road surface
answerBSource: The absence of road markings
answerCSource: The absence of guardrails
questionTextTarget: Yo‘lakdan chiqish ogohlantirish tizimining ishlashini nima cheklashi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Tizim yo‘l chiziqlarini optik tizimlar orqali taniydi. Yo‘l yuzasi iflos bo‘lsa yoki yo‘l chiziqlari bo‘lmasa, uning ishlashi cheklanishi mumkin. Himoya panjaralarining yo‘qligi bunga asosiy sabab emas.

questionTextSource: What information should you obtain before undertaking a journey with a purely electric vehicle?
explanationSource: The car driver should inform himself about the range of the electric vehicle before starting the journey. This differs significantly from the range of conventional vehicles and more frequent stops to recharge the batteries are necessary. You should also take into account that there is more technology in an electric vehicle. Although it is generally true that electric vehicles are just as safe as conventional cars. But in their bodies usually run cables that are designed for enormously high voltages.
answerASource: The locations at which I can charge the vehicle
answerBSource: What I have to do following an accident
answerCSource: Factors that influence the range
questionTextTarget: Faqat elektr transport vositasi bilan safarga chiqishdan oldin qanday ma’lumotlarni bilib olishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Safardan oldin yurish masofasiga ta’sir qiluvchi omillar, zaryadlash joylari va avariya holatida nima qilish kerakligi haqida ma’lumot oling.

questionTextSource: You are planning a longer journey with a purely electric vehicle. What should you be aware of?
explanationSource: If you are planning a longer journey with a purely electric vehicle, you should consider that your car has a much lower range compared to conventional vehicles. In addition, the capacity of the batteries is influenced by the outside temperature.
answerASource: The availability of electric charging stations
answerBSource: The battery charging time
answerCSource: The influence of external ambient temperatures on the range
questionTextTarget: Faqat elektr transport vositasi bilan uzoq safar rejalashtiryapsiz. Nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Faqat elektr transport vositasi bilan uzoq safarda an’anaviy transport vositalariga nisbatan yurish masofasi qisqaroq bo‘lishi mumkin. Batareya quvvati tashqi haroratga ham bog‘liq. Zaryadlash stansiyalari mavjudligi va zaryadlash vaqtini rejalashtiring.
answerCTarget: Tashqi muhit haroratining yurish masofasiga ta’sirini

questionTextSource: What should you be aware of when charging purely electric vehicles?
explanationSource: When charging pure electric vehicles, you must be aware that they cannot be recharged at every gas station. Only use the charging cables approved by the manufacturer. Depending on the power connection, the charging time varies.
answerASource: The charge time depends on the power supply
answerBSource: Charging should only be performed with a charging cable approved by the manufacturer
answerCSource: Charging is available at every filling station
questionTextTarget: Faqat elektr transport vositalarini zaryadlashda nimani yodda tutish kerak?
explanationTarget: Elektr transport vositasini har bir yoqilg‘i quyish shoxobchasida zaryadlab bo‘lmaydi. Faqat ishlab chiqaruvchi ruxsat bergan zaryadlash kabelidan foydalaning. Zaryadlash vaqti elektr ulanish quvvatiga bog‘liq.
answerBTarget: Zaryadlash faqat ishlab chiqaruvchi ruxsat bergan zaryadlash kabeli bilan bajarilishi kerak
answerCTarget: Har bir yoqilg‘i quyish shoxobchasida zaryadlash mumkin

questionTextSource: How is a purely electric vehicle different from a vehicle with a combustion engine?
explanationSource: Pure electric vehicles are almost noiseless. These vehicles also have no direct exhaust emissions. The aerodynamic drag depends on the volume of the body and not on the type of drive.
answerASource: - have a lower engine noise
answerBSource: - do not have any direct exhaust emissions
answerCSource: - have a lower aerodynamic drag
questionTextTarget: Faqat elektr transport vositasi ichki yonuv dvigatelli transport vositasidan nimasi bilan farq qiladi?
explanationTarget: Elektr transport vositalari deyarli shovqinsiz yuradi va haydash vaqtida bevosita chiqindi gaz chiqarmaydi. Aerodinamik qarshilik esa yuritma turiga emas, kuzov shakliga bog‘liq.

questionTextSource: You are driving a purely electric vehicle in a residential area. What should you be aware of due to your lower engine noise?
explanationSource: With a pure electric vehicle, you are almost noiseless on the road and you can acoustically be hardly perceived by other road users. Especially cyclists are at risk if they hear no engine noise. Without looking back, they often turn.
answerASource: Pedestrians will not notice me or will do so later than usual
answerBSource: Cyclist travelling ahead will turn left, without looking behind them
answerCSource: Vehicles following behind will tailgate me
questionTextTarget: Faqat elektr transport vositasida turar joy hududida ketyapsiz. Dvigatel shovqini pastligi sabab nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Elektr transport vositasi deyarli shovqinsiz harakat qiladi. Piyodalar va velosipedchilar sizni odatdagidan kechroq payqashi mumkin. Oldinda ketayotgan velosipedchi orqasiga qaramay chapga burilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Piyodalar meni odatdagidan kechroq yoki umuman sezmasligi mumkin
answerBTarget: Oldinda ketayotgan velosipedchi orqasiga qaramay chapga burilishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Orqamdagi transport vositalari menga juda yaqin yuradi

questionTextSource: You are driving a motor vehicle fitted with anti-lock braking system (ABS). How do you achieve the shortest possible braking distance?
explanationSource: If you drive a car with an automatic anti-lock braking system, you achieve the shortest braking distance by braking abruptly and with maximum pedal force. The ABS prevents the wheels from locking during braking.
answerASource: - suddenly and with maximum force
answerBSource: - carefully and then increasingly harder
answerCSource: - multiple times at quick intervals and with maximum force
questionTextTarget: ABS bilan jihozlangan motorli transport vositasini boshqaryapsiz. Eng qisqa tormoz masofasiga qanday erishasiz?
explanationTarget: ABS g‘ildiraklarning bloklanishini oldini oladi. Eng qisqa tormoz masofasi uchun to‘satdan va maksimal kuch bilan tormozlash kerak.
answerBTarget: - ehtiyotkorlik bilan bosib, keyin tobora kuchliroq
answerCTarget: - tez-tez qisqa oraliqlarda va maksimal kuch bilan

questionTextSource: A lane assist system with corrective steer control can help you when driving. What should you be aware of?
explanationSource: A prerequisite for a perfect function of the lane departure warning system are good road markings. Keep in mind that technical driving assistants cannot compensate for inability to drive. As a car driver, you must be able to intervene into the driving experience at all times.
answerASource: - keep the vehicle in lane if the road markings are clear
answerBSource: - not function if the road markings are poor
answerCSource: - compensate for a lack of fitness to drive (e.g. tiredness)
questionTextTarget: Tuzatuvchi rul boshqaruvi bo‘lgan yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi haydashda yordam berishi mumkin. Nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi yaxshi yo‘l chiziqlari bo‘lsa, transport vositasini yo‘lakda ushlashga yordam beradi. Yo‘l chiziqlari yomon bo‘lsa, tizim ishlamasligi mumkin. U charchoq kabi haydashga yaroqsizlikni qoplay olmaydi.
answerATarget: - yo‘l chiziqlari aniq bo‘lsa, transport vositasini yo‘lakda ushlab turishi mumkin
answerBTarget: - yo‘l chiziqlari yomon bo‘lsa, ishlamasligi mumkin
answerCTarget: - haydashga yaroqsizlikni, masalan charchoqni, qoplay oladi

questionTextSource: You are driving at high speed into a bend. What could happen if you had to brake suddenly?
explanationSource: If you drive fast into a tight curve, you lose road grip when you brake hard and slide out of the curve. (Centrifugal force)
answerASource: - could lose its grip on the road
answerBSource: - could skid out of the bend
answerCSource: - will constantly maintain its driving stability with the stability control
questionTextTarget: Yuqori tezlikda burilishga kiryapsiz. To‘satdan tormozlashga majbur bo‘lsangiz, nima bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yuqori tezlikda burilishda keskin tormozlash ilashishni yo‘qotishga va transport vositasining burilishdan sirpanib chiqishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
answerCTarget: - barqarorlik nazorati bilan har doim barqaror qoladi

questionTextSource: What can result in your motor vehicle skidding while driving round a bend?
explanationSource: If you turn sharply, your vehicle may start to skid on bends. This can also happen if you drive too fast. Adjust your speed when cornering.
answerASource: Heavy oversteer
answerBSource: Driving too fast
answerCSource: Gently accelerating at the exit of the bend
questionTextTarget: Burilishda transport vositangizning sirpanishiga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Burilishda juda tez yurish yoki kuchli ortiqcha burilish transport vositasini sirpantirishi mumkin. Burilishdan chiqishda yumshoq tezlanish odatda sabab emas.

questionTextSource: The lane keeping assist system warns you with acoustic, haptic or optical signals. What might be the cause of this?
explanationSource: If you drift out of your lane, the lane departure warning system detects this by recognising that you are approaching the lane marking. The permissible total mass must not be exceeded.
answerASource: My vehicle is getting close to the road markings at the side of the road
answerBSource: My vehicle is undercutting the safety distance to the vehicle ahead
answerCSource: Another vehicle is overtaking me with not enough side clearance
questionTextTarget: Yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi sizni tovushli, seziladigan yoki optik signal bilan ogohlantiryapti. Bunga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Agar transport vositasi yo‘l chetidagi chiziqlarga yaqinlashsa yoki yo‘lakdan chiqib ketsa, yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi ogohlantirishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Transport vositam yo‘l chetidagi yo‘l chiziqlariga yaqinlashmoqda
answerBTarget: Transport vositam oldindagi transport vositasigacha xavfsiz masofani kamaytirdi
answerCTarget: Boshqa transport vositasi meni yetarli yon masofasiz quvib o‘tmoqda

questionTextSource: In what situation can the lane keep assist system with steering override help you?
explanationSource:
On motorways and country roads, steering intervention by the lane departure warning system can be helpful, as the markings are clearly visible there.
Due to poor markings and narrow lanes in roadworks, steering intervention by the lane departure warning system is not possible as it will most likely not be detected correctly.
answerASource: - on motorways
answerBSource: - on rural roads
answerCSource: - in constricted roadworks sites with poor road markings
questionTextTarget: Rulga aralashuvchi yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi qaysi vaziyatda yordam berishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Avtomagistral va qishloq yo‘llarida yo‘l chiziqlari odatda yaxshi ko‘rinadi, shuning uchun tizim yordam berishi mumkin. Tor qurilish joylarida va yomon chiziqlarda tizim noto‘g‘ri ishlashi mumkin.
answerCTarget: - yo‘l chiziqlari yomon bo‘lgan tor qurilish joylarida

questionTextSource: With which driving task can the lane keep assist system with steering override help the driver?
explanationSource:
If the lane markings are good, Lane Keeping Assist with steering intervention can help you to keep the vehicle on the lane when driving straight ahead.
When turning, you cross lanes and markings; the lane departure warning system cannot intervene to support you here. When overtaking, you signal to the lane departure warning system by flashing that you are crossing the lane markings intentionally. Thus, it does not intervene during the overtaking process.
answerASource: When driving in a straight line
answerBSource: When turning
answerCSource: When overtaking
questionTextTarget: Rulga aralashuvchi yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi haydovchiga qaysi haydash vazifasida yordam beradi?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l chiziqlari yaxshi bo‘lsa, tizim to‘g‘ri yo‘nalishda harakatlanganda transport vositasini yo‘lakda ushlashga yordam beradi. Burilish yoki quvib o‘tishda u odatda yordam bermaydi.

questionTextSource: What can negatively affect the functioning of the lane keep assist system?
explanationSource:
If the lane markings are in a poor condition, the lane keeping assistant cannot recognise where the lane to be maintained is. Due to additional lane markings in construction areas, it is not obvious which is the lane to be kept to.
Weather conditions can affect the sensors of the lane departure warning system. In addition, water or snow can distort the markings.
answerASource: The weather conditions
answerBSource: The condition of the road markings
answerCSource: Additional road markings within a roadworks site
questionTextTarget: Yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi ishlashiga nima salbiy ta’sir qilishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yomon yo‘l chiziqlari, qurilish joyidagi qo‘shimcha chiziqlar va ob-havo sharoiti tizim sensorlari va yo‘lakni aniqlashga salbiy ta’sir qilishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: Under what conditions will the lane keep assist system with steering override function optimally?
explanationSource:
The lane keeping assistant works best with clear lane markings. 
Poor or additional markings in roadworks will not allow the lane departure warning system to intervene, as it will most likely not be detected correctly.
Weather conditions can affect the sensors of the lane departure warning system. In addition, snow can distort the markings.
answerASource: Where there are clear road markings
answerBSource: Where there are patches of snow on the road surface
answerCSource: Where there are additional roadworks markings
questionTextTarget: Rulga aralashuvchi yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi qaysi sharoitlarda optimal ishlaydi?
explanationTarget: Tizim aniq ko‘rinadigan yo‘l chiziqlari bo‘lganda eng yaxshi ishlaydi. Qor, yomon yoki qo‘shimcha qurilish chiziqlari tizim ishlashini yomonlashtiradi.
answerBTarget: Yo‘l yuzasida qor parchalari bo‘lgan joyda

questionTextSource: What driver assistance system offers a high degree of road safety potential?
explanationSource:
The Autonomous Emergency Brake Assist constantly detects the traffic in front of the vehicle. If a hazard is imminent, the Emergency Brake Assist can carry out an emergency braking manoeuvre. 
Braking too late or too timidly are often causes of traffic accidents. Brake assistants usually react faster than humans and thus offer more safety.
answerASource: The brake assist
answerBSource: The autonomous emergency brake
answerCSource: The cruise control system
questionTextTarget: Qaysi haydovchiga yordam tizimi yo‘l xavfsizligini oshirishda katta salohiyatga ega?
explanationTarget: Favqulodda tormoz yordamchisi oldindagi harakatni kuzatib, xavf bo‘lsa tezroq reaksiya qiladi va favqulodda tormozlashni amalga oshirishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: How can driver assistance systems help you?
explanationSource:
In critical traffic situations, driver assistance systems can react quickly and intervene automatically by steering or braking etc..
If danger is imminent, they can warn you with light, sound and haptic signals. Driver assistance systems can also help you with driving tasks, such as keeping in lane.
answerASource: - warn me of danger
answerBSource: - help me perform driving tasks
answerCSource: - intervene automatically in critical road traffic situations
questionTextTarget: Haydovchiga yordam tizimlari sizga qanday yordam berishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Ular xavf haqida ogohlantirishi, haydash vazifalarida yordam berishi va muhim vaziyatlarda rul yoki tormoz orqali avtomatik aralashishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: What can result if you accelerate too hard when driving a front-wheel drive car through a road bend?
explanationSource: If you give a front-wheel drive car too much gas in a bend, it can swerve over the front axle. The front tyres lose their grip on the road and your vehicle can no longer be steered, but continues straight ahead and breaks away.
answerASource: - The front of the car can swerve
answerBSource: - Steerability can be reduced
answerCSource: - The rear of the car can swerve
questionTextTarget: Old yuritmali avtomobilda burilishdan o‘tayotganda juda kuchli tezlashsangiz, nima bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Old yuritmali avtomobilda burilishda ortiqcha gaz berilsa, old shinalar ilashishni yo‘qotib, old qism tashqariga chiqishi va rul boshqaruvchanligi kamayishi mumkin.
answerATarget: - avtomobilning old qismi tashqariga chiqishi mumkin
answerCTarget: - avtomobilning orqa qismi tashqariga chiqishi mumkin

questionTextSource: Under what conditions can an active lane change assist system perform a lane change?
explanationSource: The Active Lane Change Assistant only performs a lane change when it cannot detect any vehicle in the relevant safety zone. For an active lane change, the assistant must first detect a marked lane with several lanes.
answerASource: - has detected an adequately marked carriageway with multiple lanes
answerBSource: - has not detected any vehicles in the relevant safety zone
answerCSource: - has detected a sufficiently large gap in the oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Faol yo‘lak almashtirish yordamchisi qaysi sharoitlarda yo‘lakni almashtirishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Tizim faqat bir nechta yo‘lakli, yaxshi belgilangan qatnov qismini aniqlasa va tegishli xavfsizlik zonasida transport vositasi aniqlanmasa yo‘lak almashtirishi mumkin.
answerATarget: - bir nechta yo‘lakli yetarlicha belgilangan qatnov qismini aniqlagan bo‘lsa
answerBTarget: - tegishli xavfsizlik zonasida transport vositasi aniqlamagan bo‘lsa
answerCTarget: - qarama-qarshi transportda yetarlicha katta bo‘shliq aniqlagan bo‘lsa

questionTextSource: Your motor vehicle is equipped with an active lane keep assist system. What information can be indicated by the status display of this system?
explanationSource: The system must be able to display when it is switched on, switched off or has a malfunction, as this is important for the driver.
answerASource: - is activated
answerBSource: - is deactivated
answerCSource: - has a fault
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz faol yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi bilan jihozlangan. Bu tizim status ko‘rsatkichi qanday ma’lumotlarni ko‘rsatishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Tizim yoqilgan, o‘chirilgan yoki nosozligini haydovchiga ko‘rsatishi kerak.

questionTextSource: Your motor vehicle is equipped with a lane keep assist system. In what situation can this system help you?
explanationSource: Lane Keeping Assist helps you stay in lane. It warns you if you unintentionally leave the lane.
answerASource: - I depart from my lane unintentionally
answerBSource: - the maximum permissible speed is exceeded
answerCSource: - the vehicle is driving too quickly over ruts in the road
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi bilan jihozlangan. Bu tizim qaysi vaziyatda yordam beradi?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi bexosdan yo‘lakdan chiqib ketganingizda ogohlantiradi va yo‘lakda qolishga yordam beradi.
answerATarget: - men bexosdan o‘z yo‘lagimdan chiqib ketsam
answerCTarget: - transport vositasi yo‘l izlaridan juda tez o‘tsa

questionTextSource: You have the lane keep assist system activated in your motor vehicle. It emits a warning signal while you are driving. What could be the cause of this?
explanationSource: Lane Keeping Assist warns you if you unintentionally leave your lane. If you forget to indicate when changing lanes, Lane Keeping Assist recognizes this as unintentionally leaving your lane and warns you.
answerASource: I forgot to switch on my indicator when changing lane
answerBSource: I have unintentionally departed from my lane
answerCSource: I undercut the minimum distance between me and the vehicle ahead
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangizda yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi yoqilgan. Haydash paytida ogohlantirish signali berdi. Bunga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yo‘lakni saqlash tizimi bexosdan yo‘lakdan chiqishda ogohlantiradi. Yo‘lak almashtirishda burilish ko‘rsatkichini yoqmasangiz, tizim buni bexosdan chiqish deb qabul qilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Yo‘lak almashtirganda burilish ko‘rsatkichini yoqishni unutdim
answerBTarget: Men bexosdan o‘z yo‘lagimdan chiqib ketdim
answerCTarget: Oldindagi transport vositasigacha minimal masofani kamaytirdim

questionTextSource: You are using your motor vehicle’s lane keep assist system while driving. The system does not respond when you depart from the lane. What could be the cause of this?
explanationSource: Due to missing lane markings, insufficient road illumination and heavy precipitation, the sensors of the lane departure warning system are impaired, which means that the lane is not reliably detected.
answerASource: Inadequate road illumination
answerBSource: Heavy precipitation
answerCSource: A lack of lane markings
questionTextTarget: Haydash paytida yo‘lakni saqlash tizimidan foydalanyapsiz. Yo‘lakdan chiqqaningizda tizim javob bermadi. Bunga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Yo‘l chiziqlari yo‘qligi, yo‘l yoritilishi yetarli emasligi yoki kuchli yog‘ingarchilik tizim sensorlarini cheklab, yo‘lakni ishonchli aniqlashga xalaqit beradi.

questionTextSource: Your motor vehicle is equipped with a lane change assist system without steering intervention. While driving, the warning light flashes on the left-hand exterior rear-view mirror. What is this warning light indicating?
explanationSource: If there is a vehicle in the monitoring area, this is signaled by the warning lamp lighting up on the exterior mirror.
answerASource: Another vehicle is located within the monitored area
answerBSource: You may not now perform a lane change to the left
answerCSource: You can now perform a lane change to the left without any risk
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz rulga aralashmaydigan yo‘lak almashtirish yordamchisi bilan jihozlangan. Haydash paytida chap tashqi ko‘zgudagi ogohlantirish chirog‘i yonib-o‘chmoqda. Bu nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Monitoring hududida boshqa transport vositasi bo‘lsa, tashqi ko‘zgudagi ogohlantirish chirog‘i signal beradi.
answerATarget: Monitoring qilinayotgan hududda boshqa transport vositasi bor
answerBTarget: Hozir chapga yo‘lak almashtirish mumkin emas
answerCTarget: Hozir chapga xavfsiz yo‘lak almashtirish mumkin

questionTextSource: While driving, you are using your motor vehicle’s active lane keep assist system. How can you manually override this driver assist system in the event that it intervenes?
explanationSource: Countersteering and activating the indicator overrides the intervention of Lane Keeping Assist.
answerASource: By counter-steering
answerBSource: By activating the indicator
answerCSource: By accelerating
questionTextTarget: Haydash paytida faol yo‘lakni saqlash tizimidan foydalanyapsiz. Tizim aralashganda uni qo‘lda qanday bekor qilishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Qarshi rul berish yoki burilish ko‘rsatkichini yoqish tizim aralashuvini bekor qilishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: In which situation is it purposeful to use an active lane change assist system?
