questionTextSource: Your tyre inflation pressure is clearly too low while you driving on public roads. What is the consequence of this?
explanationSource: A low tyre pressure results that a larger area of the tyre lies on the asphalt while driving. In addition, the tyre no longer has a round shape and can no longer roll cleanly. If the tyre pressure is significantly too low, the driving stability in curves decreases dangerously and the steering behaviour deteriorates.
answerASource: There will be a considerable deterioration in the vehicle’s manoeuvrability
answerBSource: The vehicle’s stability will be dangerously reduced when cornering
answerCSource: The level of tyre wear will decrease greatly

questionTextSource: What must you check when regularly inspecting your vehicle’s tyres?
explanationSource:
You should check your tires at regular intervals. It is important that you control the external state of the tires, make sure that the tires have no external damage and that the legally required minimum profile depth of 1.6 mm is not undercut.
Especially in front of longer journeys or with a higher load, you should make sure to check the tire pressure beforehand.
answerASource: The air pressure
answerBSource: The tread depth
answerCSource: For external damage
questionTextTarget: Transport vositangiz shinalarini muntazam tekshirganda nimani tekshirishingiz kerak?

questionTextSource: A tyre’s adhesion to the road surface depends on what?
explanationSource: The liability of a tire on the road is heavily dependent on the road conditions and the weather conditions. It is best to liability a tire on a dry road. However, wetness, snow, ice, bumps or dirt can severely affect tire liability. The tire temperature also plays an important role in liability because it influences the properties of the rubber compound. Summer tires could become harder at low temperatures and reduce their liability, while winter tires could wear out faster at high temperatures.
answerASource: On the tyre temperature
answerBSource: On the road conditions
answerCSource: On the weather conditions
questionTextTarget: Shinaning yo‘l yuzasiga ilashishi nimaga bog‘liq?
explanationTarget: Shinaning ilashishi shina harorati, yo‘l holati va ob-havo sharoitlariga bog‘liq. Namlik, qor, muz, notekislik yoki kir ilashishni kamaytiradi.

questionTextSource: What can cause a gradual loss in tyre inflation pressure?
explanationSource: Damage to the tire by e.g. a nail or similar foreign bodies can lead to the loss of tire filling pressure. By driving with high speeds on highways, the tire heats up and the tire pressure becomes higher. This can escape air creeping if the valve cap is missing.

answerCSource: Accelerating quickly and frequently

questionTextSource: What should you check regularly if your car has a spare wheel carried outside the body of the car?
explanationSource: If you carry a spare wheel outside the body, it is important to regularly check the double lock and the tire pressure. The double lock ensures that the spare wheel is securely attached while driving and does not come loose, which could lead to dangerous situations on the road. The tire pressure should be checked, as a spare wheel with insufficient air pressure is not ready for use in the event of a breakdown and therefore cannot fulfill its function as a reserve. Because the spare tire often remains unused, it can lose air pressure over time; Regular checks ensure that it can be used immediately if necessary.
answerASource: The double safeguard
answerBSource: The tyre pressure
answerCSource: The rolling resistance

The automatic anti-lock brake helps to stabilise the braking process and prevent the wheels from locking.
Because the automatic anti-lock brake prevents the wheels from locking, you can also steer while braking.
Nevertheless, you should brake in a controlled manner when leaning, as the motorbike could slip sideways due to heavy braking.

In contrast to the standard anti-lock brake, the lean angle-optimised anti-lock brake increases the steering ability by reducing the set-up torque, especially during critical braking manoeuvres in bends.

questionTextSource: What is the effect of an automatic anti-locking device (ABS)?
explanationSource: An antilocking system ensures that the wheels of a vehicle do not block even when the car driver performs an emergency stop. The car remains at least limitedly steerable and the braking distance does not change even on slippery roads. In aquaplaning, a water gore between the road surface and the tires is created mainly by high speeds. Floating of the vehicle is not prevented by the antilocking system.
answerASource: The vehicle is braked in the best possible way also on wet roadways
answerBSource: Steering control is largely retained when braking
answerCSource: Aquaplaning is prevented

questionTextSource: What are the advantages of an automatic anti-locking device (ABS)?

questionTextSource: What are the advantages of an automatic anti-locking device (ABS)?
explanationSource: An anti-lock braking system is particularly useful for heavy braking on wet or dirty roads. It counteracts possible locking of the wheels by controlling the brake pressure at short intervals. This prevents the vehicle from breaking out of the lane. The antilocking system has no effect on driving in curves. Spinning of the wheels when starting can prevent the traction control system (TCS), not the antilocking system.
answerASource: It is possible to brake heavily and avoid an obstacle at the same time
answerBSource: On setting off, wheelspin is prevented
answerCSource: The danger of tipping over is reduced when braking on bends

questionTextSource: What is the purpose of an adaptive cruise control system (ACC) in motor vehicles?

The active cruise control system adjusts the vehicle to the speed you set, just like ordinary cruise control.

questionTextSource: Why must you ensure the brake fluid is changed regularly in accordance with the vehicle manufacturer's instructions?
explanationSource: You should have the brake fluid changed regularly according to the manufacturer's specifications, because this keeps the brake system functioning properly even under high loads, so that the water content in the brake fluid does not become unacceptably high and so that the components of the brake system are not damaged.

questionTextSource: A car is fitted with winter tyres (M+S). A sticker reading "Mit M+S 160" is attached to the dashboard. What does it mean?
explanationSource: When driving with these tires they must not exceed the speed indicated on the sticker, the tires are not approved for higher speeds. If you drive faster, the tires could overheat and get damaged.
answerASource: You must not drive faster than 160 km/h
answerBSource: The sticker does not apply when the roadway is dry
answerCSource: The sticker does not apply when the roadway is wet due to falling rain
questionTextTarget: Avtomobil qishki shinalar (M+S) bilan jihozlangan. Asboblar panelida “Mit M+S 160” yozuvi bor. Bu nimani bildiradi?
explanationTarget: Bu shinalar bilan stikerda ko‘rsatilgan tezlikdan oshib bo‘lmaydi. Tezroq haydash shinalarni qizdirib, shikastlashi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Yo‘l quruq bo‘lsa, stiker amal qilmaydi
answerCTarget: Yomg‘ir sabab yo‘l ho‘l bo‘lsa, stiker amal qilmaydi

questionTextSource: What must you remember when fitting winter tyres (M+S)?
explanationSource: The optimal air pressure for winter tires may be different when there is no snow and the road is dry. It's recommended to increase the air pressure by approx. 0.2 bar compared to summer tires.
answerASource: The air pressure should be slightly higher than with summer tyres (approx. 0.2 bar)
answerBSource: Driving characteristics can be different on dry roadways
answerCSource: The air pressure should be lower than with summer tyres
questionTextTarget: Qishki shinalar (M+S) o‘rnatilganda nimani yodda tutishingiz kerak?
explanationTarget: Qishki shinalarda havo bosimi yozgi shinalarga nisbatan biroz yuqoriroq bo‘lishi mumkin, odatda taxminan 0,2 bar. Quruq yo‘lda haydash xususiyatlari farq qilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Havo bosimi yozgi shinalarga qaraganda biroz yuqoriroq bo‘lishi kerak, taxminan 0,2 bar
answerBTarget: Quruq yo‘lda haydash xususiyatlari boshqacha bo‘lishi mumkin

explanationTarget: O‘t o‘chirgich tekshiruv muddati tekshiruv yorlig‘ida yoki o‘t o‘chirgichning texnik xizmat jurnalida ko‘rsatiladi.
answerCTarget: Ro‘yxatdan o‘tkazish guvohnomasi I-qismidagi yopishtirma muhrda

questionTextSource: You are driving a double-decker bus. Where should a fire extinguisher be located?
explanationSource: According to Section 35g of the Road Traffic Licensing Regulations (StVZO), double-decker buses must carry at least two operational fire extinguishers with a filling mass of 6 kg each. A fire extinguisher should be placed in the immediate vicinity of the driver's seat to provide the driver with quick access in an emergency. The second fire extinguisher must be located on the upper passenger level so that rapid action can be taken there in the event of a fire. This arrangement ensures that both the driver and passengers on both levels of the bus can act quickly in the event of a fire to increase the safety of all occupants.
answerASource: In the immediate vicinity of the driver’s seat
answerBSource: On the upper deck
answerCSource: In the luggage compartment
questionTextTarget: Ikki qavatli avtobusni boshqaryapsiz. O‘t o‘chirgich qayerda joylashgan bo‘lishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Ikki qavatli avtobusda kamida ikkita 6 kg li ishlaydigan o‘t o‘chirgich bo‘lishi kerak. Ulardan biri haydovchi o‘rindig‘i yaqinida, ikkinchisi yuqori qavatda joylashadi.

questionTextSource: What is the normal trial period?
explanationSource: Normally, the probationary period is 2 years. But there are also situations where it can be extended to up to 4 years.
answerASource: 2 years
answerBSource: 1 year
answerCSource: 3 years
questionTextTarget: Oddiy sinov muddati qancha?
explanationTarget: Haydovchilik guvohnomasidagi odatiy sinov muddati 2 yil. Ayrim holatlarda u 4 yilgacha uzaytirilishi mumkin.

questionTextSource: You are currently in the probationary period and to date have not come to the attention of the authorities. What consequences may result if you fail to observe the traffic sign "Stop. Give way." and thereby endanger other road users?
explanationSource: Failure to observe the traffic sign "Stop. Grant right of way" is a serious violation, an A violation, which is recorded in the driving qualifying register. In the event of an A-violation or two minor violations (B-violations) within the probationary period, you will have to attend a retraining seminar as a novice driver. You will not have to take an exam again.
answerASource: An order to attend an advanced seminar for new drivers
answerBSource: Entry into the Central Register of Road Traffic Offenders
answerCSource: An order to resit a theoretical driving licence test
questionTextTarget: Hozir sinov muddatidasiz va shu paytgacha organlar e’tiboriga tushmagansiz. “Stop. Yo‘l bering” belgisiga rioya qilmay, boshqa yo‘l ishtirokchilariga xavf tug‘dirsangiz, qanday oqibatlar bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: “Stop. Yo‘l bering” belgisiga rioya qilmaslik jiddiy A-qoidabuzarlik hisoblanadi. Sinov muddatida bunday qoidabuzarlik yangi haydovchilar uchun qo‘shimcha seminar va reyestrga yozuvga olib kelishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Yangi haydovchilar uchun qo‘shimcha seminarda qatnashish majburiyati
answerBTarget: Yo‘l harakati qoidabuzarlari markaziy reyestriga yozuv
answerCTarget: Nazariy haydovchilik imtihonini qayta topshirish majburiyati

questionTextSource: What should be achieved by attending an advanced seminar during the probationary period?
explanationSource: At the retraining seminar you will learn how to analyze your daily driving behavior and raise your awareness of dangerous situations in the probationary period. Points cannot be deducted with the seminar. This can be done in the driving ability seminar.
answerASource: A more considerate and risk-conscious attitude to driving on public roads
answerBSource: Improved risk awareness
answerCSource: Reducing the number of points in the Central Register of Road Traffic Offenders
questionTextTarget: Sinov muddatida qo‘shimcha seminarda qatnashish orqali nimaga erishilishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Qo‘shimcha seminar haydovchining yo‘l harakatida ehtiyotkorroq va xavfni ongliroq baholaydigan munosabatini shakllantirish hamda xavf sezgirligini oshirishga qaratilgan.
answerATarget: Yo‘l harakatida yanada ehtiyotkor va xavfni ongliroq baholaydigan haydash munosabati
answerCTarget: Yo‘l harakati qoidabuzarlari markaziy reyestridagi ballarni kamaytirish

questionTextSource: Having committed several violations during the probationary period, the authorities have ordered a driver to attend an advanced seminar. The new driver fails to comply with the order. What may he now anticipate?
explanationSource: If the novice driver fails to attend the retraining seminar as required, he is threatened with the immediate loss of his driving license. An additional fine will not be imposed. Also, no points will be entered in the register of driver fitness.
answerASource: The withdrawal of the driving licence
answerBSource: A notice to pay a public fine
answerCSource: Additional points in the Central Register of Road Traffic Offenders
questionTextTarget: Sinov muddatida bir necha qoidabuzarlik qilgan haydovchiga organlar qo‘shimcha seminarda qatnashishni buyurdi. Yangi haydovchi bu buyruqqa rioya qilmasa, endi nimani kutishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Buyurilgan qo‘shimcha seminarga qatnashmasa, haydovchilik guvohnomasi olib qo‘yilishi mumkin.
answerCTarget: Yo‘l harakati qoidabuzarlari markaziy reyestriga qo‘shimcha ballar

questionTextSource: What should a driving licence applicant anticipate if he is found driving without a licence?
explanationSource: A person who wants to obtain a driving license not only has to bring along the necessary physical and mental requirements. In addition, he must not have repeatedly violated traffic regulations or penal laws. This would show that the applicant is not suitable for driving a motor vehicle. The same applies to driving without a license. Should a person, who wants to obtain a driving license, drive without one, the authorities might not allow you to attend the exam.
answerASource: The driving licence authority may withdraw the application inspection order
answerBSource: A test may be ordered to ascertain your aptitude for driving motor vehicles
answerCSource: No consequences, as long as you are registered with a driving school
questionTextTarget: Haydovchilik guvohnomasi olishga ariza bergan shaxs guvohnomasiz haydagani aniqlansa, nimani kutishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Guvohnomasiz haydash haydashga yaroqlilikka shubha tug‘diradi. Haydovchilik guvohnomasi organi imtihon topshirish buyrug‘ini bekor qilishi yoki haydashga yaroqlilikni tekshirishni talab qilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Haydovchilik guvohnomasi organi ariza bo‘yicha imtihon buyrug‘ini bekor qilishi mumkin
answerBTarget: Motorli transport vositalarini boshqarishga yaroqlilikni aniqlash uchun tekshiruv tayinlanishi mumkin
answerCTarget: Haydovchilik maktabida ro‘yxatdan o‘tgan bo‘lsa, hech qanday oqibat yo‘q

questionTextSource: A learner driver has committed several violations during the probationary period. The authority has ordered that the driver attends a supplementary driving course. The learner driver fails to comply with this order. What can they expect to happen?
explanationSource: The probationary period for novice drivers is 2 years. During this time, very strict penalties from the catalogue of fines apply. If you commit an A offence or two B offences during the probationary period, you will be ordered to attend an advanced training seminar (ASF). If you do not comply with this official order, your driving licence will be revoked.
answerASource: The withdrawal of their driving licence
answerBSource: An extension of the probationary period by another 3 years
answerCSource: An order to attend a driver fitness session
questionTextTarget: Yangi haydovchi sinov muddatida bir necha qoidabuzarlik qildi. Organ unga qo‘shimcha haydovchilik kursida qatnashishni buyurdi. Yangi haydovchi bu buyruqqa rioya qilmasa, nima bo‘lishini kutishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Sinov muddatida buyurilgan qo‘shimcha seminarda qatnashmaslik haydovchilik guvohnomasining olib qo‘yilishiga olib keladi.

questionTextSource: A driving licence applicant practices practical driving skills without a driving instructor on public roads. What should he expect if the police perform a check on him?
explanationSource:
As a driving licence applicant, you are not allowed to drive on public roads without a instructor. Driving without a license is a criminal offence and can be punished with a fine or prison sentence.
The police can order a check of your ability to drive. As a driving license applicant, you run the risk of never receiving a driving license.
answerASource: A criminal prosecution
answerBSource: A review of his fitness to drive a motor vehicle
answerCSource: No consequences provided he is accompanied in the vehicle by a holder of a driving licence
questionTextTarget: Haydovchilik guvohnomasi olishga ariza bergan shaxs jamoat yo‘llarida haydovchilik o‘qituvchisisiz amaliy haydashni mashq qilmoqda. Politsiya tekshirsa, u nimani kutishi kerak?
explanationTarget: Haydovchilik guvohnomasi oluvchi shaxs o‘qituvchisiz jamoat yo‘lida haydashga haqli emas. Bu guvohnomasiz haydash jinoyati bo‘lib, jinoiy ta’qib va haydashga yaroqlilik tekshiruviga olib kelishi mumkin.
answerBTarget: Motorli transport vositasini boshqarishga yaroqliligini tekshirish
answerCTarget: Agar avtomobilda haydovchilik guvohnomasi egasi hamrohlik qilsa, hech qanday oqibat yo‘q

questionTextSource: You are transporting commercial goods with a truck. What is the purpose of the 35-hour further training course, which you must attend within 5 years?
explanationSource: When transporting commercial goods, the aim of the 35-hour training course is to increase health awareness and refresh knowledge of the regulations for freight transport.
answerASource: To increase awareness of health
answerBSource: To refresh my knowledge of the road haulage regulations
answerCSource: To acquire additional driving licence classes
questionTextTarget: Yuk mashinasida tijorat yuklarini tashiyapsiz. 5 yil ichida o‘tishingiz kerak bo‘lgan 35 soatlik malaka oshirish kursining maqsadi nima?
explanationTarget: Tijorat yuk tashishda 35 soatlik kurs sog‘liq bo‘yicha ongni oshirish va yuk tashish qoidalari bo‘yicha bilimlarni yangilashga xizmat qiladi.
answerBTarget: Yo‘l yuk tashish qoidalari bo‘yicha bilimlarimni yangilash

questionTextSource: Working as a professional driver requires you to complete a basic qualification and to regularly attend training programmes. Where will you find information concerning the validity period of your professional driver’s basic qualification?
explanationSource: You can find the information about the time limit on the back of your driving licence.
answerASource: On my driving licence
answerBSource: On the driver card
answerCSource: On the website of the Federal Motor Transport Authority
questionTextTarget: Professional haydovchi sifatida ishlash uchun asosiy malaka va muntazam o‘quv dasturlarida qatnashish talab qilinadi. Professional haydovchi asosiy malakasining amal qilish muddati haqidagi ma’lumotni qayerdan topasiz?
explanationTarget: Malaka amal qilish muddati haqidagi ma’lumot haydovchilik guvohnomasida ko‘rsatiladi.

questionTextSource: You are a commercial bus driver. What is the purpose of the 35-hour further training course, which you must attend within 5 years?
explanationSource: If you are transporting people commercially by bus, within 35-hour training course you will learn how to increase health awareness and refresh your knowledge of the regulations for passenger transport. Participation is compulsory.
answerASource: To increase awareness of health
answerBSource: To refresh my knowledge of the passenger transport regulations
answerCSource: To acquire additional driving licence classes
questionTextTarget: Siz tijorat avtobus haydovchisisiz. 5 yil ichida o‘tishingiz kerak bo‘lgan 35 soatlik malaka oshirish kursining maqsadi nima?
explanationTarget: Tijorat yo‘lovchi tashishda 35 soatlik kurs sog‘liq bo‘yicha ongni oshirish va yo‘lovchi tashish qoidalari bo‘yicha bilimlarni yangilashga xizmat qiladi.
answerBTarget: Yo‘lovchi tashish qoidalari bo‘yicha bilimlarimni yangilash

questionTextSource: What can lead to a review of your fitness to be a bus driver?
answerASource: - my physical capabilities
answerBSource: - my mental capacity
answerCSource: - the reliability of my employer
questionTextTarget: Avtobus haydovchisi sifatidagi yaroqliligingiz qayta tekshirilishiga nima sabab bo‘lishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Avtobus haydovchisi yaroqliligi jismoniy qobiliyat yoki ruhiy qobiliyat shubha ostida bo‘lsa qayta tekshirilishi mumkin. Ish beruvchining ishonchliligi bunga kirmaydi.

questionTextSource: When can the authorities order a bus driver to undergo a fitness assessment?
answerASource: If the driver has seriously violated road traffic regulations
answerBSource: If the driver has committed a serious road traffic offence
answerCSource: If there are indications that the bus driver has a high potential for aggression
questionTextTarget: Organlar avtobus haydovchisidan qachon yaroqlilik tekshiruvini talab qilishi mumkin?
explanationTarget: Agar haydovchi yo‘l harakati qoidalarini jiddiy buzgan bo‘lsa, og‘ir yo‘l harakati jinoyati sodir etgan bo‘lsa yoki unda yuqori agressiya salohiyati borligi haqida belgilar bo‘lsa, yaroqlilik tekshiruvi buyurilishi mumkin.
answerATarget: Haydovchi yo‘l harakati qoidalarini jiddiy buzgan bo‘lsa
answerBTarget: Haydovchi og‘ir yo‘l harakati jinoyati sodir etgan bo‘lsa
answerCTarget: Avtobus haydovchisida yuqori agressiya salohiyati borligiga belgilar bo‘lsa

questionTextSource: After receiving your Class C driving licence for the first time, you want to transport goods commercially. How can you meet the requirements?
answerASource: - the accelerated initial qualification
answerBSource: - a professional driver training programme
answerCSource: - a 35-hour advanced training course
questionTextTarget: C toifali haydovchilik guvohnomasini birinchi marta olgandan keyin tijorat yuklarini tashimoqchisiz. Talablarni qanday bajarishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Tijorat yuk tashish uchun talablarni tezlashtirilgan boshlang‘ich malaka yoki professional haydovchi kasbiy ta’limi orqali bajarish mumkin. Faqat 35 soatlik malaka oshirish boshlang‘ich malaka o‘rnini bosmaydi.

questionTextSource: After receiving your Class D driving licence for the first time, you want to transport passengers commercially. How can you meet the requirements?
answerASource: - the accelerated initial qualification
answerBSource: - a professional driver training programme
answerCSource: - a 35-hour advanced training course
questionTextTarget: D toifali haydovchilik guvohnomasini birinchi marta olgandan keyin tijorat yo‘lovchi tashishni xohlaysiz. Talablarni qanday bajarishingiz mumkin?
explanationTarget: Tijorat yo‘lovchi tashish uchun talablarni tezlashtirilgan boshlang‘ich malaka yoki professional haydovchi kasbiy ta’limi orqali bajarish mumkin. Faqat 35 soatlik malaka oshirish boshlang‘ich malaka emas.

questionTextSource: To be employed as a professional driver, you will need an initial qualification as well as regular training. How are the relevant proofs documented?
explanationSource: Professional drivers who work in the transport of goods or passengers on public roads require an initial qualification and then regular further training. The validity of these trainings are documented on the driver qualification certificate.
answerASource: On the driver qualification card
answerBSource: In the Federal Motor Vehicle and Transport Authority’s professional driver qualification register (KBA)
answerCSource: On the webpage of my driver licensing agency
questionTextTarget: Professional haydovchi sifatida ishlash uchun boshlang‘ich malaka va muntazam o‘quvlar kerak. Tegishli dalillar qanday hujjatlashtiriladi?
explanationTarget: Yuk yoki yo‘lovchi tashishda ishlaydigan professional haydovchilarning malaka va o‘quv dalillari haydovchi malaka kartasida hamda KBA professional haydovchi malakasi reyestrida hujjatlashtiriladi.
answerBTarget: Federal motorli transport idorasining professional haydovchi malaka reyestrida (KBA)

questionTextSource: What is documented on the driver qualification card?
explanationSource: Professional drivers who work in the transport of goods or passengers on public roads require an initial qualification and then regular further training. The validity of these trainings are documented on the driver qualification certificate.
answerASource: - initial qualification
answerBSource: - training
answerCSource: - the issued driver’s licence
questionTextTarget: Haydovchi malaka kartasida nima hujjatlashtiriladi?
explanationTarget: Jamoat yo‘llarida yuk yoki yo‘lovchi tashishda ishlaydigan professional haydovchilar boshlang‘ich malaka va keyin muntazam malaka oshirishdan o‘tishlari kerak. Ushbu malaka va o‘quvlarning amal qilish muddati haydovchi malaka kartasida hujjatlashtiriladi.
